vocabulary.definition: adj. 老祖父的, 慈祥的, 老祖父似的
vocabulary.context: Juni's soft brown eyes glowed in his wizened grandfatherly face framed by curly, snow-white hair.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朱尼柔和的棕色眼睛在他那张干瘪的、祖父般的脸上闪闪发亮，脸上有一圈卷曲的雪白头发

vocabulary.definition: adj. 忘不了的, 令人难忘的
vocabulary.context: This was an incredible day!" Slowly I walked alone back down the dock, silently submerged in the feeling of Juni's unforgettable sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这真是令人难以置信的一天！"我慢慢地独自走回码头，静静地沉浸在朱尼令人难忘的大海的感觉中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发冷光的, 发光的；[电] 发光的
vocabulary.context: The sunlight filtering through the diamond-clear water made their scales luminescent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阳光透过钻石般清澈的海水，使它们的鳞片发光

vocabulary.definition: n. 柔滑, 平滑, 平坦；[化] 平稳性; 平稳度
vocabulary.context: It was thrilling to feel the surprising silky smoothness of its skin, not at all rough or scary the way I thought it would feel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 令人兴奋的是，它的皮肤令人惊讶地丝般光滑，一点也不像我想象的那样粗糙或可怕

vocabulary.definition: adj. (尤指在颜色或滋味方面)似橙的
vocabulary.context: Big purple sea fans, small gray-white brain corals, and hypnotic sea anemones of golden-rod yellow and orangey reds huddled tightly together, like colorful crowds in a city.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 紫色的大海扇、灰白色的小脑珊瑚、金黄色、橙红色的催眠海葵紧紧地挤在一起，就像城市里色彩斑斓的人群

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 嬉戏, 玩耍
vocabulary.context: Juni frolicked with the sharks in lazy, playful circles a small distance away from our anchored boat, stroking each shark along its sides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 朱尼在离我们停泊的船不远的地方与鲨鱼一起懒洋洋地、顽皮地绕着圈子嬉戏，抚摸着每条鲨鱼的两侧

vocabulary.definition: adv. 有节奏地
vocabulary.context: Like obedient ducklings behind their mother, we followed him, our flippers rhythmically pushing against the crystalline water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就像听话的小鸭子跟在母亲身后一样，我们跟着他，我们的脚蹼有节奏地推着晶莹的海水

vocabulary.definition: adj. 透明的；水晶般的；水晶制的
vocabulary.context: Like obedient ducklings behind their mother, we followed him, our flippers rhythmically pushing against the crystalline water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就像听话的小鸭子跟在母亲身后一样，我们跟着他，我们的脚蹼有节奏地推着晶莹的海水

vocabulary.definition: adv. 亲切地, 温暖地, 热心地
vocabulary.context: I do not want you to be afraid." Juni was smiling and talking warmly to us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我不想让你们害怕。"朱尼微笑着和我们热情地交谈

vocabulary.definition: n. 笨手笨脚的人, 笨蛋
vocabulary.context: "You're such a klutz, Janet," said Malia as the dimes she'd been holding clattered to the tile floor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你真是个笨手笨脚的人，珍妮特，"玛利亚说，她手里的一毛钱掉到了瓷砖地板上

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)发出叮当声；n. 叮当声
vocabulary.context: She listened for a plink but heard nothing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她听了一声叮当声，但什么也没听到

vocabulary.definition: n. 小的斑点, 亮斑, 斑；v.t. 弄上斑点, 弄成斑纹, 点缀
vocabulary.context: The stain was black with green speckles, like mildew, and it was the shape and size of a peanut, with two bulgy ends.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 污渍呈黑色，带有绿色斑点，像发霉的，形状和大小如花生，有两个凸出的末端

vocabulary.definition: n. 拍打, 重击；v. 拍打
vocabulary.context: Her milk carton slid off and landed on the floor with a thwack .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的牛奶盒滑落，重重地落在地板上

vocabulary.definition: n. 钉球戏, 弹球戏
vocabulary.context: Janet was off, bumping into kids like a pinball in a chute, her clumsy arms flailing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 珍妮特出发了，像滑道里的弹球一样撞到了孩子们，她笨拙的手臂挥舞着

vocabulary.definition: adj. 第一百万的, 百万分之一的；n. 第一百万, 百万分之一
vocabulary.context: Bubb to go with her lunch, but Janet had just crashed into her, hard, for what must have been the millionth time that year, and sent the dimes scattering.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴布准备去吃午饭，但珍妮特刚刚猛烈地撞到了她身上，那一年肯定是第一百万次了，把硬币打碎了

vocabulary.definition: n. 硬纸盒, 纸板箱；[化] 卡纸
vocabulary.context: Her milk carton slid off and landed on the floor with a thwack .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的牛奶盒滑落，重重地落在地板上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 处罚, 惩罚, 严厉对待；v.i. 惩罚
vocabulary.context: Should they really punish it for that?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们真的应该为此惩罚它吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 篮板；背板；后挡板
vocabulary.context: Shots off the backboards are going to go in a lot more than rim shots if you're shooting from the floor."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你从地板上投篮，从篮板上投篮会比篮下投篮更多。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 岔开, 岔道, 关闭
vocabulary.context: It was raining and we were on the highway, approaching the turnoff toward our house in Hartsdale, when a truck skidded across the road and hit our rear bumper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当时正在下雨，我们在高速公路上，接近通往哈茨代尔家的岔路口时，一辆卡车滑过马路，撞上了我们的后保险杠

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好管闲事的；爱追问的；大鼻子的 (nosy的变形)
vocabulary.context: Sarah is cool but the nosiest person in school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莎拉很酷，但却是学校里最爱管闲事的人

vocabulary.definition: n. 透露情报, 密报, 跳球
vocabulary.context: We started the game and Madison got the tip-off.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们开始了比赛，麦迪逊得到了举报

vocabulary.definition: n. 接头处；绞合, 扭绞；带球上篮
vocabulary.context: We took 17 shots and made 11 of them, all layups off the backboard, and two foul shots for a total of 38 points.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们出手17次，命中11次，全部是篮板上篮，还有两次罚球，总共得到38分

vocabulary.definition: v. 打败( overmatch的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: "Our kids looked a little overmatched in the first half," Mr.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们的孩子在上半场看起来有点势不可挡，"先生说

vocabulary.definition: n. 门侧柱
vocabulary.context: She had a big piece of the purple stuff around her neck as she leaned against the doorjamb.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她靠在门框上时，她脖子上挂着一大块紫色的东西

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使沮丧, 使灰心
vocabulary.context: At halftime, we rolled into the locker room feeling dejected.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中场休息时，我们垂头丧气地走进更衣室

vocabulary.definition: n. 翻倒, 翻转, 半圆酥饼, 营业额, 流通, 周转；adj. 可翻转的
vocabulary.context: We made a lot of wild passes for turnovers, and once, when I was actually leading a fast break, I got called for traveling when the ball got ahead of me, and I touched the wheels twice before dribbling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们因失误而进行了很多疯狂的传球，有一次，当我实际上领先快攻时，当球在我前面时，我被要求走动，我在运球之前两次触碰了轮子

vocabulary.definition: n. 标志, 旗标, 旗子, 信号旗, 菖蒲；v.t. 悬旗, 打旗号, 铺石板；v.i. 无力地下垂；[计] 标志; 属性标记命令
vocabulary.context: We made more flags.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们制作了更多旗帜

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 缝纫, 缝合, 缝；v.i. 缝纫
vocabulary.context: She sewed many things, including clothes, blankets, and curtains.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她缝制了很多东西，包括衣服、毯子和窗帘

vocabulary.definition: n. 斑纹, 条纹；[医] 纹, 条纹
vocabulary.context: It had stars and stripes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它有星条旗

vocabulary.definition: adv. 现在, 当前, 一般, 普通；[计] 当前
vocabulary.context: Washington was leading the army, but the army did not currently have a flag.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 华盛顿率领军队，但军队目前没有旗帜

vocabulary.definition: n. 项目, 条款, 一则, 项；[计] 项
vocabulary.context: Everyone knew she would do a wonderful job, so they came to her home and asked her to make many items for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都知道她会做得很好，所以他们来到她家并请她为他们制作许多物品

vocabulary.definition: n. 消费者；[化] 顾客
vocabulary.context: Betsy Ross made her living as a seamstress, and had many customers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 贝特西·罗斯（Betsy Ross）以裁缝为生，拥有许多顾客

vocabulary.definition: n. 租金, 租用, 雇用；v.t. 雇请, 出租；v.i. 受雇
vocabulary.context: Business was so good, and as she began to get very busy, Betsy hired me to help.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 生意太好了，当她开始变得很忙时，贝特西雇佣了我来帮忙

vocabulary.definition: n. 布料, 织品, 布；[建] 布
vocabulary.context: Each day, she would start with a pile of cloth and create things people paid her to make for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每天，她都会从一堆布开始，制作人们付钱给她做的东西

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
vocabulary.context: Everyone knew she would do a wonderful job, so they came to her home and asked her to make many items for them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都知道她会做得很好，所以他们来到她家并请她为他们制作许多物品

vocabulary.definition: adv. 想不到的, 突然的, 意外的, 出乎意料的
vocabulary.context: A timid little Mouse came upon him unexpectedly, and in her fright and haste to get away, ran across the Lion's nose.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一只胆怯的小老鼠意外地向他袭来，她惊慌失措，急忙逃跑，跑到了狮子的鼻子上

vocabulary.definition: v. 偿还, 报答, 报复
vocabulary.context: "Please let me go and some day I will surely repay you." "Leo et mus" by Unknown is in the public domain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "请放了我，总有一天我一定会报答你的。" Unknown 的"Leo et mus"属于公共领域

vocabulary.definition: v. 咬, 啃, 侵蚀, 消耗, 折磨
vocabulary.context: Running to one of the great ropes that bound him, she gnawed it until it parted, and soon the Lion was free.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她跑到绑住他的一根大绳子旁，咬住它直到它分开，很快狮子就自由了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 愉快的, 被逗乐的
vocabulary.context: The Lion was much amused to think that a Mouse could ever help him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狮子想到老鼠能帮助他，感到非常好笑

vocabulary.definition: adv. 愤怒地
vocabulary.context: Roused from his nap, the Lion laid his huge paw angrily on the tiny creature to kill her.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狮子从午睡中醒来，愤怒地将巨大的爪子放在这个小生物身上，想要杀死她

vocabulary.definition: n. 觉醒, 奋起, 干杯；v.t. 唤醒, 鼓舞, 激动, 使振奋, 惊起；v.i. 醒来, 奋起
vocabulary.context: Roused from his nap, the Lion laid his huge paw angrily on the tiny creature to kill her.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狮子从午睡中醒来，愤怒地将巨大的爪子放在这个小生物身上，想要杀死她

vocabulary.definition: v. 乞求, 乞讨, 请求
vocabulary.context: "Spare me!" begged the poor Mouse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "饶了我吧！"可怜的老鼠哀求道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不知道的, 未知的, 陌生的；n. 未知物, 未知数
vocabulary.context: "Please let me go and some day I will surely repay you." "Leo et mus" by Unknown is in the public domain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "请放了我，总有一天我一定会报答你的。" Unknown 的"Leo et mus"属于公共领域

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能的, 不会的；[法] 无能力的, 无资格的, 没有办法的
vocabulary.context: Unable to free himself, he filled the forest with his angry roaring.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他无法挣脱，他愤怒的咆哮充满了森林

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 答辩；回答；重新聚合；v.t. 再加入；使…再结合；再回答
vocabulary.context: In March 1995, after a short time playing baseball, Michael returned to the basketball court, and re-joined the Chicago Bulls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1995年3月，在短暂打棒球后，迈克尔重返篮球场，并重新加盟芝加哥公牛队

vocabulary.definition: n. 归纳法, 感应, 就职, 入门；[计] 归纳法
vocabulary.context: Attending the induction ceremony was a happy but sad time for Jordan because being at the event meant "your basketball career is completely over," he explained.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 参加入职典礼对乔丹来说是一段快乐而又悲伤的时光，因为参加这次活动意味着"你的篮球生涯彻底结束了"，他解释道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 音波的, 音速的, 声音的；[电] 音波
vocabulary.context: He eventually helped them win the championship against the Seattle Sonics in the 1995 to 96 season.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他最终帮助球队在1995至96赛季对阵西雅图超音速队，夺得总冠军

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 引导, 使入门, 引入, 使就职
vocabulary.context: In April 2009, Jordan received one of basketball's greatest honors: He was inducted into the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2009年4月，乔丹获得了篮球界最伟大的荣誉之一：他入选奈史密斯篮球名人堂

vocabulary.definition: n. 道德规范, 伦理
vocabulary.context: He was known for his competitiveness and his very strong work-ethic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他以其竞争力和强烈的职业道德而闻名

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无名的, 匿名的, 不可名状的
vocabulary.context: At one game Michael Jordan wore a nameless no.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一场比赛中，迈克尔·乔丹穿着一件无名的 7 号球衣

vocabulary.definition: n. 演习, 调遣, 策略；v. 调遣, 演习, 用计
vocabulary.context: Jordan maneuvered back and forth, then took a jump shot and made the basket!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 乔丹前后移动，然后跳投命中！

vocabulary.definition: n. 会议；[经] 会议, 讨论会, 协商会
vocabulary.context: The Bulls made it to the Eastern Conference Finals in 1990 and won their first NBA championship the following year by beating the Los Angeles Lakers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公牛队于1990年进入东部决赛，并于次年击败洛杉矶湖人队赢得了他们的第一个NBA总冠军

vocabulary.definition: 【举重】；v.t. 卧推(杠铃等)，用杠铃推举；v.i. 进行卧推锻炼(或比赛)
vocabulary.context: He bench-pressed 180 pounds, then put the weights down and said, "Hey, dude."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他卧推 180 磅，然后放下哑铃并说道："嘿，伙计。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 膝盖骨, 护膝
vocabulary.context: He swung and hit his kneecap with the racket.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他挥动球拍，击中了他的膝盖

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 讲得比...多(或快、好、久)
vocabulary.context: "They can outtalk a man any day of the week."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他们在一周中的任何一天都可以比男人说得更多。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 放气, 抽出空气, 使缩小；v.i. 缩小
vocabulary.context: His pale belly hung over his belt, just slightly, like a deflated ball.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他苍白的肚子轻轻垂在腰带上，就像泄了气的皮球

vocabulary.definition: n. 跳飞, 跳弹；v. (使)跳飞
vocabulary.context: The ball would hit the front wall, then ricochet off the side wall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球会击中前墙，然后从侧壁弹开

vocabulary.definition: n. 斑点, 污点；v.t. 使有斑点
vocabulary.context: He found the ball in the gutter, splotched with mud that he wiped off on his pants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他在排水沟里发现了球，上面沾满了泥，他用裤子擦掉了泥

vocabulary.definition: n. 墙手球, 墙手球运动
vocabulary.context: He told him that the game was like handball, that the play was off the front, the ceiling, and the side walls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他告诉他，比赛就像手球，比赛是从正面、天花板和侧壁进行的

vocabulary.definition: adv. 一瘸一拐地, 不完全地
vocabulary.context: "I guess that's three to nothing, right?" José said lamely.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我猜这就是三比零，对吧？"何塞有气无力地说

vocabulary.definition: adv. 邪恶地；敌意地
vocabulary.context: The ball had hit him in the back, and it stung viciously.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球击中了他的背部，狠狠地刺痛了他

vocabulary.definition: adj. 血红的, 血污的
vocabulary.context: She was reading from her science book and biting into her second sandwich, which was thick with slabs of meat, cheese, and a blood-red tomato.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她一边读科学书，一边咬着第二块三明治，里面有厚厚的肉片、奶酪和一个血红色的西红柿

vocabulary.definition: adv. 肩并肩地；齐心协力地
vocabulary.context: A newspaper photographer took pictures of the two girls standing shoulder-to-shoulder, with Lupe holding the bigger trophy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名报纸摄影师拍下了两个女孩肩并肩站着的照片，卢佩拿着更大的奖杯

vocabulary.definition: n. 俯伏撑；[机] 模面挤凹
vocabulary.context: To strengthen her wrists, she decided to do twenty push-ups on her fingertips, five at a time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了增强手腕力量，她决定用指尖做二十个俯卧撑，一次五个

vocabulary.definition: n. 受奖者；[法] 受奖者
vocabulary.context: Lupe Medrano, a shy girl who spoke in whispers, was the school's spelling bee champion, winner of the reading contest at the public library three summers in a row, blue ribbon awardee in the science fair, the top student at her piano recital, and the playground grand champion in chess.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卢佩·梅德拉诺 (Lupe Medrano) 是一个害羞、说话小声的女孩，她是学校的拼字比赛冠军、连续三个夏天在公共图书馆阅读比赛的获胜者、科学博览会的蓝丝带奖得主、钢琴独奏会的尖子生以及国际象棋操场的总冠军

vocabulary.definition: n. [体]短网拍墙球,手球式墙球(比赛规则和场地都与有四面墙场地的墙手球相同,但击球用以皮带拴腕的短柄球拍,球较墙手球略大而软)
vocabulary.context: The father had been planning to play racquetball with a friend Saturday, but he said he would be there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 父亲原计划周六和朋友一起打壁球，但他说他会去

vocabulary.definition: n. 床单, 床罩
vocabulary.context: She smoothed her bedspread and practiced shooting, softly at first so that her aim would be accurate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她抚平床罩，练习射击，一开始动作轻柔，以便瞄准准确

vocabulary.definition: n. 玛瑙, 五又二分之一点铅字；[化] 玛瑙149
vocabulary.context: She used her shooter, a milky agate with hypnotic swirls, to blast them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她用她的射手--带有催眠漩涡的乳白色玛瑙--来炸毁他们

vocabulary.definition: adj. 催眠的, 在受催眠状态中, 易于催眠的；n. 催眠药, 安眠药, 催眠状态的人
vocabulary.context: She used her shooter, a milky agate with hypnotic swirls, to blast them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她用她的射手--带有催眠漩涡的乳白色玛瑙--来炸毁他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 擦子

vocabulary.definition: n. 野生山羊( ibex的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: A study of Siberian ibexes at Brookfield Zoo in Chicago showed that even though half their enclosure was flat and grassy - a perfect place to frolic in safety - the young goats chose to play most of the time on a steep, rocky area where they were much more likely to get hurt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 芝加哥布鲁克菲尔德动物园对西伯利亚野山羊的一项研究表明，尽管它们的围栏有一半是平坦的、长满青草的--这是安全嬉戏的完美场所--但小山羊大部分时间还是选择在陡峭的岩石区域玩耍，在那里它们更容易受伤

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一种由 44 个管组成的打击乐器，每个管都演奏不同的音符

vocabulary.definition: n. 厘米；[医] 厘米
vocabulary.context: "You have to dig about 8 inches (20 centimeters) down into the frozen lake to get bubble-free ice," he says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你必须在结冰的湖中挖大约 8 英寸（20 厘米）才能得到无气泡的冰，"他说

vocabulary.definition: n. 管弦乐队, 乐队演奏处
vocabulary.context: Tim Linhart is an American ice sculptor who has created a small orchestra of ice instruments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蒂姆·林哈特 (Tim Linhart) 是一位美国冰雕艺术家，他创作了一个小型冰乐器管弦乐队

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 娱乐, 招待, 怀抱；v.i. 款待
vocabulary.context: The performances have been entertaining people for more than 20 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 二十多年来，这些表演一直为人们带来欢乐

vocabulary.definition: v. 决定, 决心
vocabulary.context: That experience just made him more determined to create ice instruments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那次经历让他更加坚定了制作冰乐器的决心

vocabulary.definition: n. 纸团, 唾沫球
vocabulary.context: Fifteen minutes into the period, a large spitball landed on the middle of the page Mrs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 开始十五分钟后，一个大纸团落在了页面中间

vocabulary.definition: adj. 问候的, 称赞的, 夸奖的
vocabulary.context: When no one was looking, he grabbed a book of complimentary matches from the counter and raced back to school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 趁没人注意的时候，他从柜台上抓起一本免费的比赛手册，然后跑回学校

vocabulary.definition: adj. 骨胳大的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个身材高大、骨架大、手大的女人，头发花白，卷曲，脸上有皱纹

vocabulary.definition: adj. 卷曲的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卷曲的灰色熔丝从末端突出

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吵闹的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蒂尼认真地看着格雷戈里，然后环顾四周，以确保没有消防队长潜伏在喧闹的孩子群中

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 里面堆满了垃圾：瓶子、罐头、乱七八糟的报纸、旧床垫，甚至还有一个破鸟笼

vocabulary.definition: adj. 邋遢的, 不修边幅的, 不整洁的, 懒散的, 潦草的, 马虎的；adv. 邋遢地, 不修边幅地, 不整洁地, 懒散地, 潦草地, 马虎地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其整洁的状态被她邋遢的学生视为一种责备

vocabulary.definition: n. 装载过多, 超载, 追加罚款, 附加税；v.t. 使装载过多, 追加罚款, 收附加税

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 评价, 估价；[经] 评价, 鉴定

vocabulary.definition: n. 趋光性, 向光性, 光致变色(现象)；[化] 光色互变
vocabulary.context: This idea made sense because plants also use sunlight to find their way - a process called phototropism .

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些难民在战后重新定居在自己的祖国

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从1685年开始，法国天主教徒将被称为胡格诺派的法国新教徒驱逐出法国

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新国家随后决定是否向难民提供庇护或保护

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 名为国际联盟的新国际组织决定解决日益严重的难民问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 半打, 六个

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接下来的六年里我和那个东西一起生活了......

vocabulary.definition: n. 开端者, 在起跑线上的人, 参加赛跑的人, 调度员, 起动机, 酵母；[计] 启动程序, 启动器

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 发令员发出信号，威尔玛出发

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当队伍中的第三位女性向她跑来时，威尔玛伸手去拿接力棒，差点把它掉了

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的母亲通过家庭疗法帮助威尔玛治疗麻疹、腮腺炎、水痘、猩红热、阑尾炎和双重肺炎

vocabulary.definition: num. 第十, 十分之一

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最终，在十年级时，威尔玛有机会成为首发队的一员

vocabulary.definition: n. 猩红色, 绯红色, 红衣；adj. 绯红色的, 鲜红色的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威尔玛在童年时期与小儿麻痹症进行了最艰苦的斗争，这种疾病导致她的左腿残疾

vocabulary.definition: n. 医生, 体格检查；adj. 医学的, 内科的, 药的
vocabulary.context: Rudolph found a black medical college in Nashville, 50 miles away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲁道夫在 50 英里外的纳什维尔发现了一所黑人医学院

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们组成了称为民兵的士兵团体

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与此同时，战争的第一场重大战役在波士顿附近的邦克山发生

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 晚上，托罗和其他牛一起呆在畜栏里，畜栏是一个用来庇护牛群的木制围场

vocabulary.definition: n. 牧人, (美)(非正式)监狱看守；[计] 首部, 首标, 标题, 头标, 报头, 管座, 端板
vocabulary.context: For a cattle herder in Africa, the hardest part of the job is searching for cows lost in the bush.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对于非洲的牧牛人来说，工作中最困难的部分是寻找在灌木丛中迷失的奶牛

vocabulary.definition: adv. 不作努力地, 不费力地
vocabulary.context: "He just lifts his long front legs effortlessly over the wooden poles, and he will be in."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他只要毫不费力地将长前腿举过木杆，他就会进去。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 袋狼, 残酷的人, 贪婪的人
vocabulary.context: The young giraffe might have become a meal for lions or hyenas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 年幼的长颈鹿可能成为狮子或鬣狗的食物

vocabulary.definition: adv. 注意地, 留心地
vocabulary.context: And who was watched most attentively by the herders?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 谁最受牧民关注？

vocabulary.definition: n. 附件, 围墙, 围绕；[化] 机壳; 外壳

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 晚上，托罗和其他牛一起呆在畜栏里，畜栏是一个用来庇护牛群的木制围场

vocabulary.definition: adj. 永久的, 不变的, 固定的, 持久的；n. 烫发；[计] 永久的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长颈鹿可以发出毁灭性的踢击，甚至对狮子也会造成永久性伤害

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 以...回答；v.i. 回答, 响应, 回报, 有反应, 承担责任
vocabulary.context: Like the cattle, he can now also respond to the herders' commands, such as "move" and "stop."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 像牛一样，他现在也可以响应牧民的命令，例如"移动"和"停止"

vocabulary.definition: n. 失眠症患者；[医] 失眠患者
vocabulary.context: "This must be our insomniac, Bobby Jackson," the doctor said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这一定是我们的失眠症患者，鲍比·杰克逊，"医生说

vocabulary.definition: n. 注射器, 洗涤器；v.t. 注射, 洗涤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自动调节的；[化] 自调整

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 会有一些自我调节的发电厂全年运转，这样他就不用担心做饭、看视频或在一百八十个夜晚悄然流逝的过程中用电

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无人出席的, 无随员的, 无侍从的, 无伴的, 未被注意的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让整个世界无人看管似乎是不对的，尽管他意识到这会是多么孤独，但他明白必须有人来做这项工作

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果它能做到专家预测的一切，它将治愈所有疾病和伤害，使我们的细胞恢复活力，让大气中的污染清除，基本上给整个世界一个全新的开始

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 动物学家知道，当你给动物（或人类，它也适用于我们）服用镇静剂时，姿势至关重要

vocabulary.definition: adj. <俚>极大的,其大无比的
vocabulary.context: Now imagine. You need to move rhinos. Not one rhino, but several probably. And they're huge. Humongous. They weigh between 4,000 and 5,000 pounds. It's not like you can just ask them nicely to go somewhere, right? Nope. You have to physically move them. Namibia is pretty rough. There are savannas, salt...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在想象一下。你需要移动犀牛。不是一头犀牛，但可能是几头。而且它们很大。巨大的。它们的重量在 4,000 到 5,000 磅之间。总不能好声好气地请他们去某个地方吧？没有。你必须用身体移动它们。纳米比亚的情况相当恶劣。这里有稀树草原、盐...

vocabulary.definition: n. 空中航线, 风道；[医] 导气管

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 动物学家认为这是因为犀牛的头和脖子下垂，所以呼吸道是开放的，允许空气自由流动

vocabulary.definition: n. 自然资源保护论者

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着自然资源保护主义者需要将犀牛重新安置到国家公园或其他类型的保留地，以帮助犀牛数量继续增长

vocabulary.definition: n. 犀牛

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 世界上三分之一的犀牛生活在纳米比亚

vocabulary.definition: n. 差异, 多样性；[化] 多样性
vocabulary.context: People who are responsible for conserving their species need to relocate them strategically so that different rhinos can breed, thus providing for the much needed genetic diversity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 负责保护物种的人们需要战略性地重新安置它们，以便不同的犀牛能够繁殖，从而提供急需的遗传多样性

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甲虫的数量会冲破屋顶，因为树木一旦被火烧死就毫无防御能力。"结果是，烧毁的森林为黑背啄木鸟提供了完美的食物来源

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作家查尔斯·狄更斯在他的美国之旅中拜访了劳拉，并在他的著作《美国笔记》中专门用一章介绍了她

vocabulary.context: She sat down in one corner of the room, and began to bewail her hard fate; when on a sudden the door opened, and a droll-looking imp hobbled in, and said, "Good morrow to you, my good lass; what are you weeping for?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她坐在房间的一角，开始哀叹自己的悲惨命运；突然，门开了，一个长相滑稽的小恶魔一瘸一拐地走了进来，说道："早上好，我的好姑娘；你哭什么？"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 好笑的, 滑稽的
vocabulary.context: The second day she began with all the comical names she could hear of, Bandy-Legs, Hunchback, Crook-Shanks, and so on; but the imp still said to every one of them, "Madam, that is not my name."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二天，她从她能听到的所有滑稽的名字开始，罗圈腿、驼背、克鲁克山克斯等等；但小恶魔仍然对他们每一个人说道："女士，那不是我的名字。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 疼痛地, 强烈地, 非常
vocabulary.context: Then she grieved sorely at her misfortune, and said she would give him all the wealth of the kingdom if he would let her off, but in vain; till at last her tears softened him, and he said, "I will give you three days' grace, and if during that time you tell me my name, you shall keep your child."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，她对自己的不幸感到非常悲痛，并表示如果他放她走，她愿意把王国的所有财富都给他，但这是徒劳的；直到最后她的泪水软化了他，他说："我会给你三天的宽限，如果在这段时间里你告诉我我的名字，你就可以保住你的孩子。"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了订购我的曲棍球毛衣，她像往常一样做了；她拿出信纸，用她温柔的老师的手写下："亲爱的伊顿先生，您能帮我寄一件加拿大人队的毛衣给我的儿子吗？我儿子十岁了，对于他的年龄来说有点太高了，而罗比塔耶医生认为他有点太瘦了？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们都穿着和他一样的队服，世界上最好的冰球队蒙特利尔加拿大人队的红、白、蓝队服；我们都按照莫里斯·理查德的方式梳理头发，为了将头发固定在适当的位置，我们使用了一种胶水--大量的胶水

vocabulary.definition: adj. 污秽的, 肮脏的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我滑到冰面中央，用脚趾镐将我固定在原地，并以我的节目开始的姿势摆出姿势--双手放在臀部，眼睛向上倾斜，看着冰场肮脏的天花板上悬挂的曲棍球横幅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 高及膝盖的

vocabulary.definition: n. (=kimchee)<朝鲜语>朝鲜泡菜
vocabulary.context: It was as big as a house by the late fall, when all the cabbages had been salted, stuffed with spices, and buried in huge crocks to ferment into a winter's supply of kimchi.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了深秋，它已经像一座房子那么大了，所有的卷心菜都已经腌好了，塞满了香料，埋在巨大的瓦罐里发酵成冬天的泡菜

vocabulary.definition: n. 水蛭, 吸血鬼, 榨取他人利益的人；v.t. 以水蛭吸血；v.i. 依附并榨取别人
vocabulary.context: Every so often, he would take up his feet to look for leeches and then he'd be distracted by the elegant, white crane dipping for tadpoles or the smell of spring wafting down from the mountains.

vocabulary.context: A big burst of neutrinos is passing through your ship.

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 光亮强过..., 使相形见绌, 使失色；v.i. 发光
vocabulary.context: Quickly you fire your rockets and escape, just as Antares outshines every other star in the galaxy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 快速发射火箭并逃脱，就像心宿二比银河系中的所有其他恒星都耀眼一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 流出, 流出物；[医] 流出, 传出, 流出物
vocabulary.context: The outflow of huge amounts of energy - much of it light - pushes outward from the star's center.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大量能量（其中大部分是光）的流出从恒星中心向外推动

vocabulary.definition: n. 复数；adj. 复数的, 两个以上的
vocabulary.context: Most supernovae - that's the plural of supernova and pronounced SOO-per-NOH-vee - come from massive stars.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数超新星 - 这是超新星的复数形式，发音为 SOO-per-NOH-vee - 来自大质量恒星

vocabulary.definition: n. 锂；[化] 锂Li
vocabulary.context: When the universe began, it had only the three lightest elements: hydrogen, helium, and a little lithium.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当宇宙开始时，它只有三种最轻的元素：氢、氦和少量锂

vocabulary.definition: adv. 无害地；无恶意地
vocabulary.context: Neutrinos are tiny particles of matter - they don't hurt you, because they pass harmlessly through everything in their path - but you know what they mean: Antares is about to explode!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中微子是微小的物质粒子--它们不会伤害你，因为它们无害地穿过其路径上的一切--但你知道它们的意思：心宿二即将爆炸！

vocabulary.definition: n. 大量；[经] 兆
vocabulary.context: Now, as your spaceship comes within a few trillion miles of Antares, your neutrino detector sounds an alarm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，当您的宇宙飞船接近心宿二数万亿英里时，您的中微子探测器会发出警报

vocabulary.definition: n. 百万, 无数；num. 百万
vocabulary.context: Within a few million years, the star has no fuel left.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在几百万年内，恒星将耗尽燃料

vocabulary.definition: n. 和平主义者, 反战论者, 不抵抗主义者
vocabulary.context: As a pacifist he opposed war and refused to fight in World War II (1939-45).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为一名和平主义者，他反对战争并拒绝参加第二次世界大战（1939-45）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 同性恋的；n. 同性恋者
vocabulary.context: In 1953 he was asked to resign from FOR after he was arrested for being homosexual.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1953年，他因同性恋被捕后被要求辞去FOR职务

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人种间的, 人种混合的
vocabulary.context: CORE was an interracial, nonviolent organization founded to combat racism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: CORE 是一个跨种族非暴力组织，旨在打击种族主义

vocabulary.definition: adv. 父死后出生, 遗腹, 著作者死后出版, 身后, 死后
vocabulary.context: In 2013 Rustin was posthumously awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the country's highest civilian honor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2013年，拉斯廷被追授总统自由勋章，这是该国平民的最高荣誉

vocabulary.definition: n. 和解, 和好, 复交, 调解, 调停, 和谐, 一致, 甘愿, 顺从；[经] (银行往来)调节, 调和, 一致
vocabulary.context: In the early 1940s Rustin joined the Fellowship of Reconciliation (FOR), an organization based on peace and nonviolence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20 世纪 40 年代初，拉斯汀加入了和解团契 (FOR)，这是一个以和平与非暴力为基础的组织

vocabulary.definition: n. 晴朗, 光明正大, 美丽；[经] 公正, 适当
vocabulary.context: He believed strongly in social justice (fairness for all) and achieving goals through nonviolence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他坚信社会正义（所有人的公平）并通过非暴力实现目标

vocabulary.definition: n. 手册, 指南；adj. 手的, 手动的, 手工的, 体力的；[计] 人工的, 手动的
vocabulary.context: Rustin and his team wrote the organizing manual.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Rustin 和他的团队编写了组织手册

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 辞职, 放弃, 使顺从；v.i. 辞职, 屈从
vocabulary.context: In 1953 he was asked to resign from FOR after he was arrested for being homosexual.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1953年，他因同性恋被捕后被要求辞去FOR职务

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
vocabulary.context: CORE was an interracial, nonviolent organization founded to combat racism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: CORE 是一个跨种族非暴力组织，旨在打击种族主义

vocabulary.definition: adj. 水耕法的
vocabulary.context: We 8 9 had to grow them in vermi manure, which is sterile, or hydroponics, and take them outdoors 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们 8 9 必须将它们种植在无菌的蚓粪或水培中，然后将它们带到户外 1

Energy(noun)the amount of power needed to do something or make...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...转变成气体并使空气变得不健康的能力 11. 居住在某个地方的人 12. 减少 13. 肿胀、发红、疼痛 14. 帮助我们呼吸的身体部位 15. 导致呼吸困难的肺部疾病 16. 完成工作的能力 17. 能量（名词）做某事或制造...所需的能量

vocabulary.definition: adj. 齐腰深, 齐腰高；adv. 齐腰深, 齐腰高
vocabulary.context: And we need six to eight waist-high plants per person.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每人需要六到八株齐腰高的植物

vocabulary.definition: adv. 更可取地, 更好地, 更合意地
vocabulary.context: The third plant is money plant, and this is again a very common plant; preferably grows in hydroponics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第三种植物是金钱草，这又是一种很常见的植物；优选在水培中生长

vocabulary.definition: n. 红, 红色
vocabulary.context: ...10. has the ability to turn into a gas and make the air less healthy 11. people who live in a place 12. to make less 13. swelling, redness, soreness 14. the parts of the body that help us breathe 15. a disease of the lungs that makes it hard to breathe 16. the ability to get work done 17. Energy(noun)the amount of power needed to do...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...10。有能力变成气体，使空气变得不健康 11. 居住在一个地方的人 12. 减少 13. 肿胀、发红、疼痛 14. 帮助我们呼吸的身体部位 15. 导致呼吸困难的肺部疾病 16. 完成工作的能力 17. 能量（名词）完成工作所需的能量...

vocabulary.definition: adj. 齐肩高的
vocabulary.context: We need four shoulder-high under CC0.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们需要 CC0 下的四个齐肩高

vocabulary.definition: adj. 户内的, 室内的
vocabulary.context: We've also found that you can reduce the fresh air requirements nto the building, while maintaining industry indoor air-quality standards.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们还发现，您可以减少建筑物对新鲜空气的需求，同时保持行业室内空气质量标准

vocabulary.definition: n. 占有者, 居住者, 占用者
vocabulary.context: And it has close to 1,200 such plants for 300 occupants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它拥有近 1,200 个此类植物，可容纳 300 名居住者

vocabulary.definition: n. 容量, 能力, 才能, 资格；[计] 容量
vocabulary.context: My doctors told me that my lung capacity had gone down to 70 percent, and it was killing me.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的医生告诉我，我的肺活量已经下降到 70%，这简直要了我的命

vocabulary.definition: adj. 阴历的, 月的, 微亮的(指光)；[医] 月的, 银的
vocabulary.context: It's simply that the Jewish calendar is based on a lunar year, which is shorter than a solar year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 简单地说，犹太历是基于农历年，农历年比太阳年短

vocabulary.definition: n. 调整, 调节, 校正；[化] 调节
vocabulary.context: In order for the holidays to fall in the correct seasons, an adjustment needs to be made to the lunar calendar every three years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了使假期落在正确的季节，需要每三年对农历进行一次调整

vocabulary.definition: adj. 精确的, 严谨的, 明确的；[机] 精密的, 正确的
vocabulary.context: There are 365 days in 12 months in the solar year - well, 365¼ days, to be more precise.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太阳年的 12 个月有 365 天 - 更准确地说，是 365¼ 天

vocabulary.definition: n. 时期, 局面, 方面, 位相, 相, 阶段；v.t. 使调整相位, 使定相, 使一致, 逐步执行, 实行；[计] 阶段
vocabulary.context: A lunar calendar follows the phases of the moon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阴历遵循月相

vocabulary.definition: n. 日历, 日程表；v.t. 列入表中；[计] 日历
vocabulary.context: This means that every year, the solar and lunar calendars differ by about 11 days.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着每年阳历和阴历相差约11天

vocabulary.definition: adv. 同样地, 也
vocabulary.context: Likewise, we adjust the solar calendar every four years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 同样，我们每四年调整一次阳历

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使混乱, 使狼狈, 使困惑；[法] 混淆
vocabulary.context: Why is it so confusing?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为什么这么混乱？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 太阳的, 日光的, 源自太阳的；[医] 太阳的; 腹腔丛的
vocabulary.context: It's simply that the Jewish calendar is based on a lunar year, which is shorter than a solar year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 简单地说，犹太历是基于农历年，农历年比太阳年短

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 赏识, 鉴别, 为...而感激, 领会, 欣赏；v.i. 增值, 涨价
vocabulary.context: Thanksgiving is a time to appreciate all that you have.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感恩节是感激你所拥有的一切的时刻

vocabulary.definition: n. 倒转, 倒置, 倒装；[化] 反转; 倒反; 反演; 转化
vocabulary.context: (Today this is called an inversion and is common over major cities.) People had no way of knowing that the forests in Canada were burning so fiercely, but Professor Williams and Viator definitely had the right idea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （今天这被称为倒转，在主要城市很常见。）人们无法知道加拿大的森林燃烧得如此猛烈，但威廉姆斯教授和维托尔教授的想法绝对是正确的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 煤烟熏黑的, 乌黑的
vocabulary.context: By midday, the sky was black as night and raining a thick, sooty-smelling rain.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了中午，天空漆黑如夜，下了一场浓浓的、带着煤烟味的雨

vocabulary.definition: n. 日食, 月食, (地位名誉等的)消失；v.t. 引起日食, 引起月食, 使黯然失色
vocabulary.context: Just the day before, there had been an eclipse of the moon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 就在前一天，发生了月食

vocabulary.definition: n. 世界末日
vocabulary.context: Many were sure that doomsday had arrived.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人确信世界末日已经到来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未解释的, 未解决的
vocabulary.context: But the mystery of the Dark Day remained unsolved.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但黑暗日之谜仍未解开

vocabulary.definition: n. 汽, 蒸气；v.i. 蒸发, 吹牛；v.t. 使蒸发, 使汽化
vocabulary.context: He believed that the Dark Day was brought on by "vapours," something that absorbed and weakened the sunlight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他相信黑暗之日是由"蒸气"造成的，这种物质吸收并削弱了阳光

vocabulary.definition: v. 恐慌, 使（受惊）
vocabulary.context: People panicked. Many rushed to churches. A lady in Boston sent her son to their minister to ask what was happening. "Tell your mother I am as much in the dark as she is," he explained.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们惊慌失措。许多人涌向教堂。波士顿的一位女士派她的儿子去见牧师，询问发生了什么事。 "告诉你妈妈，我和她一样处于黑暗之中，"他解释道

vocabulary.definition: n. 关闭；v.t. 关上, 闭起, 幽禁, 合拢, 轧住；v.i. 关上, 停止营业
vocabulary.context: The smoke hung over the East Coast, shutting out the sun for many hours.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 浓烟笼罩着东海岸，遮蔽了阳光好几个小时

vocabulary.definition: n. 评论, 注意；v.t. 评论, 注意；v.i. 评论, 谈论；[计] 注释
vocabulary.context: A judge remarked that when he held "a sheet of white paper...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位法官评论说，当他拿着"一张白纸......

vocabulary.definition: n. 钱, 现金, 犀牛
vocabulary.context: It's home to tigers, rhinos, and 18 percent of all the people on Earth.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这里是老虎、犀牛和地球上 18% 人口的家园

vocabulary.definition: adj. 习惯的, 惯常的；[经] 通常的, 习惯的
vocabulary.context: It's customary for families and communities to light candles and clay lamps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 家庭和社区有点燃蜡烛和粘土灯的习惯

vocabulary.definition: n. 烟火具, 烟火, 烟火信号弹, 焰火, 激情的表现
vocabulary.context: Some families also celebrate with fireworks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些家庭还用烟花庆祝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 每年的, 一年一度的；adv. 一年一次, 每年
vocabulary.context: In English, this means "row of lights." The holiday is the largest yearly celebration in India.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在英语中，这意味着"一排灯"。该节日是印度最大的年度庆祝活动

vocabulary.definition: n. 祝福
vocabulary.context: People who observe Hinduism also ask for blessings from the goddess Lakshmi on this day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 信奉印度教的人们也在这一天向拉克希米女神祈求祝福

vocabulary.definition: n. 户外, 野外活动；adv. 在户外, 在野外
vocabulary.context: They place these in their homes and outdoors to light up the night.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们把这些东西放在家里和户外来照亮夜晚

vocabulary.definition: adv. 传统上；传说上；习惯上
vocabulary.context: Traditionally, adult brothers visit their sisters' homes on this day, often bringing gifts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 按照传统，成年兄弟会在这一天拜访姐妹家，通常会带来礼物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 安宁的, 康乐的
vocabulary.context: The sisters, in turn, may prepare a feast and pray for their brothers' protection and well-being.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 姐妹们可以轮流准备一顿盛宴，并为她们的兄弟祈求保护和幸福

vocabulary.definition: n. 宗教, 信仰；[法] 宗教, 宗教信仰, 信仰
vocabulary.context: Most people who celebrate Diwali are part of the Hindu religion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数庆祝排灯节的人都是印度教的一部分

vocabulary.definition: adj. 列队行进的；n. 列队行进礼仪书, 列队行进音乐
vocabulary.context: Many people, not just African-Americans, have come to participate in this processional African, spiritual holiday.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多人，不仅仅是非裔美国人，都来参加这个非洲的精神节日

vocabulary.definition: n. 献酒, 奠酒, 饮酒
vocabulary.context: The Kikombe cha Umoja, or unity cup, is used for sharing libations, and giving thanks to the ancestors.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Kikombe cha Umoja（或统一杯）用于分享奠酒和感谢祖先

vocabulary.definition: n. 土耳其长袍
vocabulary.context: Many men wear Dashikis and Kufi caps, while the women wear pullover robes and garments called caftans that follow in the tradition of unique West-African clothing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多男性穿着 Dashikis 和 Kufi 帽子，而女性则穿着套头长袍和称为长袍的服装，这些服装遵循独特的西非服装传统

vocabulary.definition: n. 套衫；adj. 套穿的
vocabulary.context: Many men wear Dashikis and Kufi caps, while the women wear pullover robes and garments called caftans that follow in the tradition of unique West-African clothing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多男性穿着 Dashikis 和 Kufi 帽子，而女性则穿着套头长袍和称为长袍的服装，这些服装遵循独特的西非服装传统

vocabulary.definition: n. 起初, 获得学位
vocabulary.context: At its inception, Kwanzaa was meant to lend validity to the Peace and Freedom, and Black Power Movements of the 1960's and early 1970's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宽扎节成立之初的目的是为 1960 年代和 1970 年代初的和平与自由以及黑人权力运动提供有效性

vocabulary.definition: n. 烹调风格, 烹调法, 烹饪, 厨房
vocabulary.context: The festivities involve entertainment such as: traditional West African drumming and dance, song and poetry, West African cuisine, imaginative storytelling, performing arts, and an African marketplace.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 庆祝活动涉及娱乐活动，例如：传统的西非鼓乐和舞蹈、歌曲和诗歌、西非美食、富有想象力的故事讲述、表演艺术和非洲市场

vocabulary.definition: adj. 反射的, 反映的, 沉思的
vocabulary.context: These symbols represent values and concepts that are reflective of the African culture throughout the diaspora.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些符号代表了反映整个侨民非洲文化的价值观和概念

vocabulary.definition: n. 有效性, 正确性；[计] 有效性
vocabulary.context: At its inception, Kwanzaa was meant to lend validity to the Peace and Freedom, and Black Power Movements of the 1960's and early 1970's.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宽扎节成立之初的目的是为 1960 年代和 1970 年代初的和平与自由以及黑人权力运动提供有效性

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 得自；v.i. 起源
vocabulary.context: He derived the name from the Swahili phrase, "matunda ya kwanza," which means "first fruits of the harvest."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的名字来源于斯瓦希里语短语"matunda ya kwanza"，意思是"收获的初熟果实"

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 同意, 一致, 同时发生；[法] 同时发生, 并发, 同意
vocabulary.context: With one of these you concur, and I with the other." And Adams had agreed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你同意其中之一，我同意另一个。"亚当斯同意了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 向下的；adv. 下, 下去, 降下；prep. 往下, 沿着；n. 丘陵, 软毛, 开阔的高地；[计] 向下, 退下命令
vocabulary.context: Two famous friends who had their ups and downs were John Adams and Thomas Jefferson.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 约翰·亚当斯和托马斯·杰斐逊是两位经历过坎坷的著名朋友

vocabulary.definition: n. (美)总统就职, 开幕仪式, 就职典礼, 开始, 开辟, 开创, 为...举行开幕式；[法] 就职, 就职典礼, 创造
vocabulary.context: Then, hurt by his defeat in the election, he went home to Massachusetts, missing Jefferson's inauguration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，由于选举失败，他回到了马萨诸塞州的家中，错过了杰斐逊的就职典礼

vocabulary.definition: n. 废止, 撤消；v.t. 废止, 撤消, 放弃
vocabulary.context: And since he felt that Adams's appointment of judges was a personal attack, Jefferson had the new law repealed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于杰斐逊认为亚当斯任命法官是人身攻击，因此废除了新法律

vocabulary.definition: n. 尊敬, 尊重；v.t. 尊敬, 尊重, 认为
vocabulary.context: Jefferson's letters expressed his "sincere esteem and respect" for Adams.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊的信表达了他对亚当斯的"真诚的敬意和尊重"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 诚实的, 正直的, 真挚的, 纯净的
vocabulary.context: Jefferson's letters expressed his "sincere esteem and respect" for Adams.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊的信表达了他对亚当斯的"真诚的敬意和尊重"

vocabulary.definition: n. 建筑学, 建筑式样；[计] 体系结构
vocabulary.context: From then on, for fourteen years, the two old friends wrote back and forth, discussing natural science, history, architecture, religion, art, and agriculture.

vocabulary.definition: n. 水流, 小河, 流出, 趋势, 人潮；v.t. 流出, 流动, 展开；v.i. 流, 涌, 飘扬；[计] 流
vocabulary.context: An Ant went to the bank of a river to quench its thirst, and being carried away by the rush of the stream, was on the point of drowning.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一只蚂蚁到河边去解渴，被水流冲走，险些溺水

vocabulary.definition: n. 安全, 保险, 平安, 保安设备；v.t. 保护, 防护

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蚂蚁爬上它并安全地漂浮到岸边

vocabulary.definition: n. 大豆；[化] 大豆

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他还发现了利用大豆和红薯的新方法

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 找出, 设于, 位于；v.i. 定居
vocabulary.context: The Tuskegee Institute is a private, historically black university located in Tuskegee, Alabama.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 塔斯基吉学院是一所私立的、历史悠久的黑人大学，位于阿拉巴马州塔斯基吉

vocabulary.definition: n. 基础, 根据, 建立；[化] 地基
vocabulary.context: Today, people from many countries come to the George Washington Carver Foundation at the Tuskegee Institute.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天，来自许多国家的人们来到塔斯基吉研究所的乔治·华盛顿·卡弗基金会

vocabulary.definition: n. 贪欲, 贪婪
vocabulary.context: ...could give, he killed it and opened it only to find - nothing. "Golden Egg" by Mykl Roventine is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 2.0. 1 2 "GREED OFT O'ERREACHES ITSELF."

vocabulary.definition: adj. 贪婪的, 贪得的, 贪吃的
vocabulary.context: As he grew rich, he grew greedy; and thinking to get at once all the gold the Goose could give, he killed it and opened it only to find - nothing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他变得富有时，他变得贪婪；当他变得富有时，他变得贪婪。他想立刻得到鹅所能提供的所有黄金，于是他杀了鹅，打开它，却发现--什么也没有

vocabulary.definition: n. 同胞, 乡下人, 国民
vocabulary.context: One day a countryman going to the nest of his Goose found there an egg all yellow and glittering.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，一个乡下人去他的鹅窝里发现了一颗鹅蛋，全是黄色的，闪闪发光

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 卖, 背叛, 销售, 出卖；v.i. 卖, 销售；n. 卖, 推销术, 失望
vocabulary.context: Every morning the same thing occurred, and he soon became rich by selling his eggs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每天早上都会发生同样的事情，他很快就靠卖鸡蛋致富了

vocabulary.definition: n. 诡计, 欺诈, 谋略, 恶作剧, 习惯, 决窍；v.t. 愚弄, 欺骗, 装饰；v.i. 哄骗, 戏弄；adj. 有决窍的, 特技的, 欺诈的, 漂亮的, 靠不住的
vocabulary.context: When he took it up it was as heavy as lead and he was going to throw it away, because he thought a trick had been played upon him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他拿起它时，它像铅一样重，他打算把它扔掉，因为他认为有人对他开了个玩笑

vocabulary.definition: n. 高兴, 愉快；v.t. 使高兴, 乐于；v.i. 感到高兴(或愉快、快乐)
vocabulary.context: But he took it home on second thoughts, and soon found to his delight that it was an egg of pure gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但他转念一想，把它带回家，很快他高兴地发现，这是一个纯金的鸡蛋

vocabulary.definition: n. 执照, 许可证, 特许；v.t. 许可, 特许
vocabulary.context: "Golden Egg" by Mykl Roventine is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 2.0.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Mykl Roventine 的"Golden Egg"已获得 CC BY-NC-SA 2.0 许可

vocabulary.definition: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动；[计] 播放

vocabulary.definition: n. 大都市, 重要中心, 首府；[医] 产地, 生地
vocabulary.context: Those communities would grow into towns, and then some would expand into cities, from a wagon train to a metropolis.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些社区将发展成为城镇，然后一些社区将扩展到城市，从马车列车发展到大都市

vocabulary.definition: n. 合干者, 合作者, 通敌者；[法] 合作者, 协助者, 勾结者
vocabulary.context: They would create communities, and instead of being partners in a trip they were collaborators in community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们会创建社区，他们不是旅行中的伙伴，而是社区中的合作者

vocabulary.definition: n. 经过, 通行, 运输, 运输线, 转变；v.t. 运送, 使通过, 经过；v.i. 通过
vocabulary.context: A trip that had taken months now took passengers a few days of comfortable transit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 原本需要几个月的旅程现在让乘客们享受了几天的舒适过境

vocabulary.definition: n. 汽车；[机] 汽车
vocabulary.context: It was small, about the size of an automobile, but it would be home for the whole family while they traveled to their new home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它很小，大约有一辆汽车那么大，但它是全家人前往新家时的家

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 坚持, 固执, 持续, 坚称；[经] 持续
vocabulary.context: Then they would keep going, persisting whatever the weather, because they knew they had a long way to travel and could not delay long.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他们就会继续前行，无论天气如何，都坚持下去，因为他们知道路途遥远，不能耽搁太久

vocabulary.definition: n. 障碍, 妨害物, 阻碍
vocabulary.context: Obstacle(noun)something that blocks one's way or prevents progress 4.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 障碍（名词）阻碍某人前进或阻止前进的东西 4.

vocabulary.definition: n. 乘客, 旅客；[经] 乘客, 旅客
vocabulary.context: A trip that had taken months now took passengers a few days of comfortable transit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 原本需要几个月的旅程现在让乘客们享受了几天的舒适过境

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 借, 借入, 借用；v.i. 借；[计] 借位; 借位数
vocabulary.context: Sometimes they would borrow tools from each other, and sometimes they shared food.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有时他们会互相借用工具，有时他们会分享食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 要素, 要点, 本质；adj. 必要的, 重要的, 本质的；[计] 本质冒险
vocabulary.context: They would have to fit all they took in their wagon, so they would bring only the items that were essential.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们必须将所有携带的物品装进马车，因此他们只会携带必需品

vocabulary.definition: n. 拐杖, 支撑, 依靠；v.t. 支撑
vocabulary.context: To be independent, he needed crutches and a wheelchair.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为了独立，他需要拐杖和轮椅

vocabulary.definition: n. 滑雪橇；v.i. 滑雪
vocabulary.context: In 1976, when he was a freshman in college, a skiing accident left Parks paralyzed from the waist down.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1976年，帕克斯还是大学一年级新生，一次滑雪事故导致他腰部以下瘫痪

vocabulary.definition: n. 球拍, 喧闹, 杂乱无章；v.i. 喧闹；v.t. 用球拍打
vocabulary.context: He sees their colorful rackets and sleek chairs on the tennis courts, and he says, "This is what I dreamed about."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他看到网球场上色彩缤纷的球拍和光滑的椅子，他说："这就是我的梦想。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 抑制, 勒马绳, 边石；v.t. 抑制, 束缚, 勒住
vocabulary.context: Parks wanted to be with his friends, but he couldn't go up and down curbs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帕克斯想和他的朋友们在一起，但他无法上下路缘

vocabulary.definition: n. 比赛, 竞赛, 锦标赛, 联赛
vocabulary.context: As his game improved, Parks began to dream of playing in tournaments with other wheel-chair athletes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着比赛水平的提高，帕克斯开始梦想与其他轮椅运动员一起参加锦标赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 网球
vocabulary.context: Brad Parks's opponent gave the tennis ball a toss into the air, and Parks started forward.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 布拉德·帕克斯的对手将网球抛向空中，帕克斯开始前进

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使瘫痪, 使麻痹；[医] 使麻痹, 使瘫痪
vocabulary.context: In 1976, when he was a freshman in college, a skiing accident left Parks paralyzed from the waist down.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1976年，帕克斯还是大学一年级新生，一次滑雪事故导致他腰部以下瘫痪

vocabulary.definition: n. 校园, 大学生活
vocabulary.context: The students on campus raced bicycles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 校园里的学生进行自行车比赛

vocabulary.definition: adj. 活跃的, 起作用的, 积极的, 有效的, 主动的, 活性的, 现行的, 现役的；n. 主动语态, 积极分子
vocabulary.context: Parks had always been active, and he still wanted to do things for himself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 帕克斯一直很活跃，他仍然想为自己做事

vocabulary.definition: adj. 钻石形的, 菱形的
vocabulary.context: He focused on the finish line, the boy and the girl in the yellow diamond-shaped sign.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他把注意力集中在终点线、黄色菱形标志上的男孩和女孩

vocabulary.definition: n. 草皮, 草皮断片
vocabulary.context: A small divot pockmarked the top of the sign, like it'd been hit by a rock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 标牌顶部有一个小凹痕，就像被石头击中一样

vocabulary.definition: v. 砰的摔下, 砰的倒下( flump的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: He'd been so distracted by the sign that he'd forgotten to tighten his backpack straps, so he ran, and his backpack flumped on his shoulders.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他被这个标志弄得心烦意乱，以至于忘记系紧背包带，于是他跑了，背包重重地落在了他的肩膀上

vocabulary.definition: n. 预告, 预感, 征兆；[医] 先兆, 预兆
vocabulary.context: or a premonition.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 或者是一种预感

vocabulary.definition: n. 卷发的人, 卷发夹子
vocabulary.context: The driver, an older woman in a bathrobe and hair curlers, waved them across.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 司机是一位穿着浴袍、戴着卷发器的老妇人，挥手示意他们过去

vocabulary.definition: n. 浴衣
vocabulary.context: The driver, an older woman in a bathrobe and hair curlers, waved them across.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 司机是一位穿着浴袍、戴着卷发器的老妇人，挥手示意他们过去

vocabulary.definition: v. 横着走, 悄悄贴近, 侧身而行；n. 侧走, 挨近
vocabulary.context: Hannah sidled up next to him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 汉娜侧身靠近他

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 蹒跚, 动摇；n. 蹒跚的步子
vocabulary.context: Everything tottered from side to side.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一切都摇摇欲坠

vocabulary.definition: n. 豆茎
vocabulary.context: Why, the beans his mother had thrown out of the window into the garden had sprung up into a big beanstalk which went up and up and up till it reached the sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 哎呀，他母亲从窗外扔到花园里的豆子已经长成了一根大豆茎，豆茎向上、向上、向上，直到到达天空

vocabulary.definition: adj. 样子好笑的；样子古怪的
vocabulary.context: He hadn't gone far when he met a funny-looking old man, who said to him, "Good morning, Jack."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 没走多远，他遇到了一位长相滑稽的老人，老人对他说："早上好，杰克。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 健忘的, 易忘的
vocabulary.context: How forgetful I am, and how careless you are not to know the difference between live and dead after all these years."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是多么健忘啊，你是多么粗心，这么多年了，还不知道生与死的区别。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 可爱的小宝贝, 亲亲
vocabulary.context: "Do you, my dearie?" says the ogre's wife.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "亲爱的，你是吗？"食人魔的妻子说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 食物橱, 家用食品, 食物储藏室
vocabulary.context: So the ogre sat down to the breakfast and ate it, but every now and then he would mutter, "Well, I could have sworn - " and he'd get up and search the larder and the cupboards and everything, only, luckily, he didn't think of the copper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是食人魔坐下来吃早餐，吃掉它，但他时不时地会嘟囔道："好吧，我可以发誓--"然后他会起身搜查食品储藏室、橱柜和所有东西，只是幸运的是，他没有想到铜

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不足取的, 琐碎的, 可鄙的
vocabulary.context: "Have you been such a fool, such a dolt, such an idiot, as to give away my Milky-White, the best milker in the parish, and prime beef to boot, for a set of paltry beans?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你是不是太傻了，太傻了，太白痴了，竟然为了一套微不足道的豆子而放弃了我的乳白色奶牛，教区最好的挤奶工，还有优质牛肉？

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 烤, 争吵, 激动；v.t. 烤；n. 烤, 灼热, 争吵
vocabulary.context: At his belt he had three calves strung up by the heels, and he unhooked them and threw them down on the table and said, "Here, wife, broil me a couple of these for breakfast.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的腰带上挂着三只小牛，他解开它们，把它们扔在桌子上，说："妻子，给我烤几只当早餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 恶棍, 流氓, 小淘气；v.t. 欺骗；v.i. 游手好闲
vocabulary.context: "Then, if it's that little rogue that stole your gold and the hen that laid the golden eggs he's sure to have got into the oven." And they both rushed to the oven.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "那么，如果是那个小流氓偷了你的金子，又是下金蛋的母鸡，他肯定进了烤箱。"他们俩都冲向烤箱

vocabulary.definition: n. 艇长, 舵手
vocabulary.context: A coxswain sits at the back controlling the boat, keeping it on track.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船长坐在后面控制着船，使其保持在正轨上

vocabulary.definition: n. 中（汉语拼音）
vocabulary.context: To this day, people remember Chu Yuan during the Dragon Boat Festival by eating zhong , a pyramid-shaped sticky rice dumpling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到今天，人们在端午节期间通过吃"粽"来纪念楚原

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新制定, 再扮演；[法] 重新制定, 再用法律规定, 使再度生效
vocabulary.context: The search for Chu Yuan is reenacted by beating drums and racing dragon boats.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以击鼓、赛龙舟的方式再现寻找楚原的情景

vocabulary.definition: n. (非正式)女式衬衣, (美)不正常振动；v.i. (美)摇晃, 振动, 颤动
vocabulary.context: Electrifying chills would shimmy up and down my spine as the rowers propelled their boats across the finish line.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当赛艇运动员推动他们的船冲过终点线时，我的脊椎骨会感到一阵阵寒意

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 通电, 上电, 使带电, 使电气化；[医] 起电, 带电
vocabulary.context: Electrifying chills would shimmy up and down my spine as the rowers propelled their boats across the finish line.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当赛艇运动员推动他们的船冲过终点线时，我的脊椎骨会感到一阵阵寒意

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有鳞的, 鳞状的, 覆有鳞片的, 积垢的, 积水垢的, 介壳虫蛀的；[医] 鳞状的, 有鳞屑的
vocabulary.context: The long, sleek wooden boats - 40 to 100 feet long - have bows shaped like dragon heads; scaly bodies painted red, green, yellow, blue, and gold; and dragon tails at the stern.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长而光滑的木船 - 40 至 100 英尺长 - 船头形状像龙头；有鳞的身体被涂成红色、绿色、黄色、蓝色和金色；和船尾的龙尾巴

vocabulary.definition: n. 学生, 门生, 未成年人, 瞳孔；[医] 瞳孔
vocabulary.context: They chant prayers, light incense and firecrackers, clang gongs, beat drums, and paint the "dragon" pupils red or black.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们念经、烧香、放鞭炮、敲锣打鼓、把"龙"瞳涂成红色或黑色

vocabulary.definition: adj. 附近的, 邻近的, 邻接的
vocabulary.context: One day, Chu Yuan warned the emperor not to meet with the emperor of a neighboring kingdom.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 维苏修斯疑惑地打量着她

vocabulary.definition: n. 厚颜无耻, 无耻行为
vocabulary.context: They both knew stories about the terrible things gods did to humans when they were vexed: the weaver Arachne turned into a spider by Minerva for her arrogance, or the hunter Acteon transformed into a deer by Diana for his impudence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们都知道诸神在烦恼时对人类做出的可怕事情的故事：织布工阿拉克尼因傲慢而被密涅瓦变成蜘蛛，猎人阿克顿因无礼而被戴安娜变成鹿

vocabulary.definition: adv. 罪地, 有罪地

vocabulary.definition: n. 服务员领班
vocabulary.context: People had said the town, which was growing as a vacation area, offered plenty of work and was "a welcoming place for Negroes." Jim's father became the headwaiter at the city's most elegant hotel and a respected member of the community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们说，这个正在发展成为度假区的小镇提供了大量工作，并且是"一个欢迎黑人的地方"。吉姆的父亲成为该市最优雅的酒店的领班，也是社区中受人尊敬的一员

vocabulary.definition: n. 生活, 生计, 生存；adj. 活的, 逼真的, 现存的
vocabulary.context: Although the races were mostly separated in Jacksonville, Jim didn't experience the poverty and misfortune suffered by many Black children throughout the South, whose families scratched out meager livings as sharecroppers on white-owned tenant farms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管杰克逊维尔的种族大多是分开的，但吉姆并没有经历南方许多黑人儿童所遭受的贫困和不幸，他们的家庭在白人拥有的佃农农场里当佃农，勉强维持微薄的生活

vocabulary.definition: n. 检查人, 审查人, 主考者；[化] 检验人; 验收员
vocabulary.context: When he passed, one of his examiners stormed out of the courtroom, saying he would not stay to see a Black person take the oath to practice law.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他通过时，他的一名主考官冲出法庭，表示他不会留下来看着黑人宣誓从事法律工作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 保存性的, 有保存力的；n. 温室, 音乐学校
vocabulary.context: Rosamond had returned to Jacksonville after studying music at the New England Conservatory in Boston.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗莎蒙德在波士顿新英格兰音乐学院学习音乐后返回杰克逊维尔

vocabulary.definition: n. 小说家
vocabulary.context: As an educator, lawyer, editor, novelist, poet, and political reformer, Jim demonstrated his faith in the possibility of a good life for all people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为一名教育家、律师、编辑、小说家、诗人和政治改革家，吉姆表现出了他对所有人都有可能过上美好生活的信念

vocabulary.definition: n. 语法学, 入门书；[计] 语法检查
vocabulary.context: When Jim tried to observe classrooms and teaching methods at the all-white grammar school, parents complained to the board of education.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当吉姆试图观察全白人文法学校的课堂和教学方法时，家长向教育委员会投诉

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在难民营生活了五年后，英诺森一家在慈善组织的帮助下搬到了美国

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 难民营中的难民家庭根据种族被分开--图西族在一个区，胡图族在另一区，图西族和胡图族的家庭在自己的区

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过它为他创造的机会，它正在帮助他实现他的梦想

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于英诺森的家人留下了许多财产，他们需要食物和衣服

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他称其为"自动中继器"，这是一种可以将电报发送到车站并保存直到有人进来阅读的设备

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几年后，当他在电报站工作时，他试图发明电池，但他把硫酸洒在了地板上

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 留声机是世界上第一台可以录制和重放声音的机器，爱迪生因此而闻名

vocabulary.definition: n. 粗心大意
