vocabulary.definition: n. 龙虾
vocabulary.context: They paddle over and offer to sell us a langosta , a spiny lobster, but they have not caught enough for each of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们划过来并提出卖给我们一只兰戈斯塔，一种大龙虾，但他们抓到的龙虾不够我们每个人吃

vocabulary.definition: n. 纪念品
vocabulary.context: "Un momento, por favor" (one moment, please), the man says.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "Un momento, por vent"（请稍等一下），该男子说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 巴波亚(巴拿马货币单位)
vocabulary.context: Today, Kuna people use Panama's balboa and United States dollars for money, too.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，库纳人也使用巴拿马的巴尔博亚和美元作为货币

vocabulary.definition: n. 自主学习; 在家教育
vocabulary.context: Part of our homeschool day is spent learning about the countries and people we visit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们在家上学的一部分时间是用来了解我们访问的国家和人民

vocabulary.definition: n. 午睡, 午休
vocabulary.context: On this island some of the Kuna are relaxing in hammocks for siesta , or rest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个岛上，一些库纳人正在吊床上休息午睡或休息

vocabulary.definition: adj. 多刺的, 尽是尖刺的, 尖刺状的, 麻烦的, 棘手的
vocabulary.context: They paddle over and offer to sell us a langosta , a spiny lobster, but they have not caught enough for each of us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们划过来并提出卖给我们一只兰戈斯塔，一种大龙虾，但他们抓到的龙虾不够我们每个人吃

vocabulary.definition: n. 日记, 杂志, 日报；[化] 轴颈
vocabulary.context: Once back on board, they write in their journals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 回到船上后，他们在日记中写道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 塞子未开的, 未利用的
vocabulary.context: So had it not been for the busy red squirrel and the keen observations of Native Americans, this syrupy sensation might still be untapped.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因此，如果没有忙碌的红松鼠和美洲原住民的敏锐观察，这种糖浆般的感觉可能还没有被开发出来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有沟的；有缝的；槽形的
vocabulary.context: And instead of letting the sap ooze across the bark, they channeled it into hollowed-out logs or birch-bark trays.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们没有让树液渗过树皮，而是将其导入中空的原木或桦树皮托盘中

vocabulary.definition: n. 动物学家；[医] 动物学家
vocabulary.context: Bernd Heinrich, a retired zoologist from the University of Vermont, red squirrels are one of the few creatures besides humans to deliberately make maple syrup.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 佛蒙特大学退休动物学家贝恩德·海因里希(Bernd Heinrich)表示，红松鼠是除人类之外少数故意制造枫糖浆的生物之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 麋, 驼鹿
vocabulary.context: Then they used the syrup to sweeten everything from corn mush to moose stew to water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他们用糖浆来使从玉米糊到驼鹿炖菜到水的所有东西变甜

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 蒸发, 失去水分, 消失；v.t. 使蒸发, 使脱水, 使消失
vocabulary.context: Then they waited for the water in the sap to evaporate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他们等待汁液中的水蒸发

vocabulary.definition: adj. 霜冻的, 严寒的, 冷淡的
vocabulary.context: "When cold, frosty nights follow the first warm, sunny days, maples suck up water from the soil like a sponge," explains Timothy Wilmot, a maple tree researcher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "当第一个温暖、阳光明媚的日子过后，寒冷、霜冻的夜晚到来时，枫树会像海绵一样从土壤中吸收水分，"枫树研究员蒂莫西·威尔莫特 (Timothy Wilmot) 解释道

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 设计, 发明, 图谋, 遗赠给；n. 遗赠
vocabulary.context: This is not practical if you want to make a lot of syrup, so the Native Americans devised a faster way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你想制作大量糖浆，这是不切实际的，因此美洲原住民设计了一种更快的方法

vocabulary.definition: adv. 故意地
vocabulary.context: Bernd Heinrich, a retired zoologist from the University of Vermont, red squirrels are one of the few creatures besides humans to deliberately make maple syrup.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 佛蒙特大学退休动物学家贝恩德·海因里希(Bernd Heinrich)表示，红松鼠是除人类之外少数故意制造枫糖浆的生物之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 压, 榨, 按, 强制, 压力, 压迫, 压强；v.t. 迫使, 使增压, 密封
vocabulary.context: "On the next warm day," Wilmot says, "the sap will be under pressure, just like someone is squeezing a sponge inside the tree." Most of this sap is used to feed the new spring leaves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "在下一个温暖的日子里，"威尔莫特说，"树液将受到压力，就像有人在树内挤压海绵一样。"这些汁液大部分用于喂养新的春叶

vocabulary.definition: n. 豆科灌木（产于美国西南部和墨西哥）
vocabulary.context: I looked near the ground in mesquite shrubs, palo verde trees, and cholla cactus, hoping to find messy leftover roadrunner nests made of twigs the year before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我观察了地面附近的豆科灌木、帕洛维德树和全罗仙人掌，希望能找到前一年用树枝搭建的凌乱的走鹃巢穴

vocabulary.definition: n. 仙人掌
vocabulary.context: I looked near the ground in mesquite shrubs, palo verde trees, and cholla cactus, hoping to find messy leftover roadrunner nests made of twigs the year before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我观察了地面附近的豆科灌木、帕洛维德树和全罗仙人掌，希望能找到前一年用树枝搭建的凌乱的走鹃巢穴

vocabulary.definition: n. 倒钩；v.t. 装倒钩于
vocabulary.context: The tail feathers were streaked with iridescent barbs that flashed green and purple in the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尾羽上布满了彩虹色的倒刺，在阳光下闪烁着绿色和紫色的光芒

vocabulary.definition: n. [鸟](中美、北美产)走鹃
vocabulary.context: I looked near the ground in mesquite shrubs, palo verde trees, and cholla cactus, hoping to find messy leftover roadrunner nests made of twigs the year before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我观察了地面附近的豆科灌木、帕洛维德树和全罗仙人掌，希望能找到前一年用树枝搭建的凌乱的走鹃巢穴

vocabulary.definition: n. 针垫
vocabulary.context: They resembled pincushions, not baby birds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们像针垫，而不是雏鸟

vocabulary.definition: adj. 彩虹色的, 闪光的；[医] 虹色的, 晕色的
vocabulary.context: The tail feathers were streaked with iridescent barbs that flashed green and purple in the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尾羽上布满了彩虹色的倒刺，在阳光下闪烁着绿色和紫色的光芒

vocabulary.definition: adv. 活泼地, 精神勃勃地
vocabulary.context: The birds moved briskly on long skinny legs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸟儿们用细长的腿轻快地移动

vocabulary.definition: adv. 重复地, 再三地
vocabulary.context: The snake struck repeatedly, missing its moving targets every time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蛇反复攻击，但每次都未能击中移动目标

vocabulary.definition: adj. 暂时的, 非永久的
vocabulary.context: They know how impermanent things are, including their homes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们知道事物是多么无常，包括他们的家

vocabulary.definition: n. 游牧部落一员, 流浪者；adj. 游牧的, 流浪的
vocabulary.context: Years ago, the people of Tibet were nomads - people without permanent homes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多年前，西藏人民是游牧民族，没有永久的家园

vocabulary.definition: adj. 游牧的, 游牧生活的, 流浪的；[医] 游动的, 无定的, 游离的
vocabulary.context: We were following Dudjom back to his birthplace and getting a taste of that ancient, nomadic way of life - with a few modern updates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们跟随敦珠回到了他的出生地，体验了那种古老的游牧生活方式--加上一些现代的更新

vocabulary.definition: n. 营地
vocabulary.context: At one campsite, I remember wrestling with one of my tent poles trying to pass it through the loops of my tent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一个露营地，我记得我曾与一根帐篷杆摔跤，试图将其穿过帐篷的环

vocabulary.definition: n. 诞生地
vocabulary.context: We were following Dudjom back to his birthplace and getting a taste of that ancient, nomadic way of life - with a few modern updates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们跟随敦珠回到了他的出生地，体验了那种古老的游牧生活方式--加上一些现代的更新

vocabulary.definition: adv. 天天；[经] 日常, 暂时的
vocabulary.context: Though their lives are full of challenges, the nomads never take their day-to-day problems too seriously.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管游牧民族的生活充满挑战，但他们从不认真对待日常问题

vocabulary.definition: adj. 诚恳的, 健壮的, 热烈的, 丰盛的
vocabulary.context: On this trip, I learned that it takes much more than snug tents and thick, hearty tea to survive.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这次旅行中，我了解到要生存，需要的不仅仅是舒适的帐篷和浓浓的茶

vocabulary.definition: n. 奢侈, 豪华；adj. 奢侈的, 豪华的
vocabulary.context: We had the advantage of automobiles - a luxury that nomads have happily survived without.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们拥有汽车的优势--游牧民族没有汽车就可以幸福地生存

vocabulary.definition: n. 复活, 复兴, 恢复, 掘墓盗尸；[法] 复活, 恢复, 修复
vocabulary.context: People began to decorate the eggs with Christian designs suggesting hope, Christ's resurrection, and eternal life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们开始用基督教图案来装饰鸡蛋，暗示希望、基督的复活和永生

vocabulary.definition: adv. 巧妙地；精巧地
vocabulary.context: Then she skillfully drew wax lines on a raw white egg.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，她熟练地在生白鸡蛋上画了蜡线

vocabulary.definition: n. 泥铲, 泥刀；v.t. 用泥铲涂
vocabulary.context: He kneeled on the muddy earth and dug a small hole with a trowel.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他跪在泥地上，用抹子挖了一个小洞

vocabulary.definition: n. 肥沃, 丰饶, 生产力；[医] 生育力
vocabulary.context: On the egg she held in her hand, Mama drew a chicken, meaning fertility for the married couple down the road.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈在她手里的鸡蛋上画了一只鸡，寓意新婚夫妇将来多子多孙

vocabulary.definition: n. 教区, 堂区；[法] 救贫区, 教区
vocabulary.context: They add pysanky to the basket of traditional Easter foods that the parish priest blesses on the day before Easter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们将 pysanky 添加到教区牧师在复活节前一天祝福的传统复活节食品篮子中

vocabulary.definition: adv. 庄严地；严肃地
vocabulary.context: She sat down solemnly and smoothed her apron.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她郑重地坐下来，抚平围裙

vocabulary.definition: n. 沉重的步伐, 长途跋涉；v.i. 步履艰难地走, 蹒跚地走；v.t. 跋涉
vocabulary.context: Viktor trudged along after Papa. He pulled his gray cap down over his eyes and braced himself against the cold March wind. He clutched the basket Mama had given him as if it carried a delicate treasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 维克多艰难地跟在爸爸后面。他把灰色帽子拉下来遮住眼睛，抵御三月的冷风。他紧紧抓着妈妈送给他的篮子，仿佛里面装着一件精致的宝藏

vocabulary.definition: n. 繁荣, 茂盛, 成功；[经] 繁荣
vocabulary.context: Mama kept a bowl of pysanky in the home to bring good luck, prosperity, and health to the family.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妈妈在家里放了一碗pysanky，为家人带来好运、繁荣和健康

vocabulary.definition: n. 自然, 大自然, 本性, 性格, 性质；[医] 自然, 大自然; 本性, 性能
vocabulary.context: She had made them herself from wild berries, onion skins, leaves, and other items collected from nature.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她自己用野生浆果、洋葱皮、树叶和其他从大自然中收集的物品制作了它们

vocabulary.definition: n. 剪切者, 剪羊毛者, 剪刀工人, 剪切机, 剪床；[化] 剪切机
vocabulary.context: "It's gold!" the shearer declared, and indeed it was.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是金子！"剪羊毛的人宣称，确实如此

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 驱逐, 唤醒, 鼓舞；v.i. 勤奋工作
vocabulary.context: The next morning her sisters rousted Maureen from bed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二天早上，她的姐妹们把莫琳从床上叫了起来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无礼的, 粗野的
vocabulary.context: They were ill-mannered ewes, and no one in the village would claim them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们是没有礼貌的母羊，村里没有人会认领它们

vocabulary.definition: v. 唱轻快的调子, 轻快地动；n. 轻快活泼的调子, 轻快的动作
vocabulary.context: One spring day, as lilting tunes drew the newly shorn sheep near, Maureen felt a tug on her skirt.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个春日，当轻快的曲调将新剪毛的羊拉近时，莫琳感到裙子被拉了一下

vocabulary.definition: adv. 满足地；安心地
vocabulary.context: Hurrying to the meadow, she found the sheep grazing contentedly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她快步跑到草地上，发现羊群正在满足地吃草

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 弄宽, 加宽, 扩大；v.i. 变宽, 扩大
vocabulary.context: "Done," said the king, and his smile widened to such an extent that Meg and Peg wondered if they'd struck such a clever bargain after all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "完成了，"国王说，他的笑容扩大到了梅格和佩格想知道他们是否最终达成了如此聪明的协议

vocabulary.definition: n. 珠宝, 珠宝类
vocabulary.context: "Think of the dresses and jewelry we could have bought!" Peg said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "想想我们本来可以买的衣服和珠宝！"佩格说道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 奇特的, 罕见的, 特殊的, 特别的；n. 特有财产, 特权
vocabulary.context: "The king bids me to invite you below," he said, giving them a peculiar smile.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "国王吩咐我在下面邀请你们，"他说，给了他们一个奇特的微笑

vocabulary.definition: v. 虐待( ill-treat的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: He could have been ill-treated by somebody and run away, or he could have been dumped from a car."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他可能受到某人虐待并逃跑，或者他可能被从车上扔下来。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 摊贩
vocabulary.context: As he spoke, the stallholder threw him a bun which the dog devoured eagerly, but when the man came round and stretched out a hand the little animal trotted away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他说话的时候，摊主扔给他一个小面包，狗急切地吃掉，但当那个人转过身来伸出手时，小动物小跑走了

vocabulary.definition: n. 小狗儿；adj. 时髦的, 装阔气的
vocabulary.context: We went inside and there, in the sitting-room, curled up in a big new doggy bed was my little friend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们走进去，在客厅里，我的小朋友蜷缩在一张新的大狗床上

vocabulary.definition: n. 烤饼
vocabulary.context: He stopped, however, at another stall which sold eggs, butter, cheese, and scones.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，他在另一个卖鸡蛋、黄油、奶酪和烤饼的摊位前停了下来

vocabulary.definition: v. 询问
vocabulary.context: "Has anybody enquired about him?"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "有人打听过他的情况吗？"

vocabulary.definition: n. 麻醉剂, 麻药；adj. 麻木的, 麻醉的
vocabulary.context: Helen was used to helping me and she gave me the anaesthetic, then I set the broken leg in plaster and stitched up the wounds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海伦习惯了帮助我，她给我注射了麻醉剂，然后我把断腿打上石膏，缝合了伤口

vocabulary.definition: n. [贸易] 集市日
vocabulary.context: The fringed tail waved in response to my words, but as I moved nearer he turned and trotted away among the market-day crowd until he was lost to sight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 流苏尾巴响应我的话而挥动，但当我走近时，它转身在集市日的人群中小跑，直到消失在视线中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 漂亮的
vocabulary.context: "Yes, he's a bonny little thing isn't he?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "是的，他是个漂亮的小东西，不是吗？

vocabulary.definition: n. 狗舍, 狗屋, 阴沟；v.t. 置于狗舍, 宿于狗舍；v.i. 进狗窝
vocabulary.context: The little dog's kennel was empty.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 小狗的狗窝空了

vocabulary.definition: n. 起居室
vocabulary.context: We went inside and there, in the sitting-room, curled up in a big new doggy bed was my little friend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们走进去，在客厅里，我的小朋友蜷缩在一张新的大狗床上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 双排钮扣的, 双排钮的
vocabulary.context: The boy's knickers and double-breasted jacket acted as a weight around his body, and he began to sink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男孩的内裤和双排扣夹克在他的身体周围起到了重物的作用，他开始下沉

vocabulary.definition: n. 短裤, 灯笼裤
vocabulary.context: The boy's knickers and double-breasted jacket acted as a weight around his body, and he began to sink.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 男孩的内裤和双排扣夹克在他的身体周围起到了重物的作用，他开始下沉

vocabulary.definition: n. 拖船；[化] 拖轮
vocabulary.context: On June 15, 1904, the East River was loud with the sounds of tugboats, steamships, barges, and ferries plying the New York Harbor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1904年6月15日，东河上波涛汹涌，拖船、轮船、驳船和渡轮在纽约港来回穿梭

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 妨害, 阻塞, 拖累；[经] 使负(债等), 负有义务
vocabulary.context: Encumbered by heavy clothing, they fought frantically to stay afloat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被厚重的衣服拖累，疯狂地挣扎以保持漂浮

vocabulary.definition: n. 女式睡衣, 孩子穿的睡衣, 妇女穿的睡衣
vocabulary.context: She was in her nightdress, barefoot and feverish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她穿着睡衣，赤着脚，发烧了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 海上的, 航海的, 船员的
vocabulary.context: The Standard Nautical Warning!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 标准航海警告！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 飘浮着的, 在海上的, 浸满水的, 在进行中的；adv. 飘浮着, 在海上, 浸满水, 在进行中
vocabulary.context: Encumbered by heavy clothing, they fought frantically to stay afloat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被厚重的衣服拖累，疯狂地挣扎以保持漂浮

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发热的, 极度兴奋的, 不安的
vocabulary.context: She was in her nightdress, barefoot and feverish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她穿着睡衣，赤着脚，发烧了

vocabulary.definition: n. 一般, 将军, 大体；adj. 全面的, 大体的, 总的, 一般的, 普遍的；n. 常规；[计] 常规
vocabulary.context: "It's the General Slocum!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是斯洛克姆将军！

vocabulary.definition: n. 青玉米粒煮利马豆
vocabulary.context: My husband prefers fry bread topped with ground meat, lettuce, grated cheese, and chopped tomatoes - called an "Indian taco." Other foods served at pow wows might be buffalo burgers, succotash, acorn soup, or alligator bites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我丈夫更喜欢炸面包，上面撒上碎肉、生菜、磨碎的奶酪和切碎的西红柿--称为"印度炸玉米饼"。战俘仪式上提供的其他食物可能包括水牛汉堡、豆类蔬菜、橡子汤或鳄鱼咬肉

vocabulary.definition: n. 家常便饭
vocabulary.context: When I was growing up on the Grand Ronde Indian Reservation in Oregon in the 1950s, there were no pow wows - only a potluck at the tribal community center.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20 世纪 50 年代，当我在俄勒冈州的 Grand Ronde 印第安人保留地长大时，那里没有战俘活动，只有部落社区中心的聚餐

vocabulary.definition: n. 做油煎食物的人, 可供油炸的食品, 油炸锅
vocabulary.context: Fry bread, a dough flattened and cooked in a deep fryer, for one.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 煎面包，将面团压平并在油炸锅中煮熟，这是其中之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 部族间的
vocabulary.context: Most pow wows have intertribal dancing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数战俘哇都有部落间的舞蹈

vocabulary.definition: adj. 长袖的
vocabulary.context: Old men, dressed in black pants and white long-sleeved shirts, sat around the cafeteria tables.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 身穿黑色裤子和白色长袖衬衫的老人围坐在食堂的桌子周围

vocabulary.definition: n. 披肩, 围巾；v.t. 用披肩裹
vocabulary.context: They danced, holding their lacy sweaters like shawls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们跳舞时，像拿着披肩一样拿着花边毛衣

vocabulary.definition: n. 调和, 和谐, 一致, 齐唱, 齐奏；adj. 共同做的, 同声的
vocabulary.context: Their large hands pounded the tabletops in unison as their voices sang in Chinook.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的大手齐声敲打桌面，用奇努克语唱着歌

vocabulary.definition: n. 册, 卷, 体积, 容量, 大量, 许多, 份量, 音量；v.i. 成团卷起；v.t. 把...收集成卷；adj. 大量的；[计] 卷
vocabulary.context: Voices sing at full volume, and everyone moves to the beat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 歌声开到最大，每个人都随着节拍移动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 地形的, 地形学的, 地形测量的
vocabulary.context: Although training varies from forest to forest, all fire watchers must be skilled at reading topographical maps, monitoring weather patterns, and reading compass headings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然不同森林的培训有所不同，但所有火灾观察员都必须熟练阅读地形图、监测天气模式和阅读指南针方向

vocabulary.definition: n. 偏僻地区；边远地区；穷乡僻壤；adj. 偏僻地区的
vocabulary.context: Fire watchers also act as backcountry dispatchers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火灾观察员还充当野外调度员

vocabulary.definition: n. 标题, 起始字, 方向；[计] 上标题
vocabulary.context: Although training varies from forest to forest, all fire watchers must be skilled at reading topographical maps, monitoring weather patterns, and reading compass headings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 虽然不同森林的培训有所不同，但所有火灾观察员都必须熟练阅读地形图、监测天气模式和阅读指南针方向

vocabulary.definition: n. 私家侦探, 着弹点观察员；[法] 私家侦探, 秘密监视人
vocabulary.context: Today, fire watchers have the added help of spotter planes, helicopters, and satellite imaging.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，火灾观察员得到了侦察机、直升机和卫星成像的额外帮助

vocabulary.definition: adv. 完美地, 理想地
vocabulary.context: "Ideally, you have someone who knows the terrain and the weather conditions," says Chapman.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "理想情况下，你有一个了解地形和天气状况的人，"查普曼说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 新的, 陌生的, 最近的, 不熟悉的；[法] 新发现的, 新的, 重新开始的
vocabulary.context: With this newer technology, why do we still need fire watchers?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有了这项新技术，为什么我们仍然需要火灾观察员？

vocabulary.definition: n. 注意, 前途, 了望台, 景色；[法] 看守, 守望
vocabulary.context: There are fire towers, called lookouts, in all of the national forests of the United States.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 美国所有的国家森林里都有消防塔，称为瞭望台

vocabulary.definition: n. 总部, 司令部, 总部人员；[经] 本部, 总部, 总署
vocabulary.context: We had to scan once every hour." Other duties included reporting in to headquarters twice each day, chopping firewood, painting the tower, and building hitching posts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们必须每小时扫描一次。"其他职责包括每天两次向总部报到、砍柴、粉刷塔楼和建造栓柱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 从前的, 前者的；n. 起形成作用的人(或物), 模型, 样板
vocabulary.context: Peter Naumann, a former fire watcher, tells about a typical day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 前火灾观察员彼得·瑙曼 (Peter Naumann) 讲述了典型的一天

vocabulary.definition: n. 一抱之量
vocabulary.context: Dodging raindrops, Kate ran with an armload of clothes into the farmhouse nestled on the hill above Honey Creek.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯特为了躲避雨滴，抱着一抱衣服跑进了蜂蜜溪上方山上的农舍

vocabulary.definition: n. 推者, 推销员；[化] 推料机
vocabulary.context: Suddenly, Kate heard the clanging bells of a pusher engine, a loud crash, and the hissing of steam.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 突然，凯特听到了推进式发动机的叮当作响的铃声、巨大的撞击声和蒸汽的嘶嘶声

vocabulary.definition: adj. 褪色的, 模糊的, (非正式)筋疲力尽的, 面容苍白的, 没精打采的, 被水冲蚀的
vocabulary.context: Grabbing her lantern, Kate slipped down the muddy hillside, amidst the lightning and crashing thunder, to the washed-out bridge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯特抓起灯笼，在闪电和雷声中滑下泥泞的山坡，来到被冲毁的桥上

vocabulary.definition: prep. 在...当中
vocabulary.context: Grabbing her lantern, Kate slipped down the muddy hillside, amidst the lightning and crashing thunder, to the washed-out bridge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 凯特抓起灯笼，在闪电和雷声中滑下泥泞的山坡，来到被冲毁的桥上

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使浸水, 使陷入, 淹没；v.i. 潜入水中
vocabulary.context: Peering through the rain, she saw a partially submerged engine and two men clinging to tree branches in the angry water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 透过雨幕，她看到一台部分淹没的发动机和两名男子在愤怒的水中抓着树枝

vocabulary.definition: n. 严酷考验, 痛苦经历, 煎熬；[法] 神裁判法, 严酷的考验, 痛苦的经验
vocabulary.context: The ordeal had made her ill, probably from exhaustion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这次磨难让她生病了，可能是因为精疲力尽

vocabulary.definition: n. 亚麻布, 亚麻线, 亚麻制品；adj. 亚麻布制的, 亚麻的
vocabulary.context: The wind was whipping from all directions, trying to snatch the flapping linens from Kate's hands.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 风从四面八方吹来，试图从凯特手中夺走飘动的亚麻布

vocabulary.definition: n. 生存, 残存, 幸存者；adj. 赖以生存的
vocabulary.context: Fifteen-year-old Kate Shelley knew her family's survival depended on her.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 15 岁的凯特·雪莱知道她家人的生存取决于她

vocabulary.definition: n. 火绳枪
vocabulary.context: The Spaniards had cannons and arquebus (simple guns).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西班牙人有大炮和火绳枪（简单的枪）

vocabulary.definition: n. 天花；[医] 天花, 痘疮
vocabulary.context: The Europeans also brought with them diseases such as measles and smallpox.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 欧洲人还带来了麻疹、天花等疾病

vocabulary.definition: adj. 表示尊敬的, 有礼貌的, 谦恭的
vocabulary.context: This made Montezuma afraid and respectful of Cortés.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这使得蒙特祖玛对科尔特斯既害怕又尊敬

vocabulary.definition: adj. 迷信的；[法] 迷信的, 由迷信引起的
vocabulary.context: Montezuma was also superstitious.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蒙特祖玛也很迷信

vocabulary.definition: n. 迷信；[法] 迷信
vocabulary.context: The combination of good weapons, internal conflict, disease, and superstition helped Cortés conquer the Aztec empire.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 优良武器、内部冲突、疾病和迷信的结合帮助科尔特斯征服了阿兹特克帝国

vocabulary.definition: n. 嫌恶；v.t. 讨厌, 不喜欢
vocabulary.context: Many Aztecs disliked Montezuma because of the taxes he forced them to pay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多阿兹特克人不喜欢蒙特祖玛，因为他强迫他们缴纳税款

vocabulary.definition: n. 俱乐部, 木棍, 球棒；v.t. 用棍棒打, 缴纳；v.i. 联合起来；adj. 俱乐部的
vocabulary.context: The Aztecs' main weapons were only wooden clubs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿兹特克人的主要武器只是木棍

vocabulary.definition: n. 皈依者, 改变宗教信仰者；v.t. 使改变信仰, 转换, 兑换, 倒置；v.i. 皈依；[计] 转换
vocabulary.context: They also wanted to convert Native Americans to Christianity.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们还想让美洲原住民皈依基督教

vocabulary.definition: n. 东方人, 东正教徒；adj. 东方的, 向东的, 自东的
vocabulary.context: This god was thought to have vanished into the eastern ocean long before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们认为这位神很久以前就消失在东方海洋中了

vocabulary.definition: n. 反射镜, 反射物；[医] 反光镜, 反射器
vocabulary.context: Some hung with their noses up, golden reflectors flashing, like battleships ready for takeoff.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有的昂首挺胸，金色反光镜闪烁，就像准备起飞的战舰

vocabulary.definition: n. 少女, 姑娘, 小姐
vocabulary.context: "A little sharla for the missy?" the kite seller snickered at me, his craggy fingers busy bending bamboo splints.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "给小姐一点沙拉？"卖风筝的人对我窃笑，他粗糙的手指忙着弯曲竹夹板

vocabulary.definition: n. 薄木片, 细木梗, 夹板, 薄金属片；v.t. 用夹板固定
vocabulary.context: "A little sharla for the missy?" the kite seller snickered at me, his craggy fingers busy bending bamboo splints.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "给小姐一点沙拉？"卖风筝的人对我窃笑，他粗糙的手指忙着弯曲竹夹板

vocabulary.definition: n. 小巷, 窄街, 走廊
vocabulary.context: We followed him into a narrow alleyway.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们跟着他走进了一条狭窄的小巷

vocabulary.definition: n. 好吵闹的人；adj. 吵闹的
vocabulary.context: They all got cut away in no time, plummeting to the street to be chased down by rowdy children.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们很快就被切断了，坠落到街上，被吵闹的孩子们追赶

vocabulary.definition: n. 卢比(印、巴等国货币单位)
vocabulary.context: My surprised parents had laughed at first, but then handed me a wad of rupees to go with Amir to buy my very own stack of fighter kites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我惊讶的父母一开始笑了，但后来递给我一叠卢比，让我和阿米尔一起去买我自己的一堆战斗机风筝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 刺激性的, 尖刻的, 苦痛的；[医] 冲味的, 刺激味的
vocabulary.context: In Lahore, we wear clothes the color of mustard flowers, while our grandmothers labor over cauldrons of curried mustard leaves, preparing pungent, soul-warming saag.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在拉合尔，我们穿着芥末花颜色的衣服，而我们的祖母则在咖喱芥末叶的大锅里劳作，准备辛辣、温暖心灵的萨格

vocabulary.definition: adj. 暗淡的, 昏暗的, 邋遢的
vocabulary.context: I sucked in my breath as I stepped into the kite seller's dingy shop, hidden in the cavernous bazaar of Lahore.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我走进隐藏在拉合尔洞穴般的集市中的风筝卖家肮脏的商店时，我吸了一口气

vocabulary.definition: adv. 打趣地; 滑稽地
vocabulary.context: and jocularly inquired of his friend what it was the Bear had whispered in his ear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并开玩笑地询问他的朋友熊在他耳边低语了什么

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 假装, 装作；v.i. 作假
vocabulary.context: The other, seeing that he must be attacked, fell flat on the ground, and when the Bear came up and felt him with his snout, and smelt him all over, he held his breath, and feigned the appearance of death as much as he could.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一个，看到他一定会受到攻击，就倒在地上，当熊走上来，用鼻子摸他，闻到他全身的味道时，他屏住了呼吸，尽可能地装出死亡的样子

vocabulary.definition: n. 鼻口部, 鼻子, 口吻状物, 烟草
vocabulary.context: The other, seeing that he must be attacked, fell flat on the ground, and when the Bear came up and felt him with his snout, and smelt him all over, he held his breath, and feigned the appearance of death as much as he could.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一个，看到他一定会受到攻击，就倒在地上，当熊走上来，用鼻子摸他，闻到他全身的味道时，他屏住了呼吸，尽可能地装出死亡的样子

vocabulary.definition: v. 询问, 问明, 查究
vocabulary.context: and jocularly inquired of his friend what it was the Bear had whispered in his ear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并开玩笑地询问他的朋友熊在他耳边低语了什么

vocabulary.definition: n. 朋友, 陪伴, 指南, 升降口围罩；v.t. 陪伴
vocabulary.context: "He gave me this advice," his companion replied.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他给了我这个建议，"他的同伴回答道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 旅行的, 旅行用的, 移动的
vocabulary.context: Two men were traveling together, when a Bear suddenly met them on their path.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两个人一起旅行，一只熊突然在路上遇见了他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 忠告, 劝告, 意见, 报道, 通知；[经] 通知书, 通知, 建议
vocabulary.context: "He gave me this advice," his companion replied.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "他给了我这个建议，"他的同伴回答道

vocabulary.definition: n. 出现, 露面, 外观, 外表, 出版；[计] 外观, 版面
vocabulary.context: The other, seeing that he must be attacked, fell flat on the ground, and when the Bear came up and felt him with his snout, and smelt him all over, he held his breath, and feigned the appearance of death as much as he could.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一个，看到他一定会受到攻击，就倒在地上，当熊走上来，用鼻子摸他，闻到他全身的味道时，他屏住了呼吸，尽可能地装出死亡的样子

vocabulary.definition: n. 接近, 入门；v.t. 接近, 近似, 找...商量；v.i. 靠近
vocabulary.context: "Never travel with a friend who deserts you at the approach of danger."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "永远不要和一个在危险临近时抛弃你的朋友一起旅行。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 过度操劳的工作, 额外工作；v. (使)工作过度, 使过分劳累
vocabulary.context: Their goal was to get slaves to work as hard as possible without overworking them or killing them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的目标是让奴隶尽可能努力地工作，而不会让他们过度劳累或杀死他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 监督, 工头；[经] 管理人, 监督, 盘工
vocabulary.context: Overseers became so used to whipping a slave that they stopped thinking about the pain they were creating.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 督军们已经习惯了鞭打奴隶，以至于他们不再考虑自己所造成的痛苦

vocabulary.definition: n. 意志, 决心, 意愿, 意向, 干劲, 遗嘱；v.t. 用意志的力量驱使, 决意, 愿意, 立遗嘱；v.i. 下决心, 愿意；aux. 将, 愿意, 必须
vocabulary.context: One plantation could be thousands of acres and had dozens if not hundreds of slaves who were made to work against their wills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个种植园可能占地数千英亩，拥有数十甚至数百名奴隶，他们被迫违背自己的意愿工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 主妇, 女主人, 情妇
vocabulary.context: In the house, slaves were always under the eye of their master and mistress.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在家里，奴隶始终处于主人和情妇的监视之下

vocabulary.definition: n. 修剪, 夹子, 回形针, 剪下来的东西；v.t. 修剪, 痛打, 夹牢, 剪报；v.i. 剪报
vocabulary.context: It was as easy to them as clipping a nail.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这对他们来说就像剪指甲一样容易

vocabulary.definition: n. 鞭子, 鞭打, 睫毛, 责骂, 讽刺；v.t. 鞭打, 摆动, 扎捆, 冲击, 讽刺, 煽动；v.i. 冲洗, 鞭打, 责骂
vocabulary.context: This was anything from the number of lashes a master could give the slaves to whether slaves could trade with 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是从主人可以给奴隶的鞭打数量到奴隶是否可以与 1 进行交易的任何内容

vocabulary.definition: n. 鞭子, 抽打, 车夫, 搅拌器；v.t. 鞭打, 搅拌, 煽动, 召集, 仓促制成；v.i. 拍击, 急走, 抽打
vocabulary.context: They used whips, which if used with enough force, would tear open the slaves' skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们使用鞭子，如果用力足够，就会撕裂奴隶的皮肤

vocabulary.definition: adj. 严厉的, 绝对的, 详尽的, 严格的, 精确的；[法] 严格的, 精确的, 绝对的
vocabulary.context: Domestic slaves might have had an easier time working in the households, but if their masters were strict, life was could be even harder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 家奴在家里干活或许比较轻松，但如果主人严厉的话，生活就更艰难了

vocabulary.definition: n. 行为, 举止；[医] 行为
vocabulary.context: It was easier for them to overlook their bad behavior because so much money was rolling in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们更容易忽视自己的不良行为，因为大量资金滚滚而来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 吸热的
vocabulary.context: The best way to save the ice is to reduce heat-trapping gases in the air.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 保存冰的最好方法是减少空气中的吸热气体

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无水的, 不冻的
vocabulary.context: A hundred million years ago, Antarctica was ice-free.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一亿年前，南极洲没有冰

vocabulary.definition: n. 赤道；[医] 赤道, 中纬线
vocabulary.context: These deep currents start at the poles, when cold, salty water sinks and flows toward the equator.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些深水流始于两极，此时寒冷的咸水下沉并流向赤道

vocabulary.definition: n. 冰山, 冷冰冰的人
vocabulary.context: A new iceberg is born!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新的冰山诞生了！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 下坡的；adv. 下坡, 向下
vocabulary.context: This sends huge slabs of ice sliding downhill, into the ocean.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这使得巨大的冰块滑下山坡，进入海洋

vocabulary.definition: adj. 北极的, 极寒的；n. 北极圈, 北极
vocabulary.context: What does that mean for the Arctic and Antarctic?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这对北极和南极意味着什么？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有盐分的, 咸味浓的, 海洋的, 辛辣的, 有经验的
vocabulary.context: Rising seas could also make wells more salty and cause problems for farmers who need fresh water for crops.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海平面上升还可能使水井含盐量更高，给需要淡水种植农作物的农民带来问题

vocabulary.definition: adj. 时常发生的, 频繁的, 快速的；v.t. 时常来访, 常常聚集, 常与...交往
vocabulary.context: Storms could be more frequent and powerful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 风暴可能会更加频繁和强大

vocabulary.definition: n. 活动, 行动, 活跃, 活力；[计] 活动
vocabulary.context: But now, human activities like burning fossil fuels are causing Earth to heat up much faster.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但现在，燃烧化石燃料等人类活动正在导致地球升温得更快

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在莎士比亚时代，女性角色都是由声音高亢的年轻男性扮演，而被选上舞台扮演麦克白夫人的十几岁男孩却病重了

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在后台, 向后台
vocabulary.context: ...theaters, the ropes used to raise and lower sets and curtains were much like the rigging on a ship. Off-duty sailors would take jobs backstage. They communicated with each other by whistling, just as they did when they were at sea. If a member of the audience happened to whistle, the sailors might think they were getting a direction to lower a...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...剧院，用于升降布景和窗帘的绳索很像船上的索具。下班的水手们会在后台接替工作。他们通过吹口哨相互交流，就像在海上时一样。如果观众碰巧吹口哨，水手们可能会认为他们得到了降低......的指示

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 弥漫于, 遍及于, 流行于, 蔓延, 渗透于, 充满

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 将上述戏剧称为"苏格兰戏剧"并不是剧院中普遍存在的唯一迷信

vocabulary.context: Mirrors can interfere with the onstage lighting and valuables lying unprotected on the prop table can encourage theft - both practical reasons for the taboo.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 镜子会干扰舞台灯光，而道具桌上不受保护的贵重物品会鼓励盗窃--这都是禁忌的实际原因

vocabulary.definition: adj. 端到端的; 头尾连接
vocabulary.context: Loch Ness is more than 750 feet deep - that's bigger than two football fields placed end-to-end!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尼斯湖深超过 750 英尺 - 比两个足球场首尾相连还要大！

vocabulary.definition: n. 童话故事, 虚传
vocabulary.context: Loch Ness isn't the only place people claim to see monsters or fairytale creatures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尼斯湖并不是人们声称看到怪物或童话生物的唯一地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 马形水鬼(苏格兰民间传说中能诱人自溺或预告人们将溺死)
vocabulary.context: Some people even think that the Loch Ness monster might be a kelpie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有些人甚至认为尼斯湖水怪可能是水鬼

vocabulary.definition: n. 湖, 海湾
vocabulary.context: Kelpies are said to live in several of the different lochs around Scotland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据说凯尔派生活在苏格兰周围的几个不同的湖泊中

vocabulary.definition: n. 照准；瞄准；视线

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 事实上，大约 100 年前，这种怪物的目击事件才真正开始流行

vocabulary.definition: n. 凹槽, 惯例, 理想境况；v.t. 开槽于

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 上一个冰河时代的冰川在地球上刻下了深深的凹槽

vocabulary.definition: n. 潜伏, 潜行；v.i. 暗藏, 潜伏, 埋伏；[计] 隐匿阅读
vocabulary.context: You never quite know what's lurking below the surface!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你永远不知道表面之下潜藏着什么！

vocabulary.definition: n. 足球, 橄榄球
vocabulary.context: Loch Ness is more than 750 feet deep - that's bigger than two football fields placed end-to-end!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尼斯湖深超过 750 英尺 - 比两个足球场首尾相连还要大！

vocabulary.definition: adv. 特别, 格外, 尤其, 详细地, 细致地

vocabulary.definition: n. 记分卡

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他四次单打、得分两次并撞倒两名队友时，我和爸爸大口吃热狗，大口喝苏打水

vocabulary.definition: n. 阵容, 阵形, 布阵, 一组人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当山姆大叔来寻找士兵时，他经过了布朗队和他们一瘸一拐的阵容

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 还记得你是如何教我观察外野手如何移动来防守不同的击球手的吗？"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如此下去，直到鞋匠和他的妻子成为了富裕的人

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是第一位来的顾客对这双漂亮的鞋子非常满意，所以他买了它们，并付了很多钱，以至于鞋匠能够买到足够两双的皮革

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他把鞋子剪下来，准备缝合，然后把它们放在长凳上；然后他祈祷并上床睡觉，相信第二天就能完成鞋子并出售

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当杆子升起时，委托雕刻的人通常会举办一场盛大的庆祝活动，称为夸富宴

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 肖特里奇已经雕刻了二十年，他自己制作了许多工具，包括一些刀和小锛子或斧头

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些杆子是旧杆子的复制品；其他的是用于企业、政府建筑和学校的新设计

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 先民将这些高耸的雕塑放置在他们的家门前，以识别他们的氏族，并在海滨地区放置这些高耸的雕塑，以欢迎游客来到他们的村庄

vocabulary.definition: n. 个人主义, 个人特征；[经] 个人主义

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 豪给博物馆写了一封抗议信："我们是否要永远被阻止......没有个人主义的权利，就像印第安人一直以来所受的那样......？"

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1958年，他向美洲原住民艺术比赛提交了一幅作品

vocabulary.definition: n. 现在, 礼品, 瞄准；adj. 现在的, 出席的；v.t. 介绍, 引见, 赠送, 提出, 呈现, 上演；v.i. 举枪瞄准
vocabulary.context: "To present a true image of the Dakota Indian as I understood him and his culture." By the time of his death in 1983, Oscar Howe's efforts to paint his vision of the truth had forever changed Native American art.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "呈现达科他印第安人的真实形象，因为我了解他和他的文化。"到 1983 年去世时，奥斯卡·豪 (Oscar Howe) 努力描绘他对真理的看法，这永远改变了美洲原住民的艺术

vocabulary.definition: n. 玳瑁
vocabulary.context: In the warm waters along the equator, meet the Hawksbill turtle.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在赤道沿岸温暖的水域中，遇见玳瑁龟

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 改种, 在...再植, 使移居
vocabulary.context: Like the Borneo orangutan, African forest elephants help spread seeds and replant trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与婆罗洲猩猩一样，非洲森林象也帮助传播种子和重新种植树木

vocabulary.definition: n. 龟甲, 玳瑁壳, 龟板, 玳瑁色
vocabulary.context: The tortoiseshell is fashioned into jewelry and other decorations which are illegally traded around the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 龟甲被制成珠宝和其他装饰品，并在世界各地非法交易

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 用链锯割,<喻>肢解
vocabulary.context: Over the last fifty years, the chainsaw and tractor reshaped Borneo's rainforests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的五十年里，电锯和拖拉机重塑了婆罗洲的雨林

vocabulary.definition: adj. 锋利的, 犀利的
vocabulary.context: In tropical oceans, fishermen catch fish with wide nets and long fishing lines with thousands of razor-sharp hooks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在热带海洋，渔民用宽网和长钓鱼线和数千个锋利的鱼钩捕鱼

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 改造, 使成新的形状, 打开新局面；v.t. 整形；v.i. 整形；[计] 整形
vocabulary.context: Over the last fifty years, the chainsaw and tractor reshaped Borneo's rainforests.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在过去的五十年里，电锯和拖拉机重塑了婆罗洲的雨林

vocabulary.definition: n. 要塞, 堡垒, 大本营
vocabulary.context: Buckle up for a trip west to the Democratic Republic of Congo in central Africa, one of the last strongholds of the African forest elephant.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 系好安全带，向西前往中部非洲的刚果民主共和国，这里是非洲森林象最后的据点之一

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 承受, 支持, 供养, 继续, 忍受, 蒙受, 证实, 准许；[电] 持续
vocabulary.context: Conservationists estimate that commercial fishing is 2.5 times larger than what the ocean ecosystem can sustain, reports WWF .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据世界自然基金会报道，自然资源保护主义者估计商业捕捞规模是海洋生态系统所能承受的规模的 2.5 倍

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人馋涎欲滴的
vocabulary.context: If you are in the mood for some mouth-watering food and keen to learn about Eid, please come join us at Apartment #401 at 5 PM sharp!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果您想吃点令人垂涎欲滴的美食并热衷于了解开斋节，请于下午 5 点整来到 #401 公寓加入我们！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 桃色的
vocabulary.context: I dressed into a peach-colored shalwar kameez and the glittery glass bangles from last year's Eid clanked around my wrists.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我穿上桃色的沙尔瓦卡米兹，去年开斋节的闪闪发光的玻璃手镯在我的手腕上叮当作响

vocabulary.definition: n. 酸辣酱, 一种酸辣调味品
vocabulary.context: She whipped chutneys, seasoned chickpeas, baked and fried.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她搅打酸辣酱、调味鹰嘴豆、烘烤和油炸

vocabulary.definition: n. (南亚国家中尤指女子穿的)宽松裤,纱丽(亦作shalvar)
vocabulary.context: I dressed into a peach-colored shalwar kameez and the glittery glass bangles from last year's Eid clanked around my wrists.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我穿上桃色的沙尔瓦卡米兹，去年开斋节的闪闪发光的玻璃手镯在我的手腕上叮当作响

vocabulary.definition: n. 莱茵石
vocabulary.context: After shuffling through a pile of supplies, I finally settled on a roll of green card stock, silver glitter foam, silver rhinestone stickers, scissors, and a glue stick.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在翻阅了一堆用品后，我最终选定了一卷绿色卡纸、银色闪光泡沫、银色莱茵石贴纸、剪刀和胶棒

vocabulary.definition: n. 气氛；周围环境（等于ambience）
vocabulary.context: The warmth of the tea relaxed the ambiance, and everyone started mingling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 茶的温热使气氛变得轻松，大家开始交往

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 追忆说；v.i. 追忆往事, 话旧
vocabulary.context: While Ammi and Fariba reminisced how they celebrated Eid back home, Mary, Joanna, and Whitney shared their Christmas and Hanukkah stories.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当阿米和法里巴回忆如何在家乡庆祝开斋节时，玛丽、乔安娜和惠特尼分享了他们的圣诞节和光明节故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 分类, 各种各样；[医] [遗传]配列
vocabulary.context: We opened the door and greeted an assortment of female faces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们打开门，迎接了各种各样的女性面孔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 抑沉的, 忧闷的, 黑暗的, 悲观的
vocabulary.context: Just as we were shedding off our winter coats and the gloomy memories of a long winter, the spring arrived with its full bloom.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正当我们褪去冬衣，褪去漫长冬天的灰暗记忆时，春天却盛开了

vocabulary.definition: n. 分贝；[计] 分贝
vocabulary.context: Their bellows can reach up to 188 decibels, even louder than a jet engine.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们的风箱声音可达 188 分贝，甚至比喷气发动机的声音还要大

vocabulary.definition: n. 捕鲸者, 捕鲸船
vocabulary.context: From the 1860s until the 1960s, whalers hunted blue whales for their fat and body parts, killing up to 99% of the blue whale population.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 从 1860 年代到 1960 年代，捕鲸者为了获取蓝鲸的脂肪和身体部位而捕杀蓝鲸，导致蓝鲸数量的 99% 被捕杀

vocabulary.definition: n. 獾, 獾皮毛；v.t. 纠缠
vocabulary.context: Honey badgers get their name from their favorite food: honey.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蜜獾的名字来源于它们最喜欢的食物：蜂蜜

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再引进, 再介绍
vocabulary.context: They hope that reintroducing Spix's macaws to Brazil can grow a wild population of these birds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们希望将斯皮克斯金刚鹦鹉重新引入巴西可以增加这些鸟类的野生数量

vocabulary.definition: n. 低地, 苏格兰低地；adj. 低地的
vocabulary.context: The eastern lowland gorilla lives in the tropical rainforests of the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) in Africa.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 东部低地大猩猩生活在非洲刚果民主共和国（DRC）的热带雨林中

vocabulary.definition: n. 纠缠, 卷入, 缠绕物；[化] 缠结
vocabulary.context: Ship crashes, entanglement in fishing nets, and climate change threaten these marine mammals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 船舶失事、渔网缠绕和气候变化威胁着这些海洋哺乳动物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 寂寞的
vocabulary.context: The scientist named him Lonesome George.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 科学家给他起名叫"孤独的乔治"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易受伤害的, 有弱点的, 易受影响的, 脆弱的, 成局的；[医] 易损的
vocabulary.context: The categories include least concern , near threatened , vulnerable , endangered , critically endangered , extinct in the wild , and extinct .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些类别包括最不受关注、近危、脆弱、濒危、极度濒危、野外灭绝和灭绝

vocabulary.definition: adj. 劳动密集型的
vocabulary.context: could be procured, which would be labor-intensive,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可以采购，这将是劳动密集型的，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可叠起堆放的,易叠起堆放的
vocabulary.context: where food came in stackable containers
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 食物装在可堆叠容器中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 易怒的, 爱挑剔的, 难取悦的, 易烦恼的
vocabulary.context: and fussy bags, unless you bothered to drive
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 和挑剔的包，除非你费心开车

vocabulary.definition: n. 蒲式耳(容量单位)；v. 修整(衣物)
vocabulary.context: a bushel of fruit, a twenty-pound sack of rice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一蒲式耳水果，一袋二十磅大米

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使困惑, 使复杂化, 使为难；[法] 困惑, 使复杂化, 使纠缠不清
vocabulary.context: except when asked the odd, perplexing question.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除非被问到奇怪、令人费解的问题

vocabulary.definition: n. 冰库, 冰箱, 冷冻库
vocabulary.context: into the extra freezer, reviewing mountains
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 进入额外的冰箱，回顾山脉

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 获得, 取得, 导致；v.i. 拉皮条
vocabulary.context: could be procured, which would be labor-intensive,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可以采购，这将是劳动密集型的，

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未认识到的, 不知道的；[法] 不知道的, 不察觉的, 无意的
vocabulary.context: taller than their parents and unaware of hunger
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 比父母高并且不知道饥饿

vocabulary.definition: n. 检讨, 复习, 回顾, 检阅, 评论；v.t. 温习, 检讨, 评论, 再检察, 复审；v.i. 复习功课, 写评论
vocabulary.context: into the extra freezer, reviewing mountains
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 进入额外的冰箱，回顾山脉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 气体的, 气态的, 无实质的；[医] 气[体]的
vocabulary.context: In one of the most iconic pictures captured, called the "Pillars of Creation," we see colorful gaseous blobs from which new stars are being born, something we'd never be able to see with just our naked eye.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一张被称为"创造之柱"的最具标志性的照片中，我们看到了彩色的气体斑点，新的恒星正在从中诞生，这是我们用肉眼永远无法看到的

vocabulary.definition: n. 镜片
vocabulary.context: Just as a pair of eyeglasses makes things clearer and helps people see further away, a telescope does that on a much larger scale with a much larger lens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 正如一副眼镜可以使事物变得更清晰并帮助人们看得更远一样，望远镜可以通过更大的镜头在更大的范围内实现这一点

vocabulary.definition: n. 一滴, 小斑点；v.t. 溅污
vocabulary.context: In one of the most iconic pictures captured, called the "Pillars of Creation," we see colorful gaseous blobs from which new stars are being born, something we'd never be able to see with just our naked eye.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一张被称为"创造之柱"的最具标志性的照片中，我们看到了彩色的气体斑点，新的恒星正在从中诞生，这是我们用肉眼永远无法看到的

vocabulary.definition: n. 天文学
vocabulary.context: This was a great achievement for astronomy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是天文学的一项伟大成就

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人造的
vocabulary.context: There are many natural and man-made elements that interfere with seeing into space, like rain clouds, lights, and the Earth's atmosphere.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有许多自然和人造因素会干扰太空观测，例如雨云、灯光和地球大气层

vocabulary.definition: n. 冲突, 干涉；[计] 干扰
vocabulary.context: If only we could get high enough above all this interference...perhaps we could see further.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们能够飞得足够高，超越所有这些干扰......也许我们可以看得更远

vocabulary.definition: adj. 地球的, 俗世的, 可能的
vocabulary.context: Some scientists will go to the top of mountains where these earthly features aren't as present.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些科学家会去山顶，那里没有这些地球特征

vocabulary.definition: n. 柱子, 栋梁, 台柱, 重要的支持者；[医] 柱, 脚
vocabulary.context: In one of the most iconic pictures captured, called the "Pillars of Creation," we see colorful gaseous blobs from which new stars are being born, something we'd never be able to see with just our naked eye.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在一张被称为"创造之柱"的最具标志性的照片中，我们看到了彩色的气体斑点，新的恒星正在从中诞生，这是我们用肉眼永远无法看到的

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 讨论, 论述；[医] 讨论, 辩论
vocabulary.context: In the 1920s, scientists began to discuss the possibility of launching a telescope into space.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20世纪20年代，科学家们开始讨论向太空发射望远镜的可能性

vocabulary.definition: n. 雷鸟
vocabulary.context: They ate animals such as caribou, seals, walruses, polar bears, arctic hares, musk oxen, birds such as ptarmigan, and fish such as artic char, salmon and whitefish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们吃驯鹿、海豹、海象、北极熊、北极野兔、麝牛等动物，雷鸟等鸟类，以及北极红点鲑、鲑鱼和白鲑等鱼类

vocabulary.definition: n. 鲸须, 鲸须制品
vocabulary.context: Pieces of wood or whalebone were used as a frame for the roof, which the Inuit then covered with sod.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 木片或鲸骨被用作屋顶框架，因纽特人随后用草皮覆盖

vocabulary.definition: n. 汽车列车
vocabulary.context: They ate animals such as caribou, seals, walruses, polar bears, arctic hares, musk oxen, birds such as ptarmigan, and fish such as artic char, salmon and whitefish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们吃驯鹿、海豹、海象、北极熊、北极野兔、麝牛等动物，雷鸟等鸟类，以及北极红点鲑、鲑鱼和白鲑等鱼类

vocabulary.definition: n. 野兔；v.i. 飞跑
vocabulary.context: They ate animals such as caribou, seals, walruses, polar bears, arctic hares, musk oxen, birds such as ptarmigan, and fish such as artic char, salmon and whitefish.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们吃驯鹿、海豹、海象、北极熊、北极野兔、麝牛等动物，雷鸟等鸟类，以及北极红点鲑、鲑鱼和白鲑等鱼类

vocabulary.definition: n. 北美驯鹿
vocabulary.context: Depending on how far north they live, the Inuit find everything from caribou herds and polar bears to beluga whales.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据他们居住的北方距离，因纽特人发现了从驯鹿群、北极熊到白鲸的各种动物

vocabulary.definition: n. 大白鳇, 白鲸
vocabulary.context: Depending on how far north they live, the Inuit find everything from caribou herds and polar bears to beluga whales.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据他们居住的北方距离，因纽特人发现了从驯鹿群、北极熊到白鲸的各种动物

vocabulary.definition: n. 皮制连帽大衣, 派克大衣
vocabulary.context: Besides waterproof clothing, the Inuit also made parkas of caribou fur to wear in the cold winter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了防水服装外，因纽特人还用驯鹿毛皮制作派克大衣，供寒冷的冬天穿着

vocabulary.definition: n. 南方人
vocabulary.context: The arrival of southerners and modern technology resulted in big changes to the Inuit diet and way of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 南方人和现代技术的到来导致因纽特人的饮食和生活方式发生了巨大变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 技术, 工业技术, 术语；[医] 技术学, 工艺学
vocabulary.context: The arrival of southerners and modern technology resulted in big changes to the Inuit diet and way of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 南方人和现代技术的到来导致因纽特人的饮食和生活方式发生了巨大变化

vocabulary.definition: n. 勇敢, 华饰, 华丽
vocabulary.context: Alone, Theseus squinted into the silent darkness, the blood and braveness draining from his face.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 忒修斯独自一人，眯着眼睛看着寂静的黑暗，血色和勇气从他的脸上消失

vocabulary.definition: n. 抓, 握；adv. 迎风航驶
vocabulary.context: She had whispered that by always keeping ahold of the string, Theseus could trace his way back to the entrance and escape the inescapable maze.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她低声说，只要始终握住绳子，忒修斯就可以找到通往入口的路，逃离无法逃脱的迷宫

vocabulary.definition: adj. 交战的, 敌对的, 冲突的；[法] 战争, 敌对行为
vocabulary.context: Timid King Aegeus sadly obeyed to keep the peace between their warring cities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 胆小的埃勾斯国王悲伤地服从命令，以维持交战城市之间的和平

vocabulary.definition: adj. 将要打雷的, 像打雷的
vocabulary.context: His shield banged into a wall and hit the ground with a thunderous clang.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的盾牌撞在墙上，摔在地上，发出雷鸣般的叮当声

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 鬼鬼祟祟地走, (动物)早产；v.t. 早产；n. 鬼鬼祟祟的人, 早产的动物；adj. 早产的
vocabulary.context: From the shadows, a strange shape slinked toward him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阴影中，一个奇怪的身影向他悄悄靠近

vocabulary.definition: adj. 逃不掉的, 不可避免的
vocabulary.context: She had whispered that by always keeping ahold of the string, Theseus could trace his way back to the entrance and escape the inescapable maze.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她低声说，只要始终握住绳子，忒修斯就可以找到通往入口的路，逃离无法逃脱的迷宫

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能想象的, 不可思议的
vocabulary.context: What lurked deep in the underground tunnels sent chills down the spine of every mortal in Greece: the Minotaur, a monster of unimaginable strength and fury.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 潜伏在地下隧道深处的东西让希腊每个凡人都感到脊背发凉：牛头怪，一个拥有难以想象的力量和愤怒的怪物

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 服从, 遵从, 顺从；v.i. 服从
vocabulary.context: Timid King Aegeus sadly obeyed to keep the peace between their warring cities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 胆小的埃勾斯国王悲伤地服从命令，以维持交战城市之间的和平

vocabulary.definition: adj. 孤独的, 单独的, 独自的；adv. 独自地
vocabulary.context: Alone, Theseus squinted into the silent darkness, the blood and braveness draining from his face.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 忒修斯独自一人，眯着眼睛看着寂静的黑暗，血色和勇气从他的脸上消失

vocabulary.definition: n. 瓷漆, 漆, 漆器；v.t. 涂漆
vocabulary.context: Gen's family has practiced traditional Japanese lacquer art for three generations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Gen氏家族已经传承了三代日本传统漆艺

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再使用；n. 重新使用
vocabulary.context: Gen believes this is part of the movement to use materials that come from nature and to recycle and reuse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Gen 认为这是使用来自自然的材料以及回收和再利用运动的一部分

vocabulary.definition: adj. 方便, 合宜
vocabulary.context: Don't think the conveniently clumsy can fool a urushi master.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不要以为方便的笨拙就能愚弄漆师傅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 陶瓷的；n. 陶瓷制品
vocabulary.context: This artist says that the idea that ceramics can be repaired is a shock to most people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这位艺术家说，陶瓷可以修复的想法让大多数人感到震惊

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使再循环, 重新利用, 再制；n. 再循环
vocabulary.context: Gen believes this is part of the movement to use materials that come from nature and to recycle and reuse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Gen 认为这是使用来自自然的材料以及回收和再利用运动的一部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 陶器, 陶器厂；[化] 陶器
vocabulary.context: Its sticky sap acts like a natural glue that holds the pottery pieces together.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它的粘性汁液就像天然胶水一样，将陶器碎片粘在一起

vocabulary.definition: adj. 笨拙的, 不雅观的, 粗陋的
vocabulary.context: Don't think the conveniently clumsy can fool a urushi master.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不要以为方便的笨拙就能愚弄漆师傅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 烦人的, 无聊的, 无趣的；[机] 成孔期, 搪孔
vocabulary.context: A boring old plain-white bowl can be transformed into a unique work of art coated with real gold.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一个无聊的旧纯白碗可以变成一件涂有真金的独特艺术品

vocabulary.definition: adv. 非常, 非常赞许地；[电] 大大地
vocabulary.context: Major repairs can cost thousands of dollars, take months to complete, and require all the skills of a highly trained urushi master - and there aren't too many masters still practicing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 重大维修可能花费数千美元，需要数月才能完成，并且需要训练有素的漆艺大师的所有技能 - 而且目前仍在练习的大师并不多

vocabulary.definition: n. 一罐, 一壶, 一锅
vocabulary.context: I have been and come back again, and got a nice potful for dinner."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我去过，又回来了，并得到了一锅美味的晚餐。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 荆豆花
vocabulary.context: The second little pig met a man with a bundle of furze, and said, "Please, man, give me that furze to build a house." Which the man did, and the pig built his house.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第二只小猪遇到了一个拿着一捆荆豆的人，他说："请给我那捆荆豆，让我盖房子吧。"男人照做了，猪就盖起了他的房子

vocabulary.definition: n. 鸭叫声, 冒牌医生, 冒充内行之人；adj. 冒牌医生的；v. 嘎嘎叫, 当冒牌医生, 夸大广告
vocabulary.context: And ducks went quack, quack, quack, O!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸭子嘎嘎叫，嘎嘎，嘎嘎，哦！

vocabulary.definition: n. 芜菁, 芜菁甘蓝；[医] 芜菁, 萝卜
vocabulary.context: When he found that he could not, with all his huffing and puffing, blow the house down, he said, "Little pig, I know where there is a nice field of turnips."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他发现他气喘吁吁地无法把房子吹倒时，他说："小猪，我知道哪里有一片漂亮的萝卜地。"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 激怒, 发怒, 提高价格, 吹胀；v.i. 吹气, 恫吓, 发怒；n. 发怒
vocabulary.context: The wolf then answered to that, "Then I'll huff, and I'll puff, and I'll blow your house in." So he huffed, and he puffed, and he blew his house in, and ate up the little pig.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 狼回答道："那我就吹气，我就吹气，把你的房子吹倒。"于是他气呼呼地吹气，把他的房子炸毁了，把小猪吃掉了

vocabulary.definition: n. 搅乳器；v. 搅拌, 搅动
vocabulary.context: So the little pig went off before the time as usual, and got to the fair, and bought a butter churn, which he was going home with, when he saw the wolf coming.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 于是，小猪像往常一样提前出发了，到了集市，买了一个黄油搅拌器，正准备回家，这时他看到了狼来了

vocabulary.definition: n. 烟囱, 灯罩；[电] 烟囱
vocabulary.context: Then the wolf was very angry indeed, and declared he would eat up the little pig, and that he would get down the chimney after him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后狼真的很生气，宣布他要吃掉小猪，然后跟着他从烟囱下去

vocabulary.definition: v. 欺骗, 行骗
vocabulary.context: "Down at Merry Garden," replied the wolf, "and if you will not deceive me I will come for you, at five o'clock tomorrow and get some apples."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "在快乐花园，"狼回答道，"如果你不欺骗我，我会在明天五点钟来找你，去拿一些苹果。"

vocabulary.definition: adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
vocabulary.context: Then the wolf was very angry indeed, and declared he would eat up the little pig, and that he would get down the chimney after him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后狼真的很生气，宣布他要吃掉小猪，然后跟着他从烟囱下去

vocabulary.definition: adv. 令人厌恶地
vocabulary.context: Our vessel groans and threatens to separate as the twin bows of our canoe angle sickeningly downward into the frothing green chasm beneath us.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们独木舟的双船头令人作呕地向下倾斜到我们下面冒着泡沫的绿色裂缝时，我们的船发出呻吟声，并有分离的危险

vocabulary.definition: n. 面包果
vocabulary.context: Many days had passed since rain last fell on our crops of taro and breadfruit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自从上次下雨袭击我们的芋头和面包果作物以来，已经过去很多天了

vocabulary.definition: n. 前甲板
vocabulary.context: On the foredeck, Kilolani bears the storm from his customary place, his legs bent at the knee, bracing for each gust and roll.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在前甲板上，基洛拉尼从他惯常的位置承受着风暴，他的双腿弯曲在膝盖处，为每一次阵风和翻滚做好准备

vocabulary.definition: n. 突进, 突击, 袭击, 洪流
vocabulary.context: Our king stands tall beside Kilolani, facing the onrushing clouds, shouting orders across to the other canoe to promote its safety.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的国王高高地站在基洛拉尼旁边，面对着汹涌的云彩，向另一艘独木舟大声喊叫，以确保其安全

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在背后, 向后方；n. 后方, 后部, 背后；adj. 向后方的, 在末尾的
vocabulary.context: For a moment I feel shielded by her and my father, cocooned as we are one around the other, until we are flung mightily rearward as the massive stern falls back into the sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有那么一刻，我感到被她和父亲保护着，我们彼此紧紧相拥，直到我们被巨大的船尾抛回海中，被猛烈地向后抛去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 纤维的, 纤维性的；[医] 纤维性
vocabulary.context: Along the left index finger runs a jagged scar earned early in her marriage as she used the spiny tip of a stingray's tail to pierce a knot of fibrous palm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 左手食指上有一道锯齿状的疤痕，是她结婚初期用黄貂鱼尾巴的尖刺刺穿手掌上的纤维结时留下的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无判断力的；分不清方向或目标的
vocabulary.context: I turn in circles, thinking I am disoriented by the wind and waves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我原地打转，以为自己被风浪迷失了方向

vocabulary.definition: n. 集中, 专心；[化] 浓度; 浓缩
vocabulary.context: You never interrupt his concentration.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你永远不会打断他的注意力

vocabulary.definition: n. 美化
vocabulary.context: She persuaded the President to propose a Highway Beautification Act that provided controls for billboards and junkyards along the highways and allocated money to landscape roadsides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她说服总统提出一项高速公路美化法案，对高速公路沿线的广告牌和垃圾场进行控制，并拨款用于景观路边

vocabulary.definition: n. 蓝色的呢绒帽；矢车菊；苏格兰兵
vocabulary.context: Again, she found joy in nature - in the vast amount of Texas bluebonnets that covered the fields and roadsides of Hill Country.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她再次在大自然中找到了乐趣--在覆盖丘陵地区田野和路边的大量德克萨斯州矢车菊中

vocabulary.definition: num. 第七十, 七十分之一
vocabulary.context: On her seventieth birthday, in 1982, Lady Bird started the National Wildflower Research Center (now called the Lady Bird Johnson Wildflower Center) in Austin, Texas.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1982年，伯德夫人在她七十岁生日那天在德克萨斯州奥斯汀创办了国家野花研究中心（现称为伯德夫人约翰逊野花中心）

vocabulary.definition: n. 生活资料, 生计, 食物, 支持；[法] 营养物, 维持, 支持
vocabulary.context: "And once man can no longer walk with beauty and wonder at nature," he said, "his spirit will wither and his sustenance be wasted."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "一旦人类不能再与自然的美丽和惊奇同行，"他说，"他的精神就会枯萎，他的生计就会被浪费。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 广告牌, 布告板；v.t. 宣传
vocabulary.context: She persuaded the President to propose a Highway Beautification Act that provided controls for billboards and junkyards along the highways and allocated money to landscape roadsides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她说服总统提出一项高速公路美化法案，对高速公路沿线的广告牌和垃圾场进行控制，并拨款用于景观路边

vocabulary.definition: n. 车道, 道路, 轨道；[法] 道路, 路面, 快车道
vocabulary.context: Instead, she started the Lady Bird Johnson Award for Highway Beautification , which gave prizes each year to maintenance crews who planted and cared for wildflowers and native plants along the Texas roadways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 相反，她创办了伯德·约翰逊夫人公路美化奖，每年都会向在德克萨斯州公路沿线种植和照料野花和本土植物的维护人员颁发奖项

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 暗杀, 行刺；[法] 暗杀, 行刺, 中伤
vocabulary.context: Kennedy was assassinated.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 肯尼迪遇刺身亡

vocabulary.definition: n. 优先权, 优先；[计] 优先级
vocabulary.context: Johnson, Claudia Alta "Lady Bird" Johnson wanted beauty to be a national priority.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 约翰逊，克劳迪娅·阿尔塔"伯德女士"约翰逊希望美丽成为国家的首要任务

vocabulary.definition: adj. 忠诚的, 信仰的, 虔诚的, 祷告的
vocabulary.context: After the punchamrit is mixed, it is blessed by Sumintra's parents and served during the ritual chanting of prayers and singing of devotional Indian songs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 潘卡姆瑞特混合后，由苏明特拉的父母祝福，并在诵经祈祷和唱印度虔诚歌曲的仪式中提供

vocabulary.definition: n. 栀子
vocabulary.context: Marigolds and gardenias are used because their strong fragrances wake up the gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 使用万寿菊和栀子花是因为它们浓郁的香味可以唤醒神灵

vocabulary.definition: n. 鹰嘴豆
vocabulary.context: On Divali, they prepare roti (pita bread), pumpkin, curried mangoes, curried chickpeas with potatoes, string beans, spinach, and rice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在排灯节，他们会准备罗蒂（皮塔饼）、南瓜、咖喱芒果、咖喱鹰嘴豆配土豆、四季豆、菠菜和米饭

vocabulary.definition: n. 喷口, 从喷口流出的水, 水落管, 水龙卷；v.t. 喷出, 喷射, 滔滔不绝说出, 典押；v.i. 喷射, 高谈阔论
vocabulary.context: She turns each deya so that the spout faces east, the direction of the rising sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她转动每个德雅，使喷口面向东，即太阳升起的方向

vocabulary.definition: n. 供应者, 供养人, 伙食承办人；[计] 提供器
vocabulary.context: (Hindus associate God with the right hand and the devil with the left.) Sumintra then offers her parents sumintra because they are her providers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （印度教徒将上帝与右手联系起来，将魔鬼与左手联系起来。）苏明特拉然后向她的父母提供苏明特拉，因为他们是她的供养者

vocabulary.definition: n. 万寿菊, 金盏花；[医] 金盏花
vocabulary.context: Marigolds and gardenias are used because their strong fragrances wake up the gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 使用万寿菊和栀子花是因为它们浓郁的香味可以唤醒神灵

vocabulary.definition: n. 器皿, 用具
vocabulary.context: Brass utensils are significant in the Hindu home because they are used only for serving food sacrifices to the gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 黄铜器具在印度教家庭中很重要，因为它们仅用于向神灵提供食物祭祀

vocabulary.definition: n. 魔鬼；v.t. 折磨, 戏弄
vocabulary.context: (Hindus associate God with the right hand and the devil with the left.) Sumintra then offers her parents sumintra because they are her providers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （印度教徒将上帝与右手联系起来，将魔鬼与左手联系起来。）苏明特拉然后向她的父母提供苏明特拉，因为他们是她的供养者

vocabulary.definition: n. , adj. noisemaker的变形
vocabulary.context: A week later, Matthias sat behind the puppet theater's cave scene with his noisemaking tools ready.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一周后，马蒂亚斯坐在木偶剧院的洞穴场景后面，准备好制造噪音的工具

vocabulary.definition: n. 好戏上演；（电视等的）节目播放时间
vocabulary.context: On village greens at showtime, he joined the puppet masters behind the brightly painted theater.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 演出时，在村庄的绿地上，他加入了色彩鲜艳的剧院后面的木偶大师

vocabulary.definition: n. 操纵木偶的人
vocabulary.context: Matthias spent happy days traveling around the kingdom with his father's band of puppeteers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马蒂亚斯和他父亲的木偶师乐队一起在王国各地度过了快乐的日子

vocabulary.definition: n. 连续的轻击(声)
vocabulary.context: Matthias gave a last tap-tap before slipping out of the cave, scanning the empty sky, and running away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马蒂亚斯最后敲了敲门，然后溜出了洞穴，扫视着空旷的天空，然后逃跑了

vocabulary.definition: n. 蠓, 侏儒；[医] 蠓, 蚋
vocabulary.context: Ahead, a still lake swarmed with dark clouds of midges.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 前方，一片平静的湖面上布满了乌云密布的蠓虫

vocabulary.definition: n. 公猪, 野猪
vocabulary.context: I'll grab six plump boars and flap straight back," said the mother, and she flew away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我要抓起六头肥肥的野猪，然后直接拍打回来。"妈妈说着就飞走了

vocabulary.definition: n. 贮藏物, 密藏的金钱；v. 囤积, 贮藏
vocabulary.context: This bright red creature lazed upon its hoard of riches like a great ship at anchor in a gleaming, golden bay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个鲜红色的生物懒洋洋地躺在它的财富宝库上，就像一艘停泊在闪闪发光的金色海湾的大船

vocabulary.definition: n. 大步, 步幅, 步态, 进步；v. 迈大步走, 跨过, 跨
vocabulary.context: Striding quickly along, Matthias glanced uneasily at the black stone cliffs towering beside him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马蒂亚斯大步走着，不安地看了一眼身边高耸的黑色石崖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 四分之一决赛 的,复赛的；n. 复赛
vocabulary.context: During the game, Pelé made several vital plays that helped put Brazil into the quarter-finals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 比赛中，贝利打出了几次关键的比赛，帮助巴西队进入四分之一决赛

vocabulary.definition: n. 擦亮的皮鞋面, 擦皮鞋
vocabulary.context: He grew up poor and worked as a shoeshine boy at the railroad station to help feed his family.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他出身贫穷，在火车站当擦鞋童，以养家糊口

vocabulary.definition: n. 半决赛; 准决赛; 复赛
vocabulary.context: They met France in the semi-finals, where Pelé scored a spectacular hat trick, a term used when one person scores three goals in a game.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在半决赛中遇到了法国队，贝利上演了一场精彩的帽子戏法，帽子戏法是指一个人在一场比赛中攻入三个进球的术语

vocabulary.definition: adj. 三次的
vocabulary.context: He is the only three-time World Cup champion and has scored more goals for Brazil - 77 in 92 games - than any other player.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是唯一一位三届世界杯冠军，并且为巴西队打入的进球数（92 场比赛中打入 77 球）比任何其他球员都多

vocabulary.definition: n. 守门员
vocabulary.context: After stopping a long pass with his chest, Pelé flicked the ball over the head of the Swedish defender and fired it past the goalkeeper before it hit the ground.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在用胸部挡住长传后，贝利将球弹过瑞典后卫的头顶，在球落地之前射过门将

vocabulary.definition: n. (古时战争时所用的)燃料剂, 磷火, 鬼火, 野火
vocabulary.context: Excitement for the game spread like wildfire, and soccer was soon the most popular sport in the country.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们对这项运动的热情像野火一样蔓延开来，足球很快就成为了这个国家最受欢迎的运动

vocabulary.definition: n. 联邦, 联合, 联盟；[法] 联邦, 联盟, 联邦政府
vocabulary.context: In 1999, several organizations, including the International Federation of Football History and Statistics (IFFHS), named Pelé the best soccer player of the century.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1999年，包括国际足球历史和统计联合会（IFFHS）在内的多个组织将贝利评为本世纪最佳足球运动员

vocabulary.definition: n. 补偿, 赔偿金, 工资；[医] 代偿(机能), 补偿
vocabulary.context: He used his position to create the "Pelé Law," which guaranteed soccer players a fair wage and compensation if they got injured.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他利用自己的职位制定了"贝利法"，保证足球运动员在受伤时获得公平的工资和赔偿

vocabulary.definition: adj. 漆黑的, 墨黑的
vocabulary.context: The large pitch-black eyes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 漆黑的大眼睛

vocabulary.definition: n. 描绘, 描写, 画像, 肖像；[计] 描绘
vocabulary.context: Despite their portrayals in movies and popular culture, sharks are complicated, misunderstood creatures that are more vulnerable than they appear.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管在电影和流行文化中对鲨鱼进行了描述，但鲨鱼是一种复杂的、被误解的生物，它们比它们看起来更脆弱

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 冲淡, 稀释；adj. 淡的, 稀释的
vocabulary.context: This means for one drop of blood, there are 25 million drops of water around it to dilute it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这意味着对于一滴血，它周围有2500万滴水来稀释它

vocabulary.definition: adj. 背的, 背部的, 背侧的；[医] 背的, 背侧的
vocabulary.context: The sharp dorsal fin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 锋利的背鳍

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 对(鱼)进行过度捕捞
vocabulary.context: For one, they mature quite slowly, over several years, and produce relatively few young and this makes them particularly vulnerable to overfishing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其一，它们的成熟速度相当缓慢，需要数年时间，并且产生的幼体相对较少，这使得它们特别容易受到过度捕捞的影响

vocabulary.definition: n. 误会, 误解；[法] 误解, 误会, 不和
vocabulary.context: One very common misunderstanding about sharks is their desire to hunt humans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 对鲨鱼的一个非常常见的误解是它们渴望捕猎人类

vocabulary.definition: n. 细软, 精致, 精美的食品, 娇气, 微妙, 棘手, 娇弱, 灵敏, 灵巧
vocabulary.context: Shark fin is considered a delicacy in many east Asian countries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鱼翅在许多东亚国家被认为是美味佳肴

vocabulary.definition: n. 限制, 缺陷, 限额；[医] 限界, 限制, 限度
vocabulary.context: In response, some countries have taken steps to protect sharks by putting limitations on shark fishing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为回应，一些国家已采取措施通过限制鲨鱼捕捞来保护鲨鱼

vocabulary.definition: n. 虚夸自负的人, 花花公子, 绿啄木鸟, 鹦鹉
vocabulary.context: "Do not sneer at me, you popinjay," she roared.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "别嘲笑我，你这个笨蛋，"她咆哮道

vocabulary.definition: n. 胸针, 领针
vocabulary.context: Her dress was of plain wool, her velvet cloak was old and worn and the only sign of her wealth the brooch of heavy gold which was pinned on her shoulder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的衣服是纯羊毛的，她的天鹅绒斗篷又旧又破，她的财富的唯一标志是别在肩上的重金胸针

vocabulary.definition: n. 酋长, 首领
vocabulary.context: Granuaile was the daughter of the chieftain Owen Dubhdara.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 格莱努阿莱是酋长欧文·杜布达拉的女儿

vocabulary.definition: adv. 笑着地, 可笑地; 笑哈哈
vocabulary.context: When she appeared dressed as a boy and demanding to be taken on the next voyage, her mother was angry, but her father laughingly agreed to take her with him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她打扮成男孩并要求带她参加下一次航行时，她的母亲很生气，但她的父亲笑着同意带她一起去

vocabulary.definition: adj. 加强的
vocabulary.context: She grew up in Belclare Castle, a fortified tower with a great hall where the clans would gather for huge feasts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在贝尔克莱尔城堡长大，这是一座坚固的塔楼，有一个大厅，氏族们会在那里聚集在一起举行盛大的宴会

vocabulary.definition: n. 保险箱, 金库；v.t. 把...锁进箱子
vocabulary.context: Granuaile then turned to piracy and soon became the most daring and most feared pirate on the west coast, her coffers overflowing with stolen treasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后，格拉努阿莱开始从事海盗活动，并很快成为西海岸最大胆、最令人畏惧的海盗，她的金库里装满了被盗的财宝

vocabulary.definition: n. 海盗行为, 海上劫掠, 剽窃, 著作权侵害, 非法翻印；[法] 海盗行为, 海上掠夺, 海盗罪
vocabulary.context: Granuaile then turned to piracy and soon became the most daring and most feared pirate on the west coast, her coffers overflowing with stolen treasure.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随后，格拉努阿莱开始从事海盗活动，并很快成为西海岸最大胆、最令人畏惧的海盗，她的金库里装满了被盗的财宝

vocabulary.definition: n. 七十( seventy的名词复数 ); 从七十到七十九的数目、年数或温度
vocabulary.context: Granuaile lived until she was in her seventies, a good age for those times.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Granuaile 一直活到七十多岁，对于那个时代来说，这是一个很好的年龄

vocabulary.definition: n. 捏造
vocabulary.context: She wore much make-up, and a huge red wig covered her head.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她化了浓妆，头上戴着一顶巨大的红色假发

vocabulary.definition: n. 嬉皮士
vocabulary.context: My parents were hippies and we lived with a barn-full of artisans who created the most amazing silver, leather, and pottery items.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的父母是嬉皮士，我们住在一个谷仓里，里面满是工匠，他们创造了最令人惊叹的银器、皮革和陶器

vocabulary.definition: n. 桃金娘科植物；[医] 桃金娘
vocabulary.context: My children are twelve years apart, and we lived in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, on a cul-de-sac next to our best friends, the Napiers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的孩子们相差十二岁，我们住在南卡罗来纳州默特尔比奇的一条死胡同里，旁边就是我们最好的朋友纳皮尔一家

vocabulary.definition: n. 谷仓；[化] 靶(恩)(核反应截面单位)
vocabulary.context: My younger brothers and I had fields to explore and a pool tucked behind one of the barns.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我和弟弟们有田地可以探索，其中一个谷仓后面还有一个游泳池

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 比...重, 比...重要, 比...有价值
vocabulary.context: But Nana and Papa outweighed everything else.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但娜娜和爸爸比其他一切都重要

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可疑的, 不确定的
vocabulary.context: But my kids were dubious.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我的孩子们对此表示怀疑

vocabulary.definition: n. 工匠, 技工；[经] 熟练技术工, 匠人
vocabulary.context: My parents were hippies and we lived with a barn-full of artisans who created the most amazing silver, leather, and pottery items.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的父母是嬉皮士，我们住在一个谷仓里，里面满是工匠，他们创造了最令人惊叹的银器、皮革和陶器

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新安置, 再配置, 放在新地方；[计] 再定位; 浮动
vocabulary.context: Both my brothers agreed that they were not able to pack up and relocate and loved the idea that I was willing - and ready - to do so.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的两个兄弟都同意他们无法收拾行李并搬迁，并且喜欢我愿意并且准备好这样做的想法

vocabulary.definition: n. 副本, 复本, 配对物, 相应物；[经] 副本, 正副二份中之一
vocabulary.context: As the days went by, the cons all got crossed out, replaced by counterparts on the pro side.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间一天天过去，反对的部分都被划掉了，取而代之的是赞成的部分

vocabulary.definition: n. 教授
vocabulary.context: My mom was a writer and my dad a professor who loved birds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的妈妈是一位作家，我的爸爸是一位喜爱鸟类的教授

vocabulary.definition: n. 尺蠖
vocabulary.context: From it he made an inchworm.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他用它制作了一条尺蠖

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 再折起；将…再打折
vocabulary.context: And when I reached the other end, I'd step off the square of canvas, and she'd fold it and push it this way and that way and refold it, and I would have this little log of clay again.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我到达另一端时，我会从画布的正方形上走下来，她会把它折叠起来，推来推去，然后重新折叠起来，我就会再次得到这块小小的粘土

vocabulary.definition: adv. 看, 视力, 视觉, 可见, 凭视力, 看到, 看得见, 光学, 形象化, 栩栩如生
vocabulary.context: Michael inspires others by leading sculpture workshops for children and adults, veterans and seniors, both sighted and visually impaired.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迈克尔通过领导为儿童和成人、退伍军人和老年人、视力正常和视障人士举办的雕塑研讨会来激励他人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 秘密的, 偷偷摸摸的, 分泌的, 促进分泌的
vocabulary.context: Every potter has their own source of clay, and when they find that clay, they're very secretive about it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个陶艺家都有自己的粘土来源，当他们找到粘土时，他们对此非常保密

vocabulary.definition: n. 横跨的一步, 台阶；v.t. 横跨一步躲避, 回避；v.i. 回避问题, 躲避打击
vocabulary.context: I would sidestep on this log of clay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我会避开这块粘土

vocabulary.definition: adv. 溺爱地, 怜爱地, 情柔地
vocabulary.context: Many people like to collect Michael's work, but Michael fondly remembers one special young "collector."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很多人喜欢收藏迈克尔的作品，但迈克尔深情地记得一位特别的年轻"收藏家"

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 损害, 减少, 削弱；[法] 损害, 伤害, 减少
vocabulary.context: Michael inspires others by leading sculpture workshops for children and adults, veterans and seniors, both sighted and visually impaired.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迈克尔通过领导为儿童和成人、退伍军人和老年人、视力正常和视障人士举办的雕塑研讨会来激励他人

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不平常的, 值得注意的, 显著的
vocabulary.context: Michael Naranjo is a Native American, a Vietnam War veteran, and "a sculptor who happens to be blind." Behind this statement lies a remarkable story.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迈克尔·纳兰霍 (Michael Naranjo) 是一位美洲原住民、越战老兵，也是"一位恰好失明的雕塑家"。这句话的背后，隐藏着一个非凡的故事

vocabulary.definition: n. 生物封存
vocabulary.context: Often covered from head to toe in a biocontainment suit, Callahan responds to disease disasters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡拉汉通常从头到脚都穿着生物防护服，应对疾病灾难

vocabulary.definition: n. 传染病学, 流行病学；[医] 流行病学
vocabulary.context: Callahan specializes in field epidemiology, which means he works directly with communities experiencing public health crises.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡拉汉专门研究现场流行病学，这意味着他直接与经历公共卫生危机的社区合作

vocabulary.definition: adj. 浮起的, 水传播的, 水运的
vocabulary.context: "I realized that it wasn't the earthquake or tsunami that's killing everybody, but it's the malaria, the dengue, and waterborne diseases that come afterward.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我意识到，杀死所有人的不是地震或海啸，而是随后出现的疟疾、登革热和水传播疾病

vocabulary.definition: adj. 药学的, 制药的, 药用的, 药物的, 药剂师的, 药师的；n. 药品, 成药, 药剂
vocabulary.context: Then, they communicate these findings to hospitals, government agencies, and pharmaceutical companies.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，他们将这些发现传达给医院、政府机构和制药公司

vocabulary.definition: n. [微]日冕形病毒,冠状病毒
vocabulary.context: In 2020, the world shut down as the infectious coronavirus spread.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2020年，随着传染性冠状病毒的传播，世界陷入停摆

vocabulary.definition: adj. （手）戴着手套的
vocabulary.context: Communities masked and gloved up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 社区戴着面具和手套

vocabulary.definition: n. 卫生保健, 卫生学, 保健法；[医] 卫生, 卫生学
vocabulary.context: In addition, they educate health care workers, investigate outbreaks of infection, and promote hygiene practices like hand washing to reduce infections and the spread of diseases.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此外，他们还对医护人员进行教育，调查感染爆发，并提倡洗手等卫生习惯，以减少感染和疾病传播

vocabulary.definition: n. 特性, 特征, 特色；adj. 特性的, 特有的, 有特色的；[计] 阶; 指数
vocabulary.context: Whether epidemiologists work at the scene of an outbreak, for the government, or in a laboratory, they share some common characteristics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论流行病学家是在疫情爆发现场、为政府工作还是在实验室工作，他们都有一些共同的特征

vocabulary.definition: n. 奴隶所有者
vocabulary.context: Thomas Jefferson wrote about "liberty and justice for all." He also was a slaveholder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 托马斯·杰斐逊 (Thomas Jefferson) 写过"人人享有自由和正义"。他也是一名奴隶主

vocabulary.definition: n. 杨树, 杨木；[医] 杨属植物(通常指白杨)
vocabulary.context: A woman named Hannah was one of the enslaved people who lived at Poplar Forest, a farm owned by Thomas Jefferson.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位名叫汉娜的妇女是居住在托马斯·杰斐逊拥有的农场白杨林的奴隶之一

vocabulary.definition: n. 主妇, 女管家
vocabulary.context: Jefferson, I signed my name "your humble Servant Hannah." I have always tried to be a good cook and housekeeper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊，我签下了我的名字"你谦卑的仆人汉娜"。我一直努力成为一名好厨师和管家

vocabulary.context: Jefferson held about 200 men, women, and children in bondage at any given time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊在任何特定时间都奴役了大约 200 名男人、女人和儿童

vocabulary.definition: n. 马背；adv. 在马背上, 骑在马上
vocabulary.context: He will travel on horseback over land and cross a river to get here.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他将骑马穿越陆地，渡河到达这里

vocabulary.definition: adj. 想像的, 虚构的, 假想的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 听听汉娜可能分享的这些想象中的记忆

vocabulary.definition: adj. 低下的, 谦逊的, 粗陋的；v.t. 使...卑下, 降低...地位, 贬抑
vocabulary.context: Jefferson, I signed my name "your humble Servant Hannah." I have always tried to be a good cook and housekeeper.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊，我签下了我的名字"你谦卑的仆人汉娜"。我一直努力成为一名好厨师和管家

vocabulary.definition: n. 家具, 帆具
vocabulary.context: I told him that his house and furniture were all safe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我告诉他，他的房子和家具都很安全

vocabulary.definition: n. 特效药, 特性；adj. 特殊的, 明确的, 具有特效的, 特定地, 具体地
vocabulary.context: ...special foods, and I have learned to prepare them. Many of the vegetables I serve him have been grown here following Mr. Jefferson's specific directions. My children - all 10 of them - either live with me here or at one of Mr. Jefferson's other plantations such as Monticello or Bear Creek. I see them as often as I can but I still miss them...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...特殊的食物，我学会了准备它们。我为他提供的许多蔬菜都是按照杰斐逊先生的具体指示在这里种植的。我的孩子们--全部十个--要么和我住在这里，要么住在杰斐逊先生的其他种植园之一，比如蒙蒂塞洛或熊溪。我尽可能经常见到他们，但我仍然想念他们......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无须的, 乳臭未干的
vocabulary.context: Surely her beardless face made the other soldiers wonder.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她那张没有胡子的脸无疑让其他士兵感到惊讶

vocabulary.definition: n. 纺纱工人, 旋床工人, 纺纱机, 机头罩, 旋转动作, (美)(非正式)卡车司机；[计] 微调控制项

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后她担任纺纱工和织布工

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她回到西点军校，在一次侦察行军中，她的一小队士兵与巡逻的效忠派发生了冲突

vocabulary.definition: n. 侦察, 勘察队；[电] 勘查
vocabulary.context: She was back in West Point, when, during a reconnaissance march, her small group of soldiers clashed with patrolling Loyalists.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她回到西点军校，在一次侦察行军中，她的一小队士兵与巡逻的效忠派发生了冲突

vocabulary.definition: adv. 想象上, 看上去像, 被认为是, 恐怕, 按照推测
vocabulary.context: He was supposedly lost at sea when Deborah was five years old, and Deborah's mother was unable to care for the family on her own.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 据称，他在黛博拉五岁时在海上失踪，黛博拉的母亲无法独自照顾家庭

vocabulary.context: She didn't have to worry about undressing because soldiers wore the same clothes from one day to the next, and opportunities to bathe were rare.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她不用担心脱衣服，因为士兵们日复一日地穿着同样的衣服，洗澡的机会也很少

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 卸下, 放出, 解雇, 拔染, 履行, 放电；v.i. 卸货, 流出；n. 卸货, 流出, 放电

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那时，战争已经结束，许多士兵已经退役

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 征募, 参与, 谋取；v.i. 从军, 应募, 赞助
vocabulary.context: She enlisted as "Robert Shurtliff " (also spelled "Shurtleff " and "Shurtlieff).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她入伍时的名字是"Robert Shurtliff"（也拼写为"Shurtleff"和"Shurtlieff"）

vocabulary.definition: adv. 正式地, 形式上
vocabulary.context: Most girls were not formally educated before the 1800s.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大多数女孩在 1800 年代之前没有接受过正规教育

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1992年，在台顶边缘发现窑炉

vocabulary.definition: n. 凹室, 壁龛, 小亭
vocabulary.context: Through the falling snow, they saw "a magnificent city" built into the alcove of the mesa across the canyon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 透过飘落的雪花，他们看到了横跨峡谷的台地凹室中建造的"一座宏伟的城市"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 敬畏的, 畏惧的
vocabulary.context: Still, they were awestruck by their view of clear outlines of walls, towers, windows, and doorways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，他们还是对墙壁、塔楼、窗户和门口的清晰轮廓感到惊叹

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1888 年 12 月 18 日，理查德·韦瑟里尔 (Richard Wetherill) 和他的妹夫查尔斯·梅森 (Charles Mason) 正在寻找流浪牛

vocabulary.definition: n. 佛得角（塞内加尔西部）

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 自从普韦布洛悬崖居民的祖先离开今天科罗拉多州的梅萨维德以来，已经过去了近 600 年

vocabulary.definition: n. 阶地, 梯田, 房屋之平顶, 阳台, 沿岸防地, 露台；adj. 叠层式的；v.t. 使成梯田, 使成有平台屋顶

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了悬崖住宅外，公园还包括水库、水坝和农田

vocabulary.definition: n. 住处；[医] 住房
vocabulary.context: The two men had found one of the largest cliff dwellings in North America.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这两个人发现了北美最大的悬崖住宅之一。 【04】接下来暴君老公登场，

vocabulary.definition: n. 大纲, 轮廓, 概要；v.t. 描画轮廓, 描述要点；n. 大纲, 分级, 轮廓；[计] 大纲, 分级, 轮廓
vocabulary.context: Still, they were awestruck by their view of clear outlines of walls, towers, windows, and doorways.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，他们还是对墙壁、塔楼、窗户和门口的清晰轮廓感到惊叹

vocabulary.definition: adj. 文化的, 教养的, 修养的；[医] 培养的
vocabulary.context: Other cultural sites can be viewed from overlooks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 可以从观景台观赏其他文化遗址

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全页的, 轰动的, 重要的, 头版的, 整版的
vocabulary.context: Harper's Weekly , a magazine with over 100,000 subscribers, put a full-page drawing of Ida on the cover of its July 31, 1869, issue.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 拥有超过 100,000 名订阅者的《哈珀周刊》在 1869 年 7 月 31 日的封面上刊登了艾达的整版图画

vocabulary.definition: adj. 救命的, 救生用的
vocabulary.context: She and her younger brother Hosea pushed their lifesaving skiff into the surf.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她和弟弟何西阿将救生船推入海浪中

vocabulary.definition: n. 小艇, 轻舟, 小型帆船
vocabulary.context: She and her younger brother Hosea pushed their lifesaving skiff into the surf.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她和弟弟何西阿将救生船推入海浪中

vocabulary.definition: n. 帆船
vocabulary.context: When they neared the overturned sailboat, Ida maneuvered the skiff so that the back, or stern, faced the men.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他们接近翻倒的帆船时，艾达操纵小船，使船尾或船尾面向船员

vocabulary.definition: adv. 搁浅地, 地面上
vocabulary.context: Its purpose was to prevent ships from running aground on the rocky little island as they sailed toward Newport Harbor, only a few hundred yards away.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其目的是防止船只在驶向仅数百码外的纽波特港时在这座岩石小岛上搁浅

vocabulary.definition: adj. 恐慌的, 惊慌失措的；[法] 恐慌的, 由恐慌引起的
vocabulary.context: Ida was able to drag the panicky girls into her skiff and bring them safely ashore.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾达成功地将惊慌失措的女孩们拖进小船并安全地带上岸

vocabulary.definition: n. 墓石, 墓碑；[经] 墓碑, 墓志铭
vocabulary.context: She collected money from her schoolmates and bought a tombstone engraved with an anchor and two oars.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她向同学们凑钱，买了一块刻有锚和两支桨的墓碑
