vocabulary.context: Many of the richest families in the country owned summer estates in Newport.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该国许多最富有的家庭都在纽波特拥有夏季庄园

vocabulary.definition: n. 球场管理员, 大花园的园丁

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她通常会在晚上带着食物回家，比如纯素烤宽面条、纯素通心粉和奶酪、蔬菜和辣羽衣甘蓝--周五是中国菜--男孩们会很高兴看到她，闻到食物飘进屋里的香味

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果莫纳罗亚山和珠穆朗玛峰并排放置，莫纳罗亚山会更高！

vocabulary.definition: n. 煤渣, 灰烬；[化] 炉渣; 熔渣; 煤渣; 矿渣; 粗灰
vocabulary.context: Shield volcanoes, stratovolcanoes, and cinder cone volcanoes are three of the main types.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盾状火山、成层火山和渣锥火山是三种主要类型

vocabulary.definition: adj. 炽热的, 热烈的, 激烈的
vocabulary.context: Perhaps you imagine red-hot lava spewing from the top or gushing down the sides.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 也许您会想象炽热的熔岩从顶部喷出或从侧面喷涌而下

vocabulary.definition: n. 顶点, 最高阶层, 最高级会议；adj. 政府首脑的, 最高级的
vocabulary.context: These volcanoes are tall and may have pointed, snow-covered summits.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些火山很高，可能有尖的、白雪覆盖的山顶

vocabulary.definition: n. 液体, 分泌液, 流体；adj. 流动的, 可改变的
vocabulary.context: Shield volcanoes, stratovolcanoes, and cinder cone volcanoes all bring magma, hot fluid from inside the earth, to the surface as lava which hardens into rock.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 盾状火山、成层火山和渣锥火山都将岩浆（来自地球内部的热流体）以熔岩的形式带到地表，然后硬化成岩石

vocabulary.definition: adj. 毁灭性的, (非正式)很好的, 引人注目的
vocabulary.context: Mount Vesuvius, which buried the ancient city of Pompeii in 79 CE is a stratovolcano, and so is Krakatoa in Indonesia which had a devastating eruption in 1883.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 公元79年掩埋了庞贝古城的维苏威火山是一座成层火山，印度尼西亚的喀拉喀托也是一座成层火山，1883年发生了毁灭性的喷发

vocabulary.definition: adj. 暴力的, 猛烈的, 激烈的, 极端的, 凶暴的
vocabulary.context: The eruption was so violent and blew away so much dirt and rock that Mount St.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 火山喷发非常猛烈，吹走了如此多的泥土和岩石，圣约翰山被喷发了

vocabulary.definition: n. [地]叠层 ( 石 )
vocabulary.context: A stack of cyanobacteria layers is called a stromatolite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蓝藻层的堆叠被称为叠层石

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可以吸入的, 适宜于吸入的
vocabulary.context: What kind of life could survive a water world without breathable air?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 什么样的生命能够在没有呼吸空气的水世界中生存？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 食肉的
vocabulary.context: No, it wouldn't be meat-eating dinosaurs - they didn't show up until much, much later.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不，这不会是食肉恐龙--它们直到很久很久以后才出现

vocabulary.definition: adj. 从前的
vocabulary.context: Life as we know it today wouldn't exist without those long-ago bacteria.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果没有那些很久以前的细菌，我们今天所知道的生命就不会存在

vocabulary.definition: n. 氮；[化] 氮N-2
vocabulary.context: Our atmosphere today is a mixture of gasses, including nitrogen and oxygen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天我们的大气是多种气体的混合物，包括氮气和氧气

vocabulary.definition: n. 二氧化物；[医] 二氧化物
vocabulary.context: But 3 billion years ago, the atmosphere was full of carbon dioxide and methane.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但30亿年前，大气中充满了二氧化碳和甲烷

vocabulary.definition: n. 丛, 块, 笨重的脚步声；[计] 丛
vocabulary.context: We can also see some ancient cyanobacteria today, in layered rocks called stromatolites. Cyanobacteria often clump together. Their stickiness traps bits of minerals, rocks, and soil into layers. The layers build up and up. Over time, the layers turn to rock. A stack of cyanobacteria layers is called a stromatolite....
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天我们还可以在称为叠层石的层状岩石中看到一些古老的蓝细菌。蓝藻经常聚集在一起。它们的粘性将矿物质、岩石和土壤的碎片捕获成层。层层堆积。随着时间的推移，这些层会变成岩石。一堆蓝藻层被称为叠层石......

vocabulary.definition: n. 大气, 空气, 气氛；[医] 大气; 大气压
vocabulary.context: Our atmosphere today is a mixture of gasses, including nitrogen and oxygen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 今天我们的大气是多种气体的混合物，包括氮气和氧气

vocabulary.definition: n. 西方人, 西部片, 西部小说；adj. 向西方的, 来自西方的, 西方的, 西洋的, 西部的
vocabulary.context: If you visit the shallow waters of Hamlin Pool in Western Australia, you can see stromatolites.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你参观西澳大利亚哈姆林池的浅水区，你可以看到叠层石

vocabulary.definition: adj. 动作缓慢的, 滞销的
vocabulary.context: Mauna Loa is a slow-moving volcano in Hawaii.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫纳罗亚火山是夏威夷的一座缓慢移动的火山

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新寄送, 使改道, 使改方向；[计] 重定向, 重新引导
vocabulary.context: They dropped 20 bombs to try and redirect the flow.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们投掷了 20 枚炸弹，试图改变人流方向

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使窒息, 噎住, 闷熄；v.i. 闷死, 窒息, 受阻
vocabulary.context: It can cause people to suffocate.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它会导致人窒息

vocabulary.definition: n. 山崩；[化] 滑坡
vocabulary.context: Landslides can bury everything in their path.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 山体滑坡可以掩埋其路径上的一切

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使人口聚居在...中, 殖民于, 移民于, 居住于, 定居于
vocabulary.context: Detonating bombs in a populated area isn't a good way to keep people safe!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在人口稠密地区引爆炸弹并不是保证人们安全的好方法！

vocabulary.definition: n. 管, 软管, 隧道；v.t. 把...装管, 使通过管子；[计] 管子
vocabulary.context: They hoped explosions from bombs could collapse the lava tubes (the places where lava flows inside of a hardened lava shell), as well as channels where the lava flowed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们希望炸弹的爆炸能够摧毁熔岩管（熔岩在坚硬的熔岩壳内流动的地方）以及熔岩流动的通道

vocabulary.definition: n. 抽水机, 打气筒, 泵, 抽吸；v.t. 用唧筒抽水, 打气, 盘问, 倾注, 使疲惫；v.i. 抽水, 上下(或往复)运动
vocabulary.context: They pumped seawater from around the island directly onto the lava.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们将岛屿周围的海水直接抽到熔岩上

vocabulary.definition: n. 爆发, 激增, 爆炸(声)；[化] 爆炸
vocabulary.context: They hoped explosions from bombs could collapse the lava tubes (the places where lava flows inside of a hardened lava shell), as well as channels where the lava flowed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们希望炸弹的爆炸能够摧毁熔岩管（熔岩在坚硬的熔岩壳内流动的地方）以及熔岩流动的通道

vocabulary.definition: adj. 成功的, 一帆风顺的, 顺利的；[经] 成功的
vocabulary.context: Using seawater to stop lava was mostly successful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 使用海水阻止熔岩基本上是成功的

vocabulary.definition: n. 气象员；天气预报员
vocabulary.context: He remembered what the TV weatherman had said when he spoke last month at the school assembly: "If you hear that siren, head for shelter immediately."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他记得电视天气预报员上个月在学校集会上发言时说过的话："如果你听到警报声，请立即前往避难所。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 干草列, 被风吹集于一处之落叶,狭长的一行
vocabulary.context: The windrow of poplars was gone and debris littered the yard, but the house still stood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 成堆的杨树不见了，院子里散落着瓦砾，但房子仍然矗立着

vocabulary.definition: adj. 闷热的
vocabulary.context: The siren's wail pierced the muggy afternoon and echoed off the Ozark hills.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 海妖的嚎叫声划破了闷热的午后，在奥扎克山上回响

vocabulary.definition: n. 目的, 缘故, 理由
vocabulary.context: "Sakes alive!" Mrs. Laney's face, white with fear, appeared over the edge of the tub. "That was a tornado!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "还活着！"莱尼夫人的脸因恐惧而惨白，出现在浴缸的边缘。 "那是龙卷风！"

vocabulary.definition: n. 缉捕罪犯的人, 地籍册；[法] 地籍册
vocabulary.context: He scooped up the terrier and pushed open the back door.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他抱起小猎犬，推开后门

vocabulary.definition: n. 关节炎；[医] 关节炎
vocabulary.context: With her arthritis, she probably couldn't walk down to the storm cellar in time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于患有关节炎，她可能无法及时走到防风地窖

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使茫然, 使发昏, 使眼花缭乱；n. 迷乱, 眼花缭乱
vocabulary.context: Dazed, he raised his head.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他茫然地抬起头

vocabulary.definition: n. 心碌, 挤, 推, 拥挤喧嚷；v.t. 催促, 乱挤活动, 硬逼, 强夺；v.i. 赶紧, 硬挤过去
vocabulary.context: "Don't you hustle me, boy," she said, but she hobbled along beside him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "别催我，孩子，"她说，但她在他身边一瘸一拐地走着

vocabulary.definition: n. 吸烟者, 吸烟的人, 吸烟车厢, (美)(非正式)蒸汽火车头
vocabulary.context: "The other car is a smoker," she told the white conductor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "另一辆车是吸烟者，"她告诉白人售票员

vocabulary.definition: n. 膳宿, 预订铺位, 适应性调节, 调和, 贷款；[医] 调节(眼); 适应
vocabulary.context: It determined that the "smoking car was a first-class coach for colored people," thereby providing separate but equal accommodations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它确定"吸烟车厢是有色人种的一流车厢"，从而提供单独但平等的住宿

vocabulary.definition: adj. 最好的, 第一流的, 优秀的；adv. 最好地, 第一流地, 优秀地
vocabulary.context: Ida sat in the first-class ladies' coach and opened her book.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾达坐在头等女士车厢里，打开了她的书

vocabulary.definition: n. 领导者, 指挥者, 售票员, 向导；[化] 导体
vocabulary.context: Minutes later the conductor collected passengers' tickets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 几分钟后，售票员领取了乘客的车票

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 微微移动；v.t. 推动；n. 羔羊皮
vocabulary.context: Having paid for a first-class ticket, Ida refused to budge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 支付了头等舱机票后，艾达拒绝让步

vocabulary.definition: adj. 勇敢的, 大胆的, 有胆量的
vocabulary.context: In speaking about the courageous woman who went before her, Rosa Parks said, "Ida B.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在谈到这位在她之前的勇敢女性时，罗莎·帕克斯 (Rosa Parks) 说道："艾达·B.

vocabulary.definition: n. 传染病, 流行病；adj. 流行的, 传染性的
vocabulary.context: While she was away from home visiting her grandmother, a yellow-fever epidemic raged through Holly Springs, killing her mother, father, and infant brother.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她离家探望祖母时，霍利斯普林斯爆发了黄热病疫情，夺去了她的母亲、父亲和尚在襁褓中的弟弟的生命

vocabulary.definition: adv. 因此
vocabulary.context: It determined that the "smoking car was a first-class coach for colored people," thereby providing separate but equal accommodations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它确定"吸烟车厢是有色人种的一流车厢"，从而提供单独但平等的住宿

vocabulary.definition: n. 资金筹集活动; 筹款人
vocabulary.context: And we want to hold a fundraiser in a high school and middle school in our school district to get more funds for buying books.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们想在我们学区的高中和初中举办筹款活动，以筹集更多资金购买书籍

vocabulary.definition: n. 主人公, 主角, 领导者
vocabulary.context: We have compiled a list of books on our website that includes strong Muslim female protagonists, ranging from early books to young adult and adult fiction.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们在网站上编制了一份书籍清单，其中包括强大的穆斯林女性主角，从早期书籍到青少年和成人小说

vocabulary.definition: adj. 货币的, 金钱的；[经] 货币的, 金融的
vocabulary.context: We have also received monetary donations from neighbors, friends, and other organizations, and authors have even got involved by donating copies of their own books with female Muslim main characters.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们还收到了邻居、朋友和其他组织的捐款，作者甚至捐赠了自己的以穆斯林女性为主角的书籍

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能用语言表达的, 不可名状的, 莫名其妙的
vocabulary.context: The feeling that we experienced when reading about characters like us was indescribable and we were astonished that we never experienced it before.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当我们读到像我们这样的人物时，我们所经历的感觉是难以形容的，我们很惊讶我们以前从未经历过这种感觉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 凭灵感的, 鼓舞人心的, 神感的
vocabulary.context: And in our spare time, we are writing our own book about 50 great Muslim women who have achieved inspirational things.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在业余时间，我们正在写自己的书，讲述 50 位取得了鼓舞人心的成就的伟大穆斯林女性

vocabulary.definition: n. 清真寺
vocabulary.context: Now, we hope to get our books into other schools around the community and present our endeavor to mosques.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，我们希望将我们的书籍带到社区的其他学校，并向清真寺展示我们的努力

vocabulary.definition: n. 努力, 尽力；v.i. 努力, 尽力
vocabulary.context: Now, we hope to get our books into other schools around the community and present our endeavor to mosques.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在，我们希望将我们的书籍带到社区的其他学校，并向清真寺展示我们的努力

vocabulary.definition: n. 不足, 缺乏；[化] 缺额
vocabulary.context: Later, we began to realize that the same thing was happening in other genres, too - that there was a shortage of books about Muslim girls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 后来，我们开始意识到，同样的事情也发生在其他类型中--关于穆斯林女孩的书籍短缺

vocabulary.definition: n. 冲击, 冲突, 影响, 效果；v.t. 挤入, 撞击, 压紧, 对...发生影响
vocabulary.context: Books have an immense impact on how children behave, socialize, and see themselves in the world, and if young kids don't see themselves represented, there is a certain feeling of not belonging or not fitting in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 书籍对孩子们的行为方式、社交方式以及如何看待自己在这个世界上有着巨大的影响，如果年幼的孩子看不到自己的代表，就会有一种不归属感或不融入的感觉

vocabulary.definition: n. 爷爷, 老太爷, 外公
vocabulary.context: My nana and grandad had tip-toed their way into the living room like spies, peeking their head around the corner from the kitchen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我的奶奶和爷爷像间谍一样蹑手蹑脚地走进客厅，从厨房的拐角处偷看

vocabulary.definition: adv. 坚忍地；恬淡寡欲地
vocabulary.context: A tall bearded Black man and a caramel-colored teenage girl were in shiny silver uniforms. They both cradled thick wooden planks. Lauren was up first. She sprung up and marched forward. I blinked. Crack! The wooden plank stood no chance. Lauren bowed stoically.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名高大、留着胡须的黑人男子和一名焦糖色的少女穿着闪亮的银色制服。他们俩都抱着厚厚的木板。劳伦第一个站起来。她一跃而起，大步向前走去。我眨了眨眼。裂缝！木板根本没有机会。劳伦坚忍地鞠了一躬

vocabulary.definition: n. 在外面野餐的郊游
vocabulary.context: "You know you Black right?" she finally replied, and then she busted out with a Black cookout laugh.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你认识布莱克吧？"她终于回答了，然后带着黑人野餐般的笑声爆发了

vocabulary.definition: n. 男式浅顶软呢帽
vocabulary.context: I saw my nana's mini-afro and my grandad's fedora before they fully revealed themselves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我奶奶的迷你爆炸头和我爷爷的软呢帽完全暴露之前，我看到了他们

vocabulary.definition: n. 后房, 密室；adj. 在密室中的
vocabulary.context: He approached me and asked to go into the backroom to talk.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他走近我，要求到里屋谈话

vocabulary.definition: n. 晶石, 圆材, 拳斗, 争论；v.t. 装圆材于；v.i. 拳斗, 争论
vocabulary.context: It was time for sparring.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 到了陪练的时间了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 瘦长的
vocabulary.context: I was unsure my toothpick arms and lanky limbs would come in handy here.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我不确定我的牙签臂和瘦长的四肢在这里会派上用场

vocabulary.definition: adv. 按自然规律, 完全地, 实际上, 真正地, 身体上地
vocabulary.context: But my toothpick shaped arms, my inability to physically multi-task, and my badly-timed laughter skewed me away from sports.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但我的牙签状手臂、身体上无法同时处理多项任务以及不合时宜的笑声使我远离了运动

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未精制的, 未提炼的, 不高尚的, 粗俗的, 不优雅的；[化] 未精制的
vocabulary.context: Medicine was considered too unrefined and intimate for women, and they were often criticized for considering such a career.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 医学被认为对女性来说过于粗俗和私密，她们经常因为考虑这样的职业而受到批评

vocabulary.definition: n. 附录, 附加物, 阑尾；[化] 增补
vocabulary.context: In the late 1800s, before Jamestown had any hospitals, she brought nine-year-old Lizzie Stuff to her home to treat her ruptured appendix.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1800 年代末，詹姆斯敦还没有医院之前，她带着 9 岁的莉齐·斯塔夫 (Lizzie Stuff) 到家里治疗她破裂的阑尾

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 重新进货, 再储存
vocabulary.context: Wink restocked her medical bag, packed her sleigh with food and blankets, and hitched up her best horses.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 温克重新装满了她的医疗包，在她的雪橇上装满了食物和毯子，并套上了她最好的马

vocabulary.definition: adj. 栗色的；n. 栗色, 栗色动物, 三岁雄鹿, 酸模, 酢浆草
vocabulary.context: She even broke her own team of strong, young sorrel horses so she could answer her patients' calls in any kind of weather.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她甚至驯服了自己的一群强壮的年轻栗色马，这样她就可以在任何天气下接听病人的电话

vocabulary.definition: n. 马术
vocabulary.context: She had learned horsemanship and could drive a team of horses well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她学过马术，能很好地驾驭一队马

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解开...的套具, 放松
vocabulary.context: One day while unhitching her buggy, she met Mathias Wink, a local teamster who sometimes worked at the stable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，她在解开马车时遇到了马蒂亚斯·温克（Mathias Wink），一位当地的卡车司机，有时在马厩工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 联畜运输车驾驶者, 卡车驾驶员；[法] 卡车驾驶员, 运输工会会员, 驾驶一队牲畜者
vocabulary.context: One day while unhitching her buggy, she met Mathias Wink, a local teamster who sometimes worked at the stable.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一天，她在解开马车时遇到了马蒂亚斯·温克（Mathias Wink），一位当地的卡车司机，有时在马厩工作

vocabulary.definition: n. 病痛, 疾病；[医] 疾病
vocabulary.context: Wink became skilled in treating many kinds of ailments.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 温克擅长治疗多种疾病

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 解除武装, 废除军备；[法] 解除对...军事管制, 使非军事化
vocabulary.context: The three-mile ring was more of a "demilitarized zone" between the Colonists and the Indians, Morris said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫里斯说，这个三英里长的环更像是殖民者和印第安人之间的"非军事区"

vocabulary.definition: pron. 不管是谁, 无论是谁
vocabulary.context: David Morris, project director for Newport News Waterworks, disputes the meaning of the 1677 treaty, which states: " Noe English shall seate or plant nearer than three miles of any Indian Towne; and whosoever hath made or shall make any encroachment upon their lands shall be removed from thence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纽波特纽斯自来水厂项目总监大卫·莫里斯对 1677 年条约的含义提出质疑，该条约规定："诺英吉利人应在距离任何印第安城镇三英里以内的地方定居或种植；任何已经或将要侵犯其土地的人都应从那里被驱逐

vocabulary.definition: n. 盐性, 盐度；[化] 盐度
vocabulary.context: He fears the withdrawal of all that fresh water would raise the salinity of the river and destroy the shad spawning ground, along with the tribe's hatchery plans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他担心所有淡水的抽取会提高河流的盐度并破坏鲥鱼产卵场以及部落的孵化计划

vocabulary.definition: n. 供水系统, 自来水厂, 喷泉, 眼泪
vocabulary.context: David Morris, project director for Newport News Waterworks, disputes the meaning of the 1677 treaty, which states: " Noe English shall seate or plant nearer than three miles of any Indian Towne; and whosoever hath made or shall make any encroachment upon their lands shall be removed from thence.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 纽波特纽斯自来水厂项目总监大卫·莫里斯对 1677 年条约的含义提出质疑，该条约规定："诺英吉利人应在距离任何印第安城镇三英里以内的地方定居或种植；任何已经或将要侵犯其土地的人都应从那里被驱逐

vocabulary.definition: n. 泛音, 暗示, 弦外之音, 折光的色彩；[医] 陪音, 泛音
vocabulary.context: They resent the David-vs.-Goliath, white-vs.-Indian overtones the issue has acquired.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们对这个问题已经出现的大卫与歌利亚、白人与印度的暗示感到不满

vocabulary.definition: n. 缓冲器, 缓冲区；v.t. 缓冲；[计] 缓冲区, 缓冲器
vocabulary.context: The Indians contend that part of the dam would encroach on that three-mile buffer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 印第安人认为，大坝的一部分将侵占那条三英里的缓冲区

vocabulary.definition: n. 调整者, 校准者, 校准器, 调整器, 标准钟；[化] 调节剂; 调节器
vocabulary.context: Army Corps of Engineers and state regulators - would flood more than 400 acres of wetlands, where Carl Custalow said the Mattaponi camped 8,000 years ago and left tools and other artifacts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 陆军工程兵团和州监管机构将淹没超过 400 英亩的湿地，卡尔·库斯塔洛 (Carl Custalow) 表示，马塔波尼人 8,000 年前曾在此露营，并留下了工具和其他文物

vocabulary.definition: adj. 潮汐的, 受潮汐影响的
vocabulary.context: There may be fewer lanterns on the river today, but the several dozen tribe members left on Custalow's tiny reservation are clinging to a tradition they consider vital to their heritage: shad fishing in the tidal river that flows into the Chesapeake Bay.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，河上的灯笼可能少了，但留在库斯塔洛狭小保留地的几十名部落成员仍然坚持着他们认为对自己的遗产至关重要的传统：在流入切萨皮克湾的潮汐河流中捕捞鲱鱼

vocabulary.definition: n. 转移；[医] 转向
vocabulary.context: The Indians fear the diversion would make the tidal river too salty for the shad to spawn there.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 印第安人担心改道会使潮汐河变得太咸，导致鲥鱼无法在那里产卵

vocabulary.definition: v. 展开, 配置

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被部署到科威特，一个位于中东地区的国家

vocabulary.definition: n. 智能手机

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过智能手机上的 FaceTime 与父母交谈帮助他缓解了压力

vocabulary.definition: n. 闲谈；v.i. 闲谈, 聊天

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 丹尼尔和伊莎贝拉在父母不在的时候每隔几天就会和他们聊天

vocabulary.definition: n. 单位, 分队, 部队, 单元, 部件, 装置；adj. 单位的, 单元的；[计] 单元常数; 部件

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的陆军部队被派往科威特，以防需要协助其他国家的军事行动

vocabulary.definition: interj. 再见

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2016年7月，10岁的丹尼尔·戈麦斯和他5岁的妹妹伊莎贝拉告别了爸爸妈妈

vocabulary.definition: n. 帮助, 协助；v.t. 帮助, 促进；v.i. 协助, 参加

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们的陆军部队被派往科威特，以防需要协助其他国家的军事行动

vocabulary.context: Talking to his parents on FaceTime on his smartphone helped him deal with the stress.

vocabulary.context: Shockingly, the FBI closed the case in 1968 without arresting the four men.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 令人震惊的是，联邦调查局于 1968 年结案，但没有逮捕这四名男子

vocabulary.definition: v. 重开, 再开始, 再开

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 联邦调查局于2000年重新审理此案

vocabulary.definition: n. 轰炸, 投弹

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 直到 1963 年 9 月 15 日星期日，爆炸事件中没有人丧生

vocabulary.context: Finally the FBI discovered that the bombers were four members of the Ku Klux Klan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最终联邦调查局发现，炸弹袭击者是三K党的四名成员

vocabulary.definition: n. 监禁, 下狱, 坐牢；[法] 监禁, 徒刑, 拘禁
vocabulary.context: Both received sentences of life imprisonment.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 两人均被判处无期徒刑

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 目击者称，炸弹导致女孩们"像布娃娃一样"在空中飞翔。爆炸还在墙上撕开了一个七英尺宽的洞

vocabulary.definition: n. 囚犯, 罪犯；v.t. 宣告有罪, 使知罪

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的努力帮助该组织的领导人定罪

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 描绘...的轮廓, 描绘, 描写
vocabulary.context: Wilberforce expressed what one imagines was a very common view: 'All private exertions for such an object become their character, but for ladies to meet, to go from house to house stirring up petitions - these appear to me proceedings unsuited to the female character as delineated in Scripture'.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威尔伯福斯表达了人们想象中的一种非常普遍的观点："所有为这样的目标而进行的私人努力都成为她们的性格，但对于女士们来说，聚会、挨家挨户煽动请愿--在我看来，这些程序不适合圣经中所描述的女性性格"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不适宜的, 不适合的, 不适当的

vocabulary.context: Hannah More also wrote a poem called Slavery, a Poem, which was published as a large, handsomely printed, 20-page book.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 汉娜·莫尔还写了一首诗，名为《奴隶制，一首诗》，以一本印刷精美的 20 页大书出版

vocabulary.context: Wilberforce expressed what one imagines was a very common view: 'All private exertions for such an object become their character, but for ladies to meet, to go from house to house stirring up petitions - these appear to me proceedings unsuited to the female character as delineated in Scripture'.

vocabulary.contextTranslation: "部分答案是杂酚油灌木丛，"他说

vocabulary.definition: n. 全部, 完整；adj. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的；adv. 完全地, 整整, 十分；v.t. 把(衣服等)缝得宽松, 漂洗；[计] 完整
vocabulary.context: Alfalfa blossoms appeared to grow fuller and bluer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 苜蓿花似乎长得更饱满、更蓝

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我努力寻找词语来表达一种复杂的感觉，直到那一刻我什至没有想到过这种感觉

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你听到过湍急的河流的咆哮声吗？

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 苏族人站起来反对一个名为达科他管道（DAPL）的项目

vocabulary.context: Its route would travel under a Missouri River reservoir called Lake Oahe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其路线将在密苏里河一个名为奥赫湖的水库下方行驶

vocabulary.context: Called Water Protectors, they seek to cut back on water waste and pollution.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们被称为水保护者，致力于减少水资源浪费和污染

vocabulary.context: Water Protectors argue that it will harm the environment and violate Indigenous sovereignty.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 水保护者认为这会损害环境并侵犯原住民主权

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 专门成立了一个专门的团队来保护水道

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 无论您对石油管道持何种立场，有一件事是明确的：水对于地球上的生命至关重要

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 目前，DAPL正在进行环境审查

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 水保护者认为这会损害环境并侵犯原住民主权

vocabulary.definition: n. 身分低微之老妇, 糖果, 姥姥；adj. 感伤的, 伪善的；interj. 太好了
vocabulary.context: Our neighbors will also send their children to us with plates of goodies, such as pudding and fried meat-filled pastries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的邻居也会给他们的孩子送来一盘盘好吃的东西，比如布丁和煎肉糕点

vocabulary.context: A half-hour before the first light appears, I wake my husband and older children, and we eat a meal that must take our bodies through the whole day.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在第一道曙光出现前的半小时，我叫醒了我的丈夫和年龄较大的孩子，我们吃的一顿饭必须让我们的身体度过一整天

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 加长, 使延长；v.i. 变长
vocabulary.context: We say special prayers in the mosque or at home and try to perfect and lengthen our regular five day prayers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们在清真寺或家里进行特别祈祷，并尝试完善和延长我们定期的五天祈祷

vocabulary.definition: n. 肉, 餐, 食物；[经] 肉类
vocabulary.context: After a month of fasting, eating is a big part of the day, with special foods like rich meats, fluffy breads, and sweets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 禁食一个月后，饮食成为一天的重要组成部分，包括丰富的肉类、松软的面包和糖果等特殊食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 油酥点心, 面粉糕饼

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的邻居也会给他们的孩子送来一盘盘好吃的东西，比如布丁和煎肉糕点

vocabulary.definition: adj. 精力充沛的, 积极的
vocabulary.context: Everyone begins to feel more energetic.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个人都开始感觉更有活力

vocabulary.definition: num. 第九, 九分之一
vocabulary.context: The month starts when the crescent moon of the ninth Islamic month appears.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当伊斯兰教第九个月的新月出现时，月份开始

vocabulary.definition: num. 三十, 三十个
vocabulary.context: Every day for the following twenty-nine or thirty days, Muslims everywhere in the world observe the fast.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在接下来的二十九天或三十天里，世界各地的穆斯林每天都守斋

vocabulary.definition: n. 控制, 管理, 克制, 控制器, 操纵装置；v.t. 控制, 操纵, 抑制；[计] 控制; 控制器
vocabulary.context: We observe the fast because in our holy book, the Qur'an (kor AHN), God, whom Muslims call Allah, tells us that fasting will teach us to control ourselves and to obey Him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们遵守斋戒，因为在我们的圣书《古兰经》（kor AHN）中，穆斯林称之为安拉的真主告诉我们，斋戒会教导我们控制自己并服从他

vocabulary.definition: n. 小妖, 小鬼, 妖精；[计] 子图形; 子画面
vocabulary.context: Night woke to blush; the sprite was gone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 夜醒脸红；精灵消失了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无脏污的, 无缺点的, 无可挑剔的

vocabulary.definition: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；adj. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
vocabulary.context: An angel, robed in spotless white,

vocabulary.definition: adj. 抵抗的, 排斥的, 令人讨厌的, 防水的；n. 防水布, 防护剂
vocabulary.context: When a tree is being eaten by bugs, it makes chemicals to shoo them away, sort of like bug repellent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当一棵树被虫子吃掉时，它会产生化学物质来将它们赶走，有点像驱虫剂

vocabulary.definition: n. 树苗, 小树
vocabulary.context: "Take some extra food," a mother tree says to young saplings.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "多吃一些食物，"母树对小树苗说

vocabulary.definition: n. 桦树, 桦木, 桦条；[医] 桦
vocabulary.context: In the fall, paper birch trees drop their leaves and can no longer make sugar.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 秋天，纸桦树的叶子落光，不能再制糖

vocabulary.definition: n. 地图, 天体图, 映像；v.t. 映射, 绘制...地图, 计划；[计] 实用程序, 映射, 制造自动化协议
vocabulary.context: In 2019, one team mapped the underground networks of 28,000 tree species in more than 70 countries.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2019年，一个团队绘制了70多个国家28,000种树种的地下网络

vocabulary.definition: n. 蘑菇形物, 蘑菇, 暴发户；v.i. 迅速生长, 迅速增加, 采蘑菇；adj. 蘑菇形的, 迅速生长的
vocabulary.context: Of course, trees don't really talk in words, but they do communicate - with the help of mushrooms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当然，树木并不真正用语言说话，但它们确实在蘑菇的帮助下进行交流

vocabulary.definition: n. 警告, 预告, 预兆, 通知；[法] 警告, 警戒, 预告; 警告的, 注意的
vocabulary.context: Trees do more than share warnings through the hyphae.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 树木不仅仅是通过菌丝分享警告

vocabulary.definition: n. 绰号, 昵称；v.t. 给...取绰号, 叫错名字；[计] 绰号
vocabulary.context: (The "world wide web" is one nickname for the Internet.) A scientist named Suzanne Simard discovered it in 1997.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: （"万维网"是互联网的昵称。）一位名叫 Suzanne Simard 的科学家于 1997 年发现了它

vocabulary.definition: n. 发射, 放任, 放纵；adj. 宽松的, 松的, 宽的, 不牢固的, 散漫的, 自由的, 不精确的；v.t. 释放, 放枪, 开船；v.i. 变松, 开火；adv. 松散地
vocabulary.context: It's a bit like seeing a post on your friend's online story that a strange dog is loose in the neighborhood, so you know to watch out.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这有点像在你朋友的网上故事中看到一条帖子，说附近有一只奇怪的狗，所以你知道要小心

vocabulary.definition: adj. 附近的, 近旁的；adv. 在附近, 近旁地；prep. 在...附近
vocabulary.context: That tells them a nearby tree is under attack, so they start to make their own bug repellent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这告诉他们附近的一棵树受到了攻击，所以他们开始制作自己的驱虫剂

vocabulary.definition: adj. 幼稚的, 稚气的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她这太幼稚了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 独臂的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她爸爸用单臂拥抱了她

vocabulary.definition: n. 下装, 下载；下传
vocabulary.context: She was too busy trying to decide what her new background should be and downloading all of the most important apps.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她太忙于决定她的新背景应该是什么并下载所有最重要的应用程序

vocabulary.definition: n. 戒律, 善行
vocabulary.context: She couldn't get a cell phone until her Bat Mitzvah.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她直到成人礼才拿到手机

vocabulary.definition: adv. 泪汪汪地, 流泪地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 艾比会在春假期间把手机掉进泳池里，并在生日过夜时泪流满面地盯着手机所在的那碗米饭

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爬行的, 令人毛骨悚然的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 令人毛骨悚然的音乐、黑暗的灯光和窃窃私语都让她心烦意乱

vocabulary.definition: adv. 慎重地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们有些谨慎地看着对方，但还是笑了

vocabulary.definition: n. 提议, 意见；[医] 暗示

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 立刻，她所有的朋友都纷纷插话，大声说出自己的建议

vocabulary.definition: adj. 跖骨的；n. 跖骨
vocabulary.context: The bones just behind your toes are called metatarsals (say meh-ta-TAR-sul).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 脚趾后面的骨头称为跖骨（例如 meh-ta-TAR-sul）

vocabulary.definition: n. 切断, 截肢术；[医] 切断术
vocabulary.context: Long ago, Jacques Lisfranc didn't know how to help his soldiers other than to cut off their foot, which is called an amputation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 很久以前，雅克·利斯弗兰克（Jacques Lisfranc）除了砍掉他们的脚（称为截肢）外，不知道如何帮助他的士兵

vocabulary.definition: n. 结带, 纽带, 韧带；[医] 韧带
vocabulary.context: Usually, the ligaments in your foot are good at holding bones in place.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常，脚上的韧带能够很好地将骨头固定到位

vocabulary.definition: n. 马镫, 镫具, U形物；[化] 钢箍

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一只脚会被卡在马镫里，当士兵摔倒时会扭曲，脚上的小骨头会滑出原来的位置

vocabulary.definition: n. 线锯；v.t. 用线锯锯

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 幸运的是，今天的医生有很多不那么激烈的方法来帮助他们的病人！

vocabulary.definition: n. 外科医生, 军医, 船医；[医] 外科医师

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 骑马的士兵已经不多了，但今天的医生和外科医生在很多方面都看到同样的伤害发生

vocabulary.definition: adj. 人造的, 假的, 非原地产的；[医] 人工的, 人造的, 伟牟

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人造草坪比天然草坪对防滑钉的固定力更强，也可能是造成这些伤害的原因之一

vocabulary.definition: adj. 严格的, 尖锐的, 严肃的, 严重的, 严厉的, 朴素的；[法] 严厉的, 苛刻的, 严重的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伤势较重的人可能需要手术然后休息

vocabulary.definition: n. 取得资格的人, 限定语；[计] 限定词

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是火鸡快跑，不是地区预选赛，"她翻着白眼说道

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它可以阻挡一些风吹来的污垢，但贝蒂知道，在暴风雨过去很久之后，粉状灰尘会覆盖所有东西--橱柜里的盘子和壁橱里的衣服

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它可以阻挡一些风吹来的污垢，但贝蒂知道，在暴风雨过去很久之后，粉状灰尘会覆盖所有东西--橱柜里的盘子和壁橱里的衣服

vocabulary.definition: n. 松弛, 松懈, 淡季, 闲散, 家常裤；adj. 松弛的, 不流畅的, 疏忽的, 无力的, 呆滞的, 软弱的, 漏水的；adv. 马虎地, 缓慢地；v.t. 放松, 使缓慢；v.i. 松懈, 减弱, 松弛
vocabulary.context: Quickly, she looped the slack of the clothes-line around his neck.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她很快地将晾衣绳的松弛部分绕在他的脖子上

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这会吓到 Fancifoot

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 试试这个：将一杯玉米淀粉与半杯水混合

vocabulary.definition: n. 聚合物, 聚合体；[化] 多聚体; 高分子; 大分子; 聚合物
vocabulary.context: When these are mixed together, microscopic molecules form long chains called polymers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当它们混合在一起时，微观分子形成称为聚合物的长链

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们周围的流体有很多奇怪的行为方式

vocabulary.context: Have you ever spit out toothpaste and found a line of sticky saliva stretching down with it?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你是否曾经吐出牙膏，发现有一条粘稠的唾液顺着牙膏往下延伸？

vocabulary.definition: n. 牙膏；[化] 牙膏
vocabulary.context: Have you ever spit out toothpaste and found a line of sticky saliva stretching down with it?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你是否曾经吐出牙膏，发现有一条粘稠的唾液顺着牙膏往下延伸？

vocabulary.definition: n. 数学家
vocabulary.context: Newtonian fluids get their name from Sir Isaac Newton, who was a well-known mathematician and scientist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 牛顿流体得名于艾萨克·牛顿爵士，他是一位著名的数学家和科学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 面团, 面食, 浆糊, 糊状物, 粘贴, 用拳重击；v.t. 用浆糊粘, 张贴, 狠狠地打；[计] 粘贴
vocabulary.context: Ketchup is made by mixing tomato paste and sugar with some other ingredients.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 番茄酱是通过将番茄酱和糖与其他一些成分混合制成的

vocabulary.definition: adj. 众所周知的, 有名的
vocabulary.context: Newtonian fluids get their name from Sir Isaac Newton, who was a well-known mathematician and scientist.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 牛顿流体得名于艾萨克·牛顿爵士，他是一位著名的数学家和科学家

vocabulary.definition: adj. 平常的, 普通的, 平凡的；n. 平常的人(或事)
vocabulary.context: These are ordinary types of fluids, like water and air.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些是普通类型的流体，如水和空气

vocabulary.definition: adj. 刺骨的, 透骨的
vocabulary.context: One by one, Stoney, Betty, and the other wolves in their pack trudged down a snowy bank into the bone-chilling waters of the Cascade River.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯托尼、贝蒂和狼群中的其他狼一一艰难地沿着白雪覆盖的河岸，进入喀斯喀特河的刺骨河水中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 积雪盖顶的
vocabulary.context: They trekked among pine trees and jagged snow-capped peaks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在松树和锯齿状的雪山间跋涉

vocabulary.definition: n. 燕雀, 歌鸟, 女歌手
vocabulary.context: Songbirds and beavers also use the trees that the elk eat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸣禽和海狸也使用麋鹿吃的树木

vocabulary.definition: n. 雪崩( avalanche的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: "Avalanches can kill people and wolves," Hebblewhite said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "雪崩可以杀死人和狼，"赫布尔怀特说

vocabulary.definition: n. 海狸(毛皮)；[机] 轻型及中型飞机加油
vocabulary.context: Songbirds and beavers also use the trees that the elk eat.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鸣禽和海狸也使用麋鹿吃的树木

vocabulary.definition: n. 小瀑布, 瀑布状物；v.i. 成瀑布落下；[计] 层叠, 级联
vocabulary.context: One by one, Stoney, Betty, and the other wolves in their pack trudged down a snowy bank into the bone-chilling waters of the Cascade River.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯托尼、贝蒂和狼群中的其他狼一一艰难地沿着白雪覆盖的河岸，进入喀斯喀特河的刺骨河水中

vocabulary.definition: adj. 锯齿状的；[电] 锯齿形的
vocabulary.context: They trekked among pine trees and jagged snow-capped peaks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们在松树和锯齿状的雪山间跋涉

vocabulary.definition: v. 检查, 调查, 考试
vocabulary.context: They measured willow twigs and examined young aspen trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们测量了柳枝并检查了幼年白杨树

vocabulary.definition: n. 影响力, 权力, 势力；v.t. 影响, 改变
vocabulary.context: "Wolves affected elk, which influenced plants like aspen and willow, which had impacts on birds and beavers," said Hebblewhite.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "狼影响了麋鹿，麋鹿影响了白杨和柳树等植物，进而影响了鸟类和海狸，"赫伯怀特说

vocabulary.definition: n. 两年生植物, 两年一次的事；adj. 两年生的, 两年一次的
vocabulary.context: "We now know that, at certain times of a biennial cycle, the solar winds in this system become fierce enough to destroy just about any thing smaller than a planet."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我们现在知道，在两年周期的某些时候，这个系统中的太阳风变得足够猛烈，足以摧毁任何比行星还小的物体。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 驱逐, 喷出, 排出物；[化] 排出
vocabulary.context: "Distress messages were undoubtedly sent out, both from the Macmillan at the time of impact and automatically from the escape pods at the moment of ejection.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "毫无疑问，求救信息是从麦克米伦号撞击时发出的，也是在弹射时自动从逃生舱发出的

vocabulary.definition: n. 舷窗, 炮门；[化] 窥视孔
vocabulary.context: She didn't know that her mother was watching from the porthole, admiring even then her daughter's grace and strength, until the glow of her skin disappeared into the dimness.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她不知道她的母亲正在舷窗里看着她，欣赏她女儿的优雅和力量，直到她皮肤的光泽消失在昏暗中

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 唠叨地讲, 徘徊
vocabulary.context: Lomond maundering on....
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 洛蒙德喋喋不休......

vocabulary.definition: adj. 单细胞的
vocabulary.context: And not all of those that did had moved beyond the stage of one-celled organisms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 并不是所有那些已经超越了单细胞生物体的阶段

vocabulary.definition: adj. 回答的, 应答的, 易感应的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为总统，杰斐逊致力于塑造一个代表人民并响应人民需求的政府 4 5

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有秩序的, 整齐的, 值班的；n. 护理员, 清道夫, 传令兵, 勤务兵；adv. 依次地, 顺序地
vocabulary.context: He showed how to bring about an orderly and stable change from one 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他展示了如何从1开始实现有序、稳定的转变

vocabulary.definition: n. 移民, 移居；[医] 移民

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他确保言论自由受到保护，并放松了对移民的限制

vocabulary.definition: n. 总统职权, 总裁职位

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一位总统在其总统任期开始时就政党领导力向另一位总统发表的讲话

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 获得, 学到；[电] 目标锁定
vocabulary.context: The most important event of Jefferson's presidency was acquiring the vast Louisiana Territory from France in 1803 and sending the Corps of Discovery led by Meriwether Lewis and William Clark to explore it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 杰斐逊总统任期内最重要的事件是1803年从法国手中获得了广阔的路易斯安那领土，并派出由梅里韦瑟·刘易斯和威廉·克拉克率领的探索队前往探索

vocabulary.definition: v. 过冬

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 蜜蜂在冬天冬眠（称为越冬），所以这是它们"醒来"并开始飞行的时间

vocabulary.definition: n. 养蜂

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于蜜蜂几乎以各种方式照顾自己，养蜂主要是一种管理工作

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 让他们跑得这么快！"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有很多人参加的（会议等）
vocabulary.context: Yom Kippur prayer services, in addition to being well-attended, are unique in another way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 赎罪日祈祷仪式除了参与人数众多之外，还有另一个独特之处

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无罪的, 清白的；[法] 无罪的, 无辜的, 清白的
vocabulary.context: Refraining from these luxuries symbolizes a return to a clean, sinless state.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 戒除这些奢侈象征着回归洁净、无罪的状态

vocabulary.definition: n. 阿托恩（古埃及信奉的太阳神）
vocabulary.context: They believe that repenting and atoning for their sins, and being forgiven by God, allow them to prosper in the new year to come.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们相信悔改、赎罪并得到上帝的宽恕，可以让他们在新的一年里繁荣昌盛

vocabulary.definition: n. 赎罪, 补偿；[法] 补偿, 赎回, 赎罪
vocabulary.context: The High Holy Days of Judaism begin with Rosh Hashanah (the Jewish New Year) and end ten days later with Yom Kippur, also known as the Day of Atonement.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 犹太教的最高圣日从犹太新年（犹太新年）开始，十天后以赎罪日（也称为赎罪日）结束

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 补偿, 弥补；[法] 赔偿, 补偿, 偿还
vocabulary.context: In Hebrew, Yom means "day" and Kippur comes from a root word that means "to cover" or "to hide." In this way, Yom Kippur has come to mean the day when Jews atone for (make up for) their sins of the past year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在希伯来语中，Yom 的意思是"日"，Kippur 来自词根，意思是"覆盖"或"隐藏"。这样，赎罪日就意味着犹太人赎罪（弥补）过去一年的罪孽的日子

vocabulary.definition: n. 洗液；[化] 洗剂
vocabulary.context: In addition to fasting, Jews also avoid a few other things on Yom Kippur, including work, leather shoes or clothing, bathing and wearing perfumes or lotions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了禁食外，犹太人在赎罪日还会避免其他一些事情，包括工作、穿皮鞋或衣服、洗澡以及喷香水或乳液

vocabulary.definition: n. 游泳, 洗海水澡
vocabulary.context: In addition to fasting, Jews also avoid a few other things on Yom Kippur, including work, leather shoes or clothing, bathing and wearing perfumes or lotions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了禁食外，犹太人在赎罪日还会避免其他一些事情，包括工作、穿皮鞋或衣服、洗澡以及喷香水或乳液

vocabulary.definition: n. 修道院外的教士；adj. 世俗的, 现世的, 长期的
vocabulary.context: Because Yom Kippur is considered the holiest day of the Jewish year, it is observed by many secular Jews (those who are of Jewish descent, but who do not practice the religion of Judaism strictly).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于赎罪日被认为是犹太年中最神圣的日子，许多世俗犹太人（具有犹太血统，但不严格信奉犹太教的人）都会庆祝这一天

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 评估, 评价, 赋值
vocabulary.context: During the High Holy Days, Jews take time to evaluate their behavior over the past year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在至圣日期间，犹太人会花时间评估他们过去一年的行为

vocabulary.definition: n. 仙境, 乐园
vocabulary.context: If you upset them, they could spoil your crops, bring nasty weather, or even kidnap you to fairyland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果你惹恼了他们，他们可能会破坏你的庄稼，带来恶劣的天气，甚至把你绑架到仙境

vocabulary.definition: n. (爱尔兰民间传说中常变成动物出现的) 鬼怪, 恶精灵
vocabulary.context: On Samhain Eve, the Celts feared the pooka most of all.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在萨温节前夕，凯尔特人最害怕的是普卡

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可爱的
vocabulary.context: Enchanting(adjective)very likable; charming; enjoyable appeared as a yellow-eyed black horse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 迷人（形容词）非常讨人喜欢；迷人;令人愉快的出现为一匹黄眼黑马

vocabulary.definition: n. 食尸鬼, 饿鬼, 盗墓者
vocabulary.context: Ghosts. Ghouls. Goblins. And... fairies? We don't usually think of fairies as spooky Halloween creatures. However, if you traveled the streets of an ancient Irish village on the night of October 31, you'd hide from...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鬼魂。食尸鬼。哥布林。还有......仙女们？我们通常不认为仙女是幽灵般的万圣节生物。然而，如果你在 10 月 31 日晚上走在一个古老的爱尔兰村庄的街道上，你会躲避......

vocabulary.definition: n. 小妖精
vocabulary.context: Ghosts. Ghouls. Goblins. And... fairies? We don't usually think of fairies as spooky Halloween creatures. However, if you traveled the streets of an ancient Irish village on the night of October 31, you'd hide from them!...
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鬼魂。食尸鬼。哥布林。还有......仙女们？我们通常不认为仙女是幽灵般的万圣节生物。然而，如果您在 10 月 31 日晚上走在爱尔兰古老村庄的街道上，您就会躲避他们！...

vocabulary.definition: adj. 幽灵一般的, 吓人的, 令人毛骨悚然的
vocabulary.context: We don't usually think of fairies as spooky Halloween creatures.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们通常不认为仙女是幽灵般的万圣节生物

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 使恼怒, 骚扰
vocabulary.context: Offend(verb)to anger or annoy someone 2.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 冒犯（动词）使某人生气或惹恼某人 2.

vocabulary.definition: n. (钢等的)硬度, 脾气, 心情, 中和剂, 倾向, 回火；v.t. 使回火, 锻炼, 调和, 使缓和；v.i. 回火
vocabulary.context: Fairies had bad tempers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 仙女们的脾气都很坏

vocabulary.definition: n. 航行者, 航海者
vocabulary.context: Newspaper reporters in Baltimore described Edward as having the courage of "an old Voyager." The onlookers screamed themselves hoarse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴尔的摩的报纸记者形容爱德华拥有"老航海者"的勇气。围观的人尖叫声嘶哑

vocabulary.definition: n. 小旅馆老板, 客栈老板
vocabulary.context: Peter Carnes, a Maryland innkeeper and lawyer, placed a small iron stove in a balloon basket one fine June day in Bladensburg, Maryland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 六月一个晴朗的日子，马里兰州布莱登斯堡的马里兰州旅馆老板兼律师彼得·卡恩斯 (Peter Carnes) 在气球篮里放了一个小铁炉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 冒烟的, 满是烟的, 熏脏的, 烟灰色的
vocabulary.context: Smoky hot air swelled the balloon and sent it up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 冒烟的热空气使气球膨胀并把它送上了天空

vocabulary.definition: n. 系绳, 系链, 界限, 范围；v.t. 栓, 束缚, 限制
vocabulary.context: A huge crowd gathered as he launched a tethered balloon, 35 feet wide and 30 feet tall, 200 feet into the air.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他发射一个 35 英尺宽、30 英尺高、200 英尺高的系留气球时，一大群人聚集在一起

vocabulary.definition: n. 旁观者, 袖手旁观者
vocabulary.context: Newspaper reporters in Baltimore described Edward as having the courage of "an old Voyager." The onlookers screamed themselves hoarse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴尔的摩的报纸记者形容爱德华拥有"老航海者"的勇气。围观的人尖叫声嘶哑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 沙哑的, 嘶哑的；[医] 声嘶的
vocabulary.context: Newspaper reporters in Baltimore described Edward as having the courage of "an old Voyager." The onlookers screamed themselves hoarse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 巴尔的摩的报纸记者形容爱德华拥有"老航海者"的勇气。围观的人尖叫声嘶哑

vocabulary.definition: adj. 震动的, 摇晃的, 动摇的
vocabulary.context: With shaky legs, Edward climbed from the basket.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爱德华双腿颤抖地从篮子里爬了出来

vocabulary.definition: adj. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地
vocabulary.context: The crowd yelled louder, and men waved their hats in return.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人群喊叫得更大声，男人们也挥舞着帽子回应

vocabulary.definition: n. 视野, 风景, 见解, 视力, 观看, 视图, 指望, 意图, 印象；v.t. 看, 考虑, 视察, 查看, 估量；[计] 视图
vocabulary.context: He was the first American to see such views.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他是第一个看到这种观点的美国人

vocabulary.definition: n. 漏斗, 漏斗状的东西, 烟囱；[化] 漏斗
vocabulary.context: This is called a funnel cloud.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这称为漏斗云

vocabulary.definition: n. 平静, 寂静
vocabulary.context: They know to look for warning signs, like a strange quietness just after a thunderstorm, changes in the sky's color, or the ominous sight of a funnel cloud.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们知道寻找警告信号，例如雷暴过后的奇怪安静、天空颜色的变化或漏斗云的不祥景象

vocabulary.definition: n. 颗粒状物, 小子弹, 小药丸；v.t. 使成颗粒, 使成团, 用子弹打
vocabulary.context: Hail pellets bounce off of cars and sidewalks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 冰雹颗粒从汽车和人行道上弹起

vocabulary.definition: n. 龙卷风, 旋风( tornado的名词复数 )
vocabulary.context: Tornadoes usually form from large thunderstorms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 龙卷风通常由大雷暴形成

vocabulary.definition: n. 旋风, 龙卷风, 大雷雨
vocabulary.context: Heavy rain, hail, and lighting from a thunderstorm can cause serious damage, but a thunderstorm can also lead to something much more menacing: a "nssl0209" by NOAA Photo Library is licensed tornado.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 大雨、冰雹和雷暴带来的闪电可能会造成严重破坏，但雷暴也可能导致更具威胁性的事情：NOAA 照片库的"nssl0209"已获得龙卷风许可

vocabulary.definition: n. (鱼)卵, 产物；v.t. 产卵, 酿成, 大量生产；v.i. 产卵, 大量生产
vocabulary.context: He says it is also important to learn which thunderstorms will spawn tornadoes and which ones will not.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说了解哪些雷暴会产生龙卷风、哪些不会产生龙卷风也很重要

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有影的, 暗黑的, 朦胧的, 虚幻的
vocabulary.context: to appear as a shadowy form, especially one that is large and threatening 2.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 以阴影形式出现，尤其是一个巨大且具有威胁性的2.

vocabulary.definition: n. 生还者, 幸存者；[法] 生还者, 生存者, 辛存者
vocabulary.context: But survivors 1.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是幸存者1

vocabulary.definition: n. 希腊字母表的第一个字母, 最初, 开端；[医] α(希腊文的第一个字母), 甲种
vocabulary.context: She started the Alpha Suffrage club, bringing African American suffragists together to become a more powerful group.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她创办了阿尔法选举权俱乐部，将非裔美国选举权主义者聚集在一起，成为一个更强大的团体

vocabulary.definition: n. 虐待
vocabulary.context: Terrell and Wells worked together multiple times in their lives to bring attention to the mistreatment of African Americans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特雷尔和威尔斯一生中多次合作，引起人们对非裔美国人遭受虐待的关注

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 虐待；[法] 虐待, 苛待
vocabulary.context: Wells was never a slave, but she was still mistreated because of the color of her skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威尔斯从来都不是奴隶，但她仍然因为肤色而受到虐待

vocabulary.definition: adj. 脆弱的, 虚弱的, 意志薄弱的；n. 少女, 少妇, 灯心草篓
vocabulary.context: Harriet Tubman, for instance, was quite frail by the time women's suffrage became a popular issue, but she still gave speeches to crowds.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，当妇女选举权成为一个流行问题时，哈里特·塔布曼已经相当虚弱，但她仍然向人群发表演讲

vocabulary.definition: n. 激进主义, 行动主义, 能动论；[法] 激进主义, 行动主义
vocabulary.context: Wells, became famous for her activism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 威尔斯因其激进主义而闻名

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 俯瞰, 远眺, 没注意到；n. 眺望, 俯瞰到的景色
vocabulary.context: Terrell wanted to be active in the women's suffrage movement but was overlooked due to the color of her skin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 特雷尔希望积极参与妇女选举权运动，但由于她的肤色而被忽视

vocabulary.definition: n. 性；v.t. 产生
vocabulary.context: Her message was that all people, regardless of gender or color, were equal and should be able to participate in politics.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她传达的信息是，所有人，无论性别或肤色，都是平等的，都应该能够参与政治

vocabulary.definition: adj. 自由的, 享受政治权力的, 允许的, 免费的, 丰富的；v.t. 释放, 解放, 使自由；adv. 自由地, 免费
vocabulary.context: Sojourner Truth was born a slave but was freed at the age of 29, when New York ended slavery within the state in 1827.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 索杰纳·特鲁斯 (Sojourner Truth) 出生时是一名奴隶，但在 1827 年纽约结束州内奴隶制时，他在 29 岁时获得了自由

vocabulary.definition: adj. 市民的, 公民的, 有礼貌的；[法] 公民的, 国民的, 民用的
vocabulary.context: Women's suffrage, which means women's right to vote, became a popular movement in the United States after the Civil War.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 妇女选举权，即妇女的投票权，在内战后成为美国的一项民众运动

vocabulary.definition: n. 再创造, 再创作, 重新创造, 重新创作

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这部艺术史作品是根据查尔斯·布切尔 (Charles Buchel) 1904 年为宣传戏剧《彼得潘》的制作而绘制的一张海报的再创作

vocabulary.definition: n. 生动场面, 戏剧性局面

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 管弦乐队演奏了序曲的开场音符

vocabulary.context: Because the theme in 2011 presented several whimsical pieces with fantasy and fairies, many of the volunteers were children.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于2011年的主题呈现出一些奇幻、仙女般的异想天开的作品，所以志愿者中很多都是孩子

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 2011年夏天，大师赛的观众坐在树木繁茂的峡谷中的露天圆形剧场里

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的白色睡衣在微风中飘扬，飞过迷人村庄的茅草屋顶

vocabulary.context: During one season, the theater brimmed with bubbles.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一季期间，剧院里充满了泡沫

vocabulary.definition: n. 古典作品, 杰作, 大艺术家；adj. 第一流的, 最优秀的, 古典的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 主题是"天才"，许多画作都是经典艺术作品

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 伯妮斯抓住我们床罩的一大块，翻身翻到一边，远离我，一脸厌恶地看着我

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们的新家是一栋破旧的维多利亚式房屋二楼的四居室公寓

vocabulary.definition: adv. 会意地, 心照不宣地, 故意地, 有意地, 老练地；[法] 心照不宣地, 故意地, 有意地
vocabulary.context: Dad knowingly smiled back at him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爸爸会心地对他微笑

vocabulary.definition: n. 化妆台, (剧团)服装师, 碗柜；[医] 敷裹员
vocabulary.context: There, in the small space between my mother's dresser and rocking chair, was the brightest and most beautiful Christmas tree we had ever seen.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在我母亲的梳妆台和摇椅之间的狭小空间里，有一棵我们见过的最明亮、最美丽的圣诞树

vocabulary.definition: adj. 忧愁的, 悲哀的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感觉我们是世界上最悲伤的家庭

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们难以置信地看着对方，泪流满面

vocabulary.context: "Are you crying because we aren't going to have Christmas?" she asked coldly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "你因为我们过不了圣诞节而哭泣吗？"她冷冷地问道

vocabulary.definition: n. 慷慨, 宽大

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 严禁未经许可将材料用于任何商业用途或分发

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但并非每个国家或宗教都将星期日作为礼拜日

vocabulary.definition: adj. 实际的, 现实的, 实用性的；[法] 事实上的, 实际上的, 接近...的
vocabulary.context: Other countries choose different days, either for traditional or practical reasons.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他国家出于传统或实际原因选择不同的日子

vocabulary.definition: adv. 频繁, 经常地
vocabulary.context: In Denmark, Tuesdays are the most common day for voting, but elections frequently take place on other days as well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在丹麦，星期二是最常见的投票日，但选举也经常在其他日子举行

vocabulary.definition: n. 糖果, 五彩纸屑
vocabulary.context: Three thousand pounds of confetti are dropped by hand from eight different buildings at precisely 20 seconds before midnight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 午夜前 20 秒，三千磅五彩纸屑从八座不同的建筑物中被手工投下

vocabulary.definition: n. 计时表, 码表
vocabulary.context: Starr used a stopwatch to ensure that the ball's trip down the flagpole took exactly one minute.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 斯塔尔使用秒表来确保球沿着旗杆的行程正好一分钟

vocabulary.definition: adj. 全天的
vocabulary.context: Ochs knew it would take something big to draw the crowds away from Trinity Church and into Times Square, so he planned an all-day street festival that included fireworks at midnight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 奥克斯知道需要做一些大事才能将人群从三一教堂吸引到时代广场，因此他计划举办一个全天的街头节日，其中包括在午夜燃放烟花

vocabulary.definition: n. 旗竿
vocabulary.context: The ball, five feet in diameter, was attached to a flagpole and could be lowered by hand with a pulley.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 球直径五英尺，固定在旗杆上，可以用滑轮手动降低

vocabulary.definition: adj. 修订的, 重建的, 重新设计的；v. 重新设计( redesign的过去式和过去分词 )
vocabulary.context: The Times Square ball has been redesigned seven times over the past 100 years.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 时代广场球在过去 100 年里已经被重新设计了七次

vocabulary.definition: n. 灯火管制, 暂时的意识丧失, 灯火熄灭, 删除；[计] 电网掉电
vocabulary.context: It has taken place every year except for 1942 and 1943 when it was canceled because of World War II blackouts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了1942年和1943年因二战停电而取消外，每年都会举行

vocabulary.definition: n. 电学家, 电气技师, 电工；[化] 电工; 电气工人
vocabulary.context: His chief electrician suggested they drop a time ball similar to the one that was attached to a pole on the roof of the city's Western Union building.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的首席电工建议他们扔一个时间球，类似于固定在该市西联大楼屋顶一根杆子上的那个时间球

vocabulary.definition: n. 边缘, 边界, 起始点；v.i. 处在边缘, 接近, 下沉, 趋向
vocabulary.context: The newspaper was on the verge of bankruptcy, but Ochs was determined to make it successful.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该报一度濒临破产，但奥克斯决心让它成功

vocabulary.definition: adj. 黑白花斑的, 杂色的；n. 花马, 菜豆
vocabulary.context: They make cobblestone pathways out of red beans and pinto beans.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们用红豆和斑豆建造鹅卵石小路

vocabulary.definition: n. 大熊猫, 小熊猫
vocabulary.context: ...are edible. Contestants have gone way beyond houses, too, building castles, barns, and birdhouses. One recent winner even made two panda bears!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: ...可以食用。参赛者的范围也远远超出了房屋，他们建造了城堡、谷仓和鸟舍。最近的一位获奖者甚至制作了两只熊猫！

vocabulary.definition: n. 鉴赏家, 鉴定家, 内行
vocabulary.context: Today, gingerbread house connoisseurs get really fancy when creating their masterpieces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，姜饼屋鉴赏家在创作他们的杰作时非常着迷

vocabulary.definition: n. 食品, 食物；adj. 可食用的
vocabulary.context: People all over the world make edible homes and villages out of gingerbread, a treat made with honey, molasses, or sugar, and lots of spices, including ginger, of course.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 世界各地的人们用姜饼建造可食用的房屋和村庄，姜饼是一种用蜂蜜、糖蜜或糖以及许多香料制成的食物，当然也包括生姜

vocabulary.definition: n. 棒棒糖
vocabulary.context: You could make pretzel bridges, cookie towers, and lollipop glass.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你可以制作椒盐卷饼桥、饼干塔和棒棒糖玻璃

vocabulary.definition: n. 杰作, 名著
vocabulary.context: Today, gingerbread house connoisseurs get really fancy when creating their masterpieces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，姜饼屋鉴赏家在创作他们的杰作时非常着迷

vocabulary.definition: n. 新奇, 新鲜, 新奇的事物
vocabulary.context: What gingerbread novelty will you invent?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你会发明什么新奇的姜饼？

vocabulary.definition: n. 屋顶
vocabulary.context: They beat egg whites to make a fluffy snow-like concoction and cover the rooftops and chimneys with it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们将蛋清打成蓬松的雪状混合物，然后用它覆盖屋顶和烟囱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 通俗的, 流行的, 受欢迎的, 大众的, 人民的, 普及的；[经] 大众的, 通俗的, 普及的
vocabulary.context: As the treat became more popular throughout Europe, gingerbread shaping became an art form.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着姜饼在整个欧洲变得越来越流行，姜饼成型成为一种艺术形式

vocabulary.definition: n. [天]地心说,地球中心说
vocabulary.context: This belief is called geocentrism.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种信念被称为地心说

vocabulary.definition: n. 熔合物, 结合, 熔合；[化] 熔融; 熔化; 聚变
vocabulary.context: This process is called nuclear fusion, and it releases a lot of extra energy in the forms of heat and light.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这个过程称为核聚变，它以热和光的形式释放大量额外的能量

vocabulary.definition: n. 氦；[化] 氦
vocabulary.context: Inside that dense center, hydrogen atoms are under so much pressure that they fuse together into helium atoms.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在这个致密的中心内，氢原子承受着如此大的压力，以至于它们融合在一起形成氦原子

vocabulary.definition: adj. 重力的
vocabulary.context: All of the planets are stuck circling in this gravitational field, orbiting the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 所有行星都被困在这个引力场中，围绕太阳运行

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)凝固, (使)团结, 巩固
vocabulary.context: Finally, they solidified into the eight planets we know today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 最后，它们凝固成我们今天所知的八颗行星

vocabulary.definition: adj. 行星的, 流浪的, 迁移不定的, 地球上的, 现世的
vocabulary.context: Kepler's laws of planetary motion, as well as Isaac Newton's law of gravity, supported Copernicus' theory that the sun was the center of the solar system because it explained how the sun held other planets in orbit.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 开普勒的行星运动定律以及艾萨克·牛顿的万有引力定律支持哥白尼的太阳是太阳系中心的理论，因为它解释了太阳如何使其他行星保持在轨道上

vocabulary.definition: v. (使)旋转, 反复考虑, 循环出现
vocabulary.context: For a long time, people believed the earth stood at the center of the universe and everything, including the sun, revolved around it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 长期以来，人们认为地球是宇宙的中心，包括太阳在内的一切事物都围绕着地球旋转

vocabulary.definition: n. 观察, 注意, 观测, 观察力；[化] 观察
vocabulary.context: In 1543, Copernicus proved through his observations and mathematical calculations that the earth actually revolved around the sun.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1543年，哥白尼通过观察和数学计算证明地球确实绕着太阳转

vocabulary.definition: n. （尤指军队的）副司令员, 副指挥员, 第二把手
vocabulary.context: Chavez was president and Huerta was second-in-command of the new union.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 查韦斯担任主席，韦尔塔担任新工会的第二把手

vocabulary.definition: n. 说客；[法] 院外活动集团成员
vocabulary.context: She became a fearless lobbyist (a person who works to get laws of their interest passed).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她成为一名无所畏惧的游说者（致力于让符合自己利益的法律获得通过的人）

vocabulary.definition: adj. 季节的, 依照季节的, 周期性的；[经] 季节性的, 季节的
vocabulary.context: a worker who moves from place to place for seasonal work children to the UFW activities so that others could see that the problems were not just about workers, they were about families!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一名工人为了季节性工作而从一个地方搬到另一个地方，孩子们参加UFW活动，这样其他人就可以看到问题不仅仅是工人的问题，而是家庭的问题！

vocabulary.definition: n. 候鸟, 移居者；[法] 移居者
vocabulary.context: Together, they talked to migrant workers and their families about how to get a better life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们一起与农民工及其家人谈论如何过上更好的生活

vocabulary.definition: adj. 幸运的, 幸福的
vocabulary.context: She was fortunate to go to college, and then became a teacher.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她有幸考上了大学，然后成为了一名教师

vocabulary.definition: v. 繁殖, 再生, 复制, 生殖；[计] 复制
vocabulary.context: Reproduced with permission.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 经许可转载

vocabulary.definition: n. 寄存器, 记录, 登记簿, 注册；v.t. 记录, 注册, 提示, 表达, 把...挂号；v.i. 登记, 注册, 挂号；[计] 寄存器
vocabulary.context: She helped poor people register to vote, become citizens, and get better services.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她帮助穷人登记投票、成为公民并获得更好的服务

vocabulary.definition: n. 激进主义分子
vocabulary.context: Being an activist (someone who takes action) was a dangerous job; she got hurt, and she was put in jail.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 成为一名积极分子（采取行动的人）是一项危险的工作；她受伤了，被关进了监狱

vocabulary.definition: adj. 关心的, 有关的, 参与的, 担心的
vocabulary.context: Dolores Huerta, who was born in New Mexico in 1930, was always concerned about civil rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 多洛雷斯·韦尔塔（Dolores Huerta）1930年出生于新墨西哥州，一直关注公民权利

vocabulary.definition: adj. 火红的
vocabulary.context: A "broken" tulip has streaks of color, like the flame-colored one that was so popular.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一朵"破碎的"郁金香有颜色条纹，就像非常受欢迎的火焰色郁金香一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 植物学家
vocabulary.context: Carolus Clusius was a botanist, a scientist who studies plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 卡罗勒斯·克鲁修斯是一位植物学家，一位研究植物的科学家

vocabulary.definition: adj. 植物学的；n. 植物性药材
vocabulary.context: He was in charge of a botanical garden, a garden that was used to study different kinds of plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他负责一个植物园，一个用来研究不同种类植物的花园

vocabulary.definition: n. 荷兰盾(荷兰货币单位)；[经] 质
vocabulary.context: During those months, a single bulb could cost up to 5,000 guilders, the price you would pay for a nice house in 1637!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在那几个月里，一个灯泡的价格高达 5,000 荷兰盾，这是 1637 年购买一栋漂亮房子的价格！

vocabulary.definition: n. 狂躁, 热衷, 狂热；[医] 躁狂, 狂
vocabulary.context: It was tulip mania!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是郁金香狂热！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 呈褐色的
vocabulary.context: Tulips spend most of the year as dull brownish bulbs and only show off their colors once a year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 郁金香一年中的大部分时间都是暗褐色的球茎，每年只展示一次它们的颜色

vocabulary.definition: n. 病毒, 滤过性病毒, 毒害；[化] 病毒
vocabulary.context: Tulip bulbs can become infected with a virus that causes the colors in their petals to break up.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 郁金香球茎可能会感染病毒，导致花瓣颜色破裂

vocabulary.definition: adj. 迟的, 晚的, 已故的；adv. 很晚, 很迟, 晚
vocabulary.context: Today many people want whatever is the latest hot trend in fashion, but buying what's popular is nothing new.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如今，许多人都想要最新流行的时尚潮流，但购买流行的东西并不是什么新鲜事

vocabulary.definition: n. 价格, 代价, 价值；v.t. 定...的价格
vocabulary.context: Tulip prices were at their highest between December 1636 and January 1637.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 郁金香价格在 1636 年 12 月至 1637 年 1 月期间达到最高水平

vocabulary.definition: adj. 可收集的, 可搜集的, 可征收的；[经] 可收回的
vocabulary.context: A "pet rock" was a collectible item that became wildly popular in the United States in the 1970s.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "宠物石"是 20 世纪 70 年代在美国广受欢迎的收藏品

vocabulary.definition: adj. 微小的, 不足道的；n. 便壶
vocabulary.context: The manual described in detail how to discipline the rock, teach it simple commands, and potty train it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 该手册详细描述了如何管教岩石、教它简单的命令以及训练它如厕

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不服从的, 不孝的, 违背的
vocabulary.context: In response, he conceived the idea of a pet rock, which the owner would not have to bathe, groom, walk, or feed; the pet rocks could never become sick or be disobedient.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 作为回应，他想到了宠物石的想法，主人不必给它洗澡、梳理毛发、散步或喂食；宠物岩石永远不会生病或不听话

vocabulary.definition: adj. 富幽默感的, 滑稽的, 诙谐的
vocabulary.context: Obviously, the instructions were highly ironic and humorous in tone, like the product itself.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 显然，这些说明的语气非常讽刺和幽默，就像产品本身一样

vocabulary.definition: n. 回顾, 追忆, 回溯；v. 回顾, 追忆
vocabulary.context: Unlike a trend, which can have a lasting impact on culture, fads are more fleeting in nature; they come and go quickly, and are often seen as somewhat ridiculous in retrospect.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 与对文化产生持久影响的趋势不同，时尚本质上更转瞬即逝。它们来得快去得也快，回想起来常常被认为有些可笑

vocabulary.definition: n. 烦恼, 打扰, 可厌之事；[法] 使人烦恼的事物, 麻烦事, 讨厌物
vocabulary.context: Gary Dahl was the inventor of the pet rock; he was sitting in a bar in California in 1975, listening to his friends discuss the needs and annoyances of their pets.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 加里·达尔 (Gary Dahl) 是宠物石的发明者； 1975 年，他坐在加利福尼亚州的一家酒吧里，听朋友们讨论宠物的需求和烦恼

vocabulary.definition: adv. 热心地, 狂热地
vocabulary.context: A fad is a behavior that rapidly grows in popularity, and which many people adopt very enthusiastically for a short period of time.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 时尚是一种迅速流行的行为，许多人在短时间内非常热情地采用这种行为

vocabulary.definition: n. 收集家, 收取款项的人；[化] 集电极; 捕收剂
vocabulary.context: The popularity of the pet rock eventually died down, but they remain collectors' items for some people even today.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 宠物石的流行最终逐渐消失，但即使在今天，它们仍然是一些人的收藏品

vocabulary.definition: n. 名声, 受大众欢迎, 流行
vocabulary.context: In the span of about six months in 1975 and 1976, the popularity of pet rocks soared.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在1975年和1976年大约六个月的时间里，宠物石的受欢迎程度飙升

vocabulary.definition: n. 瑞典式自助餐
vocabulary.context: It was an international smorgasbord!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这是一场国际大餐！

vocabulary.definition: n. <日>生鱼片
vocabulary.context: Lily's menu featured yellowfin tuna, salmon sashimi, and sushi rice.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莉莉的菜单包括黄鳍金枪鱼、三文鱼生鱼片和寿司饭

vocabulary.definition: n. (英)厚的奶油酥饼, (美)脆饼, 水果松糕, 松饼
vocabulary.context: Every table was brimming and overflowing with cupcakes, cookies, caramel popcorn balls, lollipops, ice cream sundaes, fizzy sodas, apple pies, donuts, strawberry shortcake, chocolate bars, jellybeans, milkshakes, snow cones, gum drops, marshmallows, and dozens of flavors of bubble gum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每张桌子上都摆满了纸杯蛋糕、饼干、焦糖爆米花球、棒棒糖、冰淇淋圣代、碳酸汽水、苹果派、甜甜圈、草莓酥饼、巧克力棒、软心豆粒糖、奶昔、雪糕筒、口香糖、棉花糖和几十种口味的泡泡糖

vocabulary.definition: n. 林堡软干酪
vocabulary.context: Max stood next to her with the biggest grin on his face and pronounced, "Liverwurst and limburger cheese sandwiches for everyone!"
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 马克斯站在她旁边，脸上挂着灿烂的笑容，宣布："为每个人提供肝香肠和林堡奶酪三明治！"

vocabulary.definition: n. 风笛
vocabulary.context: His mom wore an ankle length tartan skirt and his dad wore a kilt and carried bagpipes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的妈妈穿着一条长及脚踝的格子呢裙子，他的爸爸穿着一条苏格兰短裙，手里拿着风笛

vocabulary.definition: n. 格子呢, 方格花纹, 单桅小帆船；adj. 格子呢的
vocabulary.context: His mom wore an ankle length tartan skirt and his dad wore a kilt and carried bagpipes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的妈妈穿着一条长及脚踝的格子呢裙子，他的爸爸穿着一条苏格兰短裙，手里拿着风笛

vocabulary.definition: n. 日本抹茶; 抹茶
vocabulary.context: There was matcha mochi for dessert.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 甜点有抹茶麻糬

vocabulary.definition: n. (西非男女均可穿的)宽大长袍[西非当地语]
vocabulary.context: Zach's dad wore a green boubou gown and a kufi cap to match.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 扎克的父亲穿着一件绿色的布布长袍，戴着一顶与之相配的库法帽

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无礼的, 粗鲁的
vocabulary.context: Syd, too, had experienced impolite and hurtful remarks from classmates about the meals he brought from home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 西德也曾经历过同学们对他从家里带来的饭菜的不礼貌和中伤性的评论

vocabulary.definition: n. 油炸圈饼, 圆环图( donut的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: Every table was brimming and overflowing with cupcakes, cookies, caramel popcorn balls, lollipops, ice cream sundaes, fizzy sodas, apple pies, donuts, strawberry shortcake, chocolate bars, jellybeans, milkshakes, snow cones, gum drops, marshmallows, and dozens of flavors of bubble gum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每张桌子上都摆满了纸杯蛋糕、饼干、焦糖爆米花球、棒棒糖、冰淇淋圣代、碳酸汽水、苹果派、甜甜圈、草莓酥饼、巧克力棒、软心豆粒糖、奶昔、雪糕筒、口香糖、棉花糖和几十种口味的泡泡糖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无人情味的, 薄情的, 残忍的
vocabulary.context: In many industries, workers faced inhumane conditions such as having to bend over all day, or breathing in smoke from the machines.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在许多行业，工人面临着不人道的条件，例如必须整天弯腰，或吸入机器产生的烟雾

vocabulary.definition: n. 二轮运货马车；v.i. 驾运货马车；v.t. 用车装载
vocabulary.context: They had to crawl through the mine in narrow tunnels and pull carts full of coal behind them.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们必须在狭窄的隧道中爬行穿过矿井，并在身后拉着装满煤炭的车

vocabulary.definition: n. 检查员, 巡视员；[化] 检查员
vocabulary.context: For example, child labor became illegal and the government began to send inspectors to make sure factories were safe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，童工成为非法，政府开始派遣检查员确保工厂安全

vocabulary.definition: n. 矿工, 开矿机, 坑道工兵；[经] 矿工
vocabulary.context: Because coal miners were paid so little, many families could not afford to buy enough food.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于煤矿工人的工资很低，许多家庭买不起足够的食物

vocabulary.definition: n. 交易, 买卖协定, 特价商品；v. 讲价, 交易
vocabulary.context: The first strategy was called "collective bargaining." Workers chose a few leaders to represent them in a meeting with the factory or mine owner.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一个策略称为"集体谈判"。工人们选出了几位领导代表他们与厂主或矿主会面

vocabulary.definition: adj. 有毒的, 恶毒的, 讨厌的；[医] 有毒的
vocabulary.context: Workers had to breathe coal dust and poisonous gases.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 工人们不得不呼吸煤尘和有毒气体

vocabulary.definition: n. 雇主, 老板；[经] 雇主, 业主
vocabulary.context: A labor union is a group of workers who join together to ask their employers for better payment, working hours, and working conditions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 工会是一群工人联合起来，要求雇主提供更好的报酬、工作时间和工作条件

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 商议, 谈判, 交涉；v.t. 谈妥, 转让, 处理
vocabulary.context: They knew they had to work together to negotiate with the rich and powerful factory owners, so they grouped together to form labor unions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们知道必须共同努力与有钱有势的工厂主进行谈判，因此他们联合起来成立了工会

vocabulary.definition: n. 优点, 便利, 好处, 优势；v.t. 有助于
vocabulary.context: Unions were very successful in making sure business owners did not take advantage of their workers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 工会非常成功地确保企业主不利用他们的工人

vocabulary.definition: n. 州议会的议场
vocabulary.context: As Rodney rode toward the city, rain slashed at the windowpanes of the Philadelphia statehouse.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当罗德尼骑马驶向市区时，雨水击打着费城州议会大厦的窗玻璃

vocabulary.definition: adj. 紧闭嘴唇的, 寡言的
vocabulary.context: John Adams, who was a staunch supporter of independence, sat tight-lipped and silent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 约翰·亚当斯是独立的坚定支持者，他守口如瓶，一言不发

vocabulary.definition: n. 槌；[法] 赋税或租金, 议事槌, 小木槌
vocabulary.context: That afternoon they returned, and John Hancock, president of the Continental Congress, banged his gavel to quiet the delegates.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 那天下午，他们回来了，大陆会议主席约翰·汉考克敲响了木槌，让代表们安静下来

vocabulary.definition: n. 僵局, 停顿；v. (使)停顿, (使)相持不下；[计] 死锁
vocabulary.context: Rodney's vote broke Delaware's deadlock. The resolution for independence had passed.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 罗德尼的投票打破了特拉华州的僵局。独立决议获得通过

vocabulary.definition: adj. 未经训练的
vocabulary.context: Wouldn't England's army crush the colonies' untrained militia?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 英国军队不会镇压殖民地未经训练的民兵吗？

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 施酷刑, 拷问, 使苦恼, 折磨
vocabulary.context: He paced anxiously for thirty excruciating minutes while a horse was saddled.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当一匹马被装上马鞍时，他焦急地踱步了三十分钟，令人难以忍受

vocabulary.definition: adv. 危险, 不安全
vocabulary.context: But the Delaware delegation was split and dangerously close to voting no.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但特拉华州代表团意见分歧，危险地接近投反对票

vocabulary.definition: n. 面容, 面部表情, 支持, 镇定
vocabulary.context: "Yet there is sense and fire, spirit, wit, and humor in his countenance."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "然而，他的脸上充满了理智、热情、精神、智慧和幽默。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 军人, 维修人员；[化] 机械师; 维修人员
vocabulary.context: But, as she taught returning servicemen, Moina soon realized another purpose for the small flower.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但是，当莫伊娜教导归来的军人时，她很快意识到这朵小花的另一个用途

vocabulary.definition: n. 引用, 引证, 引用文；[建] 引证, 指引
vocabulary.context: For the rest of her life, Moina Belle Michael was known as the "Poppy Lady." She received citations,awards, and words of praise from around the world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在她的余生中，莫伊娜·贝尔·迈克尔被称为"罂粟女士"。她收到了来自世界各地的嘉奖、奖励和赞扬

vocabulary.definition: n. 战场, 战地

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 士兵们用悲伤的眼神注视着覆盖着白色十字架和鲜红色罂粟花的战场

vocabulary.definition: n. 无, 零；adj. 无价值的, 无用的
vocabulary.context: Fear not that ye have died for naught; We'll teach the lesson that ye wrought In Flanders Fields.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不要担心你们白白死去；我们将传授你们在佛兰德斯战场所获得的教训

vocabulary.definition: n. 10分硬币(美、加)

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 便士、镍币和一角硬币纷纷涌入

vocabulary.definition: adj. 爱国的, 有爱国心的；[法] 爱国的, 有爱国心的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爱国团体中的残疾退伍军人制作皱纹纸罂粟花，进行捐赠

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1921年，美国军团辅助部队采用法兰德斯战场罂粟作为其纪念花

vocabulary.definition: n. 毛衣, 毛线衫, 运动衫, 出汗者；[化] 发汗器
vocabulary.context: Moina planned to do more than knit socks or sweaters, or roll bandages for the Red Cross.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莫伊纳计划做的不仅仅是为红十字会编织袜子或毛衣或卷绷带

vocabulary.definition: n. 团体, 组, 团, 群；v. 聚合, 成群；[计] 创建组; 组, 用户组
vocabulary.context: Disabled veterans who were members of the patriotic groups made crepe-paper poppies, offering them for donations.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爱国团体中的残疾退伍军人制作皱纹纸罂粟花，进行捐赠

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 屋檐下瑟瑟发抖的鸟儿

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 棉花树高耸之处，

vocabulary.definition: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；v.t. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临；v.i. 朝, 向；[计] 现场可改变的控制元件
vocabulary.context: We'll turn our faces southward, love,
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我们将面朝南方，亲爱的，

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他受到审判并被判犯有叛国罪

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1884年，西北地区的梅蒂人请求瑞尔的帮助

vocabulary.definition: n. 外人, 局外人, 非会员, 外行, 门外汉, 比赛中获胜可能性不大的选手；[经] 外船公司
vocabulary.context: The Métis were afraid that this would bring outsiders who would harm their way of life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 梅蒂人担心这会带来损害他们生活方式的外来者

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 驱逐, 逐出, 排出, 开除；[医] 排除, 迫出
vocabulary.context: The following year he was expelled from the legislature.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 次年，他被逐出立法机关

vocabulary.context: Louis Riel was a leader of the Métis, a people of mixed Indigenous and European descent.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 路易斯·瑞尔 (Louis Riel) 是梅蒂斯人 (Métis) 的领袖，梅蒂斯人是土著和欧洲血统的混血民族

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阿西尼博亚 (Assiniboia) 是哈德逊湾公司 (Hudson's Bay Company) 所拥有的一个地区，位于现在的加拿大马尼托巴省

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 路易斯·瑞尔 (Louis Riel) 是梅蒂斯人 (Métis) 的领袖，梅蒂斯人是土著和欧洲血统的混血民族

vocabulary.definition: n. 谋反, 叛乱, 反抗；[法] 造反, 反叛, 叛乱

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1885年，一些梅蒂人因此开始武装叛乱

vocabulary.context: He sent a group to the capital city of Ottawa to push for Métis rights.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他派出一个小组前往首都渥太华争取梅蒂斯人的权利

vocabulary.definition: adj. 煮过熟了的, 不动感情的

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 有一碗煮熟的鸡蛋，通常是孩子们给他们上色的--每人至少一个鸡蛋

vocabulary.definition: n. 俄国的一种茶壶
vocabulary.context: There are usually also sekeh , gold and silver coins, often in a small bowl of water, symbolizing wealth; sombol , or hyacinth, a spring flower for life and beauty; and perhaps a highly polished samovar for boiling water and making tea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常还有sekeh，金币和银币，通常装在一小碗水里，象征着财富； sombol，或风信子，春天的花朵，代表着生命和美丽；也许还有一个用于烧水和泡茶的高度抛光的茶炊

vocabulary.definition: n. 昼夜平分点, 春分, 秋分
vocabulary.context: The thirteen days of festivities begin the Tuesday evening before the spring equinox, on what is traditionally called Chaharshambeh Souri, which means Wednesday Evening (or Wednesday Eve).
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 为期十三天的庆祝活动从春分前的星期二晚上开始，传统上称为 Chaharshambeh Souri，意思是星期三晚上（或星期三前夕）

vocabulary.definition: n. 变青, 苍白, 淡薄
vocabulary.context: As you jump over the glowing flame you shout, Zard-i man az toe , Sorkh-i toe az man , or in English, "My paleness to you, your healthy glow to me." There's a lot of joking and laughter.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当你跳过炽热的火焰时，你大喊"Zard-i man az toe"、"Sorkh-i toe az man"，或者用英语，"我对你来说是苍白的，对我来说是你健康的光芒。"有很多笑话和笑声

vocabulary.definition: n. 风信子, 风信子石, 红锆石；[化] 风信子石; 红锆石
vocabulary.context: There are usually also sekeh , gold and silver coins, often in a small bowl of water, symbolizing wealth; sombol , or hyacinth, a spring flower for life and beauty; and perhaps a highly polished samovar for boiling water and making tea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常还有sekeh，金币和银币，通常装在一小碗水里，象征着财富； sombol，或风信子，春天的花朵，代表着生命和美丽；也许还有一个用于烧水和泡茶的高度抛光的茶炊

vocabulary.definition: n. 再生, 复活, 新生
vocabulary.context: Nowruz is not a religious holiday but celebrates the rebirth of earth and all life on it.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 诺鲁孜节不是一个宗教节日，而是庆祝地球及其上所有生命的重生

vocabulary.definition: adj. 中古的, 中世纪的
