vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新年是为彼此、国家和世界的福祉祈祷

vocabulary.definition: n. 番木瓜树；[化] 番瓜; 番木瓜
vocabulary.context: In Liberia, the west African country settled by formerly enslaved people from the United States, baskets of fruits like bananas, papayas, mangoes, and pineapples are brought to church on the first Thursday of November.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在利比里亚，这个曾经是美国奴隶的西非国家，一篮子香蕉、木瓜、芒果和菠萝等水果在十一月的第一个星期四被带到教堂

vocabulary.definition: n. 意大利辣香肠
vocabulary.context: Kids get off school and many grownups get off work to spend the day as they wish, whether feasting on turkey or a large pepperoni pizza with extra cheese.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 孩子们放学了，许多大人也下班了，他们可以随心所欲地度过这一天，无论是吃火鸡还是加奶酪的大意大利辣香肠披萨

vocabulary.definition: n. <美>消防队员
vocabulary.context: Students make cards and gifts to thank hospital staff, firefighters, and other workers who help their community.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 学生们制作卡片和礼物来感谢医院工作人员、消防员和其他帮助社区的工作人员

vocabulary.definition: n. 拍卖；v.t. 拍卖
vocabulary.context: After the Thanksgiving service, the fruit is auctioned off.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 感恩节仪式结束后，水果被拍卖

vocabulary.definition: adj. 许多的, 丰富的, 丰饶的
vocabulary.context: Are days set aside to express gratitude for a plentiful fall harvest around the world?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 是否留出几天来表达对世界各地秋收丰收的感激之情？

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 想象, 预想
vocabulary.context: Hale envisioned a holiday set on a specific date that would promote a sense of community and shared experience.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 黑尔设想在特定日期设立一个假期，以促进社区意识和共享经验

vocabulary.definition: n. 不合, 争论, 不一致；[法] 不一致, 不同意, 陪审团的意见不一
vocabulary.context: The disagreements increased during the 1920s, when large cities, such as Philadelphia and New York City, held their first big Thanksgiving Day parades, and in 1934, when the National Football League played its first Thanksgiving game.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 20 年代，费城和纽约等大城市举行了首次大型感恩节游行，1934 年，国家橄榄球联盟举行了第一场感恩节比赛，分歧加剧

vocabulary.definition: n. 紧张, 不安, 拉紧, 张力, 压力, 电压；v.t. 拉紧, 使紧张
vocabulary.context: She hoped it would help ease the tensions caused by the ongoing Civil War.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她希望这将有助于缓解持续内战造成的紧张局势

vocabulary.definition: n. 餐具垫
vocabulary.context: That paper placemat under your bowl of wonton soup at the Chinese restaurant probably has pictures of those 12 animals, along with some dates and descriptions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中餐馆馄饨汤下面的纸餐垫上可能有这 12 种动物的照片，以及一些日期和描述

vocabulary.definition: n. 馄饨
vocabulary.context: That paper placemat under your bowl of wonton soup at the Chinese restaurant probably has pictures of those 12 animals, along with some dates and descriptions.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 中餐馆馄饨汤下面的纸餐垫上可能有这 12 种动物的照片，以及一些日期和描述

vocabulary.definition: n. 黄道带, 黄道十二宫图
vocabulary.context: That is why the cat and the rat are enemies, and why there are 12 animals in the Chinese zodiac, with the rat first and the pig last.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这就是为什么猫和鼠是敌人，也是为什么十二生肖中有十二种动物，老鼠在前，猪在后

vocabulary.definition: adj. 补充的, 补足的；[经] 补足的, 补充的
vocabulary.context: Yin and yang are Chinese words for complementary but opposite forces that make up the life force.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 阴和阳是汉语词汇，表示构成生命力的互补但相反的力量

vocabulary.definition: n. 天堂
vocabulary.context: B.C.), the Indian founder of Buddhism, whose followers seek enlightenment, a blessed state in which a person rises above desire and suffering and attains Nirvana - an ideal condition of rest, harmony, stability, or joy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: B.C.），印度佛教创始人，其追随者寻求启蒙，这是一种幸福的状态，在这种状态下，一个人超越欲望和痛苦并达到涅槃--一种休息、和谐、稳定或喜悦的理想状态

vocabulary.definition: n. 修道士, 僧侣, 和尚
vocabulary.context: Some historians suggest that the concept of the animal zodiac was not originally Chinese but was brought by Buddhist monks and other travelers on the Silk Road, the ancient trading routes that connected China with India and the Mediterranean Sea.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一些历史学家认为，生肖的概念最初并不是中国人提出的，而是由佛教僧侣和丝绸之路上的其他旅行者带来的，丝绸之路是连接中国与印度和地中海的古代贸易路线

vocabulary.definition: n. 朝代, 王朝
vocabulary.context: depict the zodiac animals, and a pottery set fashioned in the shape of figures with animal heads and human bodies was discovered in a tomb dating to the Tang dynasty (A.D.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 描绘了十二生肖，在一座唐代（公元1970年）墓葬中发现了一套带有兽头和人体的人物陶器

vocabulary.definition: n. 启迪, 教化
vocabulary.context: B.C.), the Indian founder of Buddhism, whose followers seek enlightenment, a blessed state in which a person rises above desire and suffering and attains Nirvana - an ideal condition of rest, harmony, stability, or joy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: B.C.），印度佛教创始人，其追随者寻求启蒙，这是一种幸福的状态，在这种状态下，一个人超越欲望和痛苦并达到涅槃--一种休息、和谐、稳定或喜悦的理想状态

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 达到, 获得；v.i. 达到
vocabulary.context: B.C.), the Indian founder of Buddhism, whose followers seek enlightenment, a blessed state in which a person rises above desire and suffering and attains Nirvana - an ideal condition of rest, harmony, stability, or joy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: B.C.），印度佛教创始人，其追随者寻求启蒙，这是一种幸福的状态，在这种状态下，一个人超越欲望和痛苦并达到涅槃--一种休息、和谐、稳定或喜悦的理想状态

vocabulary.definition: n. 丰收, 丰硕；多实, 肥沃
vocabulary.context: Flowers are believed to make homes more welcoming to good spirits, and fruit trees symbolize fruitfulness in the coming year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 鲜花被认为可以让家中更加充满好气，而果树则象征着来年的硕果累累

vocabulary.definition: n. 铜锣, 皿形钟；v.t. 鸣锣召唤
vocabulary.context: At midnight, firecrackers are set off and drums and gongs are sounded at local temples to mark the beginning of the holiday and to welcome back the Kitchen Gods.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 午夜时分，当地寺庙会燃放鞭炮，敲锣打鼓，标志着节日的开始，迎接灶神归来

vocabulary.definition: n. 钟, 宗, 忠, 聪
vocabulary.context: Food is an important part of the holiday, and families celebrate with special meals that include banh chung - rice cooked in sweet coconut milk, filled with pork and beans, and boiled in a banana leaf.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 食物是节日的重要组成部分，家人会用特别的饭菜来庆祝，其中包括 banh chung - 用甜椰奶煮的米饭，里面填满猪肉和豆子，用香蕉叶煮

vocabulary.definition: n. 商品, 货物；v. 交易, 买卖
vocabulary.context: Shoppers crowd the streets and purchase food, merchandise, flowers, and small fruit trees.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 购物者挤满街道购买食品、商品、鲜花和小果树

vocabulary.definition: n. 莲, 莲花, 荷花, 荷；[电] LOTUS, 莲花公司
vocabulary.context: Other holiday foods include dried fruit and vegetable candies, sweetened lotus seeds, and pickled pork snacks.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他节日食品包括干果蔬糖、甜莲子、腌肉零食等

vocabulary.definition: adj. 庆祝的, 喜庆的, 欢乐的
vocabulary.context: There are many festive parades that include dragon dances - acrobatic dances performed by dragon-costumed dancers on the third day of the new year.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多节日游行都包括舞龙--在大年初三由身着龙装的舞者表演的杂技舞蹈

vocabulary.definition: n. 信封, 封套, 封袋；[医] 膜, 包袋
vocabulary.context: During Tết, children receive "lucky money" in red envelopes in hopes of bringing them good fortune.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 春节期间，孩子们会收到红包"压岁钱"，希望给他们带来好运

vocabulary.definition: n. 财富, 运气, 兴隆, 大量财产, 好运, 命运；[法] 命运, 财产, 大量财产
vocabulary.context: During Tết, children receive "lucky money" in red envelopes in hopes of bringing them good fortune.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 春节期间，孩子们会收到红包"压岁钱"，希望给他们带来好运

vocabulary.definition: adj. 快乐的, 兴高采烈的
vocabulary.context: Over time, it took on a more celebratory tone.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 随着时间的推移，它呈现出更加庆祝的基调

vocabulary.definition: adj. 破天荒第一次（或第一个）的
vocabulary.context: The first-ever memorial service at Arlington National Cemetery, in Virginia, took place on May 30, 1868.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 第一次追悼会于 1868 年 5 月 30 日在弗吉尼亚州阿灵顿国家公墓举行

vocabulary.definition: n. 烤肉；v.t. 烤肉, 烧烤
vocabulary.context: On Memorial Day weekend, families across the United States enjoy warm weather, backyard barbecues, maybe even a trip to the beach.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在阵亡将士纪念日周末，美国各地的家庭享受温暖的天气、后院烧烤，甚至可能去海滩旅行

vocabulary.definition: adj. 即将来临的, 即将出现的
vocabulary.context: It put people in mind of the upcoming summer.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它让人们想起即将到来的夏天

vocabulary.definition: n. 购物者；[经] 顾客, 购物的人
vocabulary.context: Businesses offered sales to attract shoppers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 企业提供促销活动来吸引购物者

vocabulary.definition: n. 警察小队长, 军士
vocabulary.context: Krissy Stewart lost her husband, Marine sergeant David Stewart, to war in Afghanistan.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 克里斯·斯图尔特 (Krissy Stewart) 在阿富汗战争中失去了她的丈夫、海军陆战队中士大卫·斯图尔特 (David Stewart)

vocabulary.definition: n. 爱国心, 爱国精神, 爱国主义
vocabulary.context: The soldiers gave their lives "for love of country," he said, "and made immortal their patriotism and their virtue." Visitors decorated soldiers' graves with flags and flowers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他说，士兵们"为了爱国"而献出生命，"让他们的爱国主义和美德永垂不朽。"参观者用旗帜和鲜花装饰士兵的坟墓

vocabulary.definition: n. 大标题, 新闻摘要；v.t. 为...做标题, 写标题
vocabulary.context: In 1887, President Grover Cleveland made headlines after he was said to have spent the day fishing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 1887 年，格罗弗·克利夫兰总统因据说花了一天时间钓鱼而成为头条新闻

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 提交, 归诸于, 把...提交, 使求助于；v.i. 提到, 涉及, 查阅, 查询, 咨询
vocabulary.context: "Memorial Day for Gold Star families is every day," Stewart says, referring to families who've lost a relative in war.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "每天都是金星家庭的阵亡将士纪念日，"斯图尔特说，指的是在战争中失去亲人的家庭。 【07】"午夜！"她的黑色皮毛上布满了雪花

vocabulary.definition: adj. 无指的, 失去指的
vocabulary.context: They hang in tangles, greasy and black, for she cannot groom herself with her fingerless hands.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它们缠结在一起，又油腻又黑，因为她无法用无指的手来梳理自己

vocabulary.definition: adj. 零下的, 严寒的
vocabulary.context: In the far north live a group of native people who call themselves Inuit, or "the People." For hundreds of years, their ancestors occupied the land of ice, snow, and sub-zero temperatures that stretches from Russia to Greenland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在遥远的北方生活着一群自称因纽特人或"人民"的土著人。数百年来，他们的祖先居住在从俄罗斯到格陵兰岛的冰雪和零度以下的土地上

vocabulary.definition: adj. 给与生命的, 提神的
vocabulary.context: I greet you with the life-giving light!" I call out to her, taking great gulps of icy winter wind into my lungs.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我用赋予生命的光芒迎接你！"我向她呼喊，将冰冷的冬风吸入肺中

vocabulary.definition: n. 海象( walrus的复数形式 )
vocabulary.context: She broods there, on the floor of the sea, hoarding game animals into the pools that surround her house; seals, bearded seals, walruses, and whales all gather there at her will.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她在海底沉思，将猎物囤积在她房子周围的水池里；海豹、髯海豹、海象和鲸鱼都按照她的意愿聚集在那里

vocabulary.definition: n. 萨满教巫医；[法] 巫师
vocabulary.context: I am shaman and I must go.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我是萨满，我必须走了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不稳定的, 不安的, 危险的
vocabulary.context: Through contact with spirits like Sedna, the Inuit had a hand in determining their fate in a precarious world.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通过与塞德娜这样的神灵接触，因纽特人在一个不稳定的世界中决定了自己的命运

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 切断, 脱离, 分开, 使分离, 断绝, 中断；v.i. 断, 裂开
vocabulary.context: As she slipped under the waves forever, a miracle occurred: her severed fingers turned into seals.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当她永远滑入海浪之下时，奇迹发生了：她断掉的手指变成了海豹

vocabulary.definition: adv. 通常, 普通, 一般地
vocabulary.context: Ordinarily midwinter is a time of great feasting and game playing, but no winter in memory or in story was ever as bad for my people as this!
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常仲冬是一个盛宴和游戏的时期，但记忆中或故事中的冬天对我的人民来说从来没有像现在这样糟糕过！

vocabulary.definition: adj. 漠不关心的, 无重要性的, 中立的；[医] 中性的, 无作用的, 无亲和力的, 淡漠的
vocabulary.context: The world of the Inuit was harsh, and they believed that it was inhabited by supernatural beings of many kinds, some friendly, some evil, and some indifferent to the activities of people.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 因纽特人的世界是严酷的，他们相信那里居住着各种各样的超自然生物，有些是友善的，有些是邪恶的，还有一些对人类的活动漠不关心

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 超过；胜出
vocabulary.context: The new good microbes move in and out-compete the killer microbes, curing the infection.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 新的有益微生物进入并击败杀手微生物，从而治愈感染

vocabulary.definition: adj. 蠕动的
vocabulary.context: Does it make you feel squirmy to think of yourself as a habitat for microbes?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 将自己视为微生物的栖息地是否会让您感到局促不安？

vocabulary.definition: n. 坏人, (尤指电影中之)恶人
vocabulary.context: When good gut bacteria are weak, baddies can take over and make people very sick.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当有益的肠道细菌衰弱时，坏细菌就会取而代之，使人们病得很重

vocabulary.definition: n. 冒号, 结肠；[医] 结肠
vocabulary.context: The center of microbiome operations for your body is the last part of your intestine, the colon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人体微生物组运作的中心是肠道的最后部分，即结肠

vocabulary.definition: n. 曼秀雷敦（日本化妆品牌名）
vocabulary.context: The bacterium Propionibacterium acnes , for example, loves faces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，痤疮丙酸杆菌就喜欢面孔

vocabulary.definition: n. 珐琅, 瓷釉；v.t. 涂以瓷釉, 彩饰
vocabulary.context: This acid eats away at tooth enamel, making cavities.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这种酸会腐蚀牙釉质，形成蛀牙

vocabulary.definition: n. 细菌；[医] [无芽胞]杆菌属
vocabulary.context: The bacterium Propionibacterium acnes , for example, loves faces.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 例如，痤疮丙酸杆菌就喜欢面孔

vocabulary.definition: adj. 柔软的, 逢迎的, 顺从的；v.t. 使柔软, 使顺从
vocabulary.context: Other skin microbes make a natural lotion to help your skin stay soft and supple.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 其他皮肤微生物可以制造天然乳液，帮助您的皮肤保持柔软

vocabulary.definition: n. 人, 人身, 人称；[法] 人, 法人, 人身
vocabulary.context: Because the skin is always picking up new microbes from the air, the mix varies over time and from person to person.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 由于皮肤总是从空气中吸收新的微生物，因此混合物会随着时间和人的不同而变化

vocabulary.definition: adj. 发白如银的, 长着银灰色头发的
vocabulary.context: "Well, son, he's mighty sick," the silver-haired man said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "好吧，儿子，他病得很厉害，"银发男子说道

vocabulary.definition: n. 阔, 明白, 粗野；[电] 宽度
vocabulary.context: Normally John loved to wander over the long, slow roll of the Nebraska plains, following the brush-and-tree-lined coulees to where the vast land met the broadness of the sky.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 通常，约翰喜欢在内布拉斯加州平原绵长而缓慢的起伏中漫步，沿着灌木丛和绿树成荫的沟渠，到达广阔的土地与广阔的天空相遇的地方

vocabulary.definition: n. 火柴盒
vocabulary.context: Then, stuffing the matchbox in his pocket, he snatched the kerosene lantern from its hook and dashed out the door without looking back.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后，他把火柴盒塞进口袋里，从挂钩上抓起煤油灯，头也不回地冲出门去

vocabulary.definition: n. 载重马, 做重活的人
vocabulary.context: He turned from the workhorses and made his way past the animals to where the Maxwells' saddle horse stood.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他离开了驮马，越过牲口，来到了麦克斯韦家的鞍马所在的地方

vocabulary.definition: adj. 草皮的, 草皮遮覆的, 草泥制成的；n. 草泥墙房屋
vocabulary.context: Sleet pounded against the windowpane of the Nebraska soddy while John Maxwell's father lay in his bed by the wall.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当约翰·麦克斯韦的父亲躺在靠墙的床上时，雨夹雪敲打着内布拉斯加的车窗玻璃

vocabulary.definition: n. 肚带, 紧握, 必然(发生)的事情；v.t. 给...系肚带, 紧握住, 抓牢
vocabulary.context: Smoothing the saddle blanket onto her back, he heaved the saddle on and cinched it tight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他把马鞍毯铺平到她的背上，然后把马鞍放上去，并把它系紧

vocabulary.definition: adj. 下雨夹雪的
vocabulary.context: Then he led the horse from the quiet of the barn into the cruelty of the sleety afternoon.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然后他牵着马从安静的谷仓走进残酷的雨夹雪下午

vocabulary.definition: adj. 怒目而视的, 过激的
vocabulary.context: Papa thrashed and moaned worse than ever, wild-eyed and racked with deep coughing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 爸爸比以往任何时候都更加剧烈地摔打和呻吟，眼睛睁得大大的，并且剧烈咳嗽

vocabulary.definition: n. 小山, 圆丘；v.t. 敲钟；v.i. 敲响
vocabulary.context: The little soddy where his father lay seemed so lost and helpless as it perched on the small knoll of their homestead - like an island in the midst of an infinite ocean of brown grassland.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他父亲躺着的那块小草泥坐落在他们家园的小山丘上，看起来是如此迷失和无助--就像一片棕色草原的无边海洋中的一座岛屿

vocabulary.definition: adj. 苍白的；灰色的
vocabulary.context: Doc Matthews arrived on horseback as the gray daylight faded to grayer twilight.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当灰白的日光渐渐褪去，暮色变得更加灰暗时，马修斯医生骑马抵达

vocabulary.definition: adj. 打破记录的
vocabulary.context: As he was flipping through the book's record-breaking entries, he found one that intrigued him.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他翻阅书中破纪录的条目时，他发现了一个令他感兴趣的条目

vocabulary.definition: adj. 肌肉结实的, 顽强的；[医] 多肉的, 肌肤的
vocabulary.context: Nonetheless, he was still impressed with the strength of the brawny beetles in his laboratory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，他仍然对实验室里的壮甲虫的力量印象深刻

vocabulary.definition: n. 峡谷, 凹槽, 塞饱, 咽喉；v.i. 狼吞虎咽；v.t. 塞饱, 狼吞虎咽地吃
vocabulary.context: Before he has a chance to gorge on rotting fruit, however, he senses more trouble.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 然而，在他有机会狼吞虎咽腐烂的水果之前，他感觉到了更多的麻烦

vocabulary.definition: n. 头饰, 马首挽具, 井架；[医] 头网, 连轮装置
vocabulary.context: Male rhinoceros beetles' hefty headgear resembles a rhinoceros, giving them their name.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雄性犀牛甲虫的巨大头饰酷似犀牛，因此得名

vocabulary.definition: adj. 重的, 肌肉发达的
vocabulary.context: Male rhinoceros beetles' hefty headgear resembles a rhinoceros, giving them their name.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雄性犀牛甲虫的巨大头饰酷似犀牛，因此得名

vocabulary.definition: n. 装备, 组织, 计划, 机构, 调整, 设置；[计] 设置
vocabulary.context: Using this setup, he measured the amount of oxygen the little insect was inhaling.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 使用这种装置，他测量了小昆虫吸入的氧气量

vocabulary.definition: n. 攻击者
vocabulary.context: The attacker is strong, but not strong enough.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 攻击者很强，但还不够强

vocabulary.definition: conj. 然而, 尽管, 不过；adv. 不过, 仍然, 尽管如此, 然而
vocabulary.context: Nonetheless, he was still impressed with the strength of the brawny beetles in his laboratory.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 尽管如此，他仍然对实验室里的壮甲虫的力量印象深刻

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 需要, 命令, 要求；[法] 需要, 要求, 命令
vocabulary.context: Rhinoceros beetles require much less energy than humans and other animals to move large loads.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 犀牛甲虫移动大负载所需的能量比人类和其他动物少得多

vocabulary.definition: adj. 潦草的, 刺痛的, 发痒的, 凑合的, 发擦刮声的, 乖戾的
vocabulary.context: If we're in scratchy shirts and uncomfortable dress pants, we're not going to focus very well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们穿着粗糙的衬衫和不舒服的正装裤，我们就无法很好地集中注意力

vocabulary.definition: n. 包含, 内含物；[计] 蕴含
vocabulary.context: Many schools say uniforms make it easier for students to focus in class, and that uniforms promote inclusion.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 许多学校表示，校服让学生更容易在课堂上集中注意力，并且校服可以促进包容性

vocabulary.definition: n. 用具, 配备, 机构；v.t. 配备, 供应；v.i. 得到装备
vocabulary.context: If students could wear normal clothes, we'd be able to express ourselves, be comfortable, and not spend money on outfits that we never wear at home.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果学生可以穿正常的衣服，我们就能够表达自己，感到舒适，并且不会花钱买我们在家从来不穿的衣服

vocabulary.definition: n. 欺凌弱小者, 土霸；v.t. 威胁, 恐吓, 欺负；v.i. 欺负；adj. 特好的, 第一流的；adv. 十分
vocabulary.context: I think it is harder to bully someone about his or her clothes if you are all wearing the same thing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我认为，如果你们都穿着同样的衣服，就很难因为某人的衣服而欺负他或她

vocabulary.definition: n. 统计学, 统计资料；[计] 统计信息
vocabulary.context: According to the National Center for Education Statistics, uniforms are required at about 22% of U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 根据国家教育统计中心的数据，美国约有 22% 的人需要穿校服

vocabulary.definition: n. 趋势, 倾向, 走向；v.i. 倾向, 转向；[计] 趋势
vocabulary.context: When everyone is dressed the same, you don't have to worry about how you look or about wearing the latest trend.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当每个人都穿得一样时，你就不必担心自己的外表或穿着最新潮流

vocabulary.definition: n. 读者, 读物, 文选, 校对人, 讲师；[计] 阅读程序; 阅读器
vocabulary.context: TIME for Kids asked readers to weigh in.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 《儿童时代》杂志要求读者发表意见

vocabulary.definition: n. 裤子, 长裤, 短衬裤, 女式运动短裤
vocabulary.context: If we're in scratchy shirts and uncomfortable dress pants, we're not going to focus very well.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 如果我们穿着粗糙的衬衫和不舒服的正装裤，我们就无法很好地集中注意力

vocabulary.definition: n. 个性, 人格, (团体、地方、国家)特有特性, 名人；[医] 人格; 个性
vocabulary.context: But some students think uniforms are uncomfortable, and that kids should have the freedom to express their personality through their clothing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但一些学生认为校服不舒服，孩子们应该有通过服装表达个性的自由

vocabulary.definition: n. 舞台工作人员
vocabulary.context: The stagehand signals us, and Team Dragon files onstage only to be blocked by Vijay, the lead actor.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 舞台工作人员向我们发出信号，龙队列队上台，却被主演维杰挡住了

vocabulary.definition: adj. 真正的, 道地的
vocabulary.context: Now we've an honest-to-goodness theater with state-of-the-art equipment, and The Legendary Cowherd will be its very first show.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 现在我们有了一个名副其实的剧院，设备最先进，《牛郎传说》将是它的首场演出

vocabulary.definition: v. 即兴演出( ad-lib的现在分词 ); 当场作出; <口>随口说出（俏皮话）; 无准备地说（或做）
vocabulary.context: I started OK, but around the third sentence I got so caught up in the role, I forgot where I was and ended up ad-libbing the rest.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 我一开始还不错，但到了第三句话的时候，我就完全陷入了这个角色，我忘记了自己在哪里，最后就即兴表演了剩下的部分

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 乞讨, 搜寻；v.i. 东张西望, 搜寻, 乞讨
vocabulary.context: It takes place right before the dragon battle, and the hero, tempted to run from the impending fight, wrestles with his fears and ultimately scrounges the courage to face the monster.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 故事发生在龙之战之前，英雄试图逃离即将到来的战斗，与恐惧作斗争，最终鼓起勇气面对怪物

vocabulary.definition: n. 技术学院或学校
vocabulary.context: "It's cool watching the techs work."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "观看技术人员工作真是太酷了。"

vocabulary.definition: n. 自言自语, 独白
vocabulary.context: "The crew needs to tweak stuff for the soliloquy."
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "剧组需要调整独白的内容。"

vocabulary.definition: adj. 蛇的, 层层卷绕的, 阴险的, 迂回的；n. 蛇纹石, 弯弯曲曲之物；v.i. 蜿蜒；v.t. 使迂回曲折地行进
vocabulary.context: While Vijay swings his spear, we circle, zigzag, and serpentine across the stage.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当维杰挥舞着他的长矛时，我们在舞台上盘旋、曲折、蜿蜒

vocabulary.definition: n. 热烈欢迎, 大喝采, 小凯旋式
vocabulary.context: The Legendary Cowherd concludes to a standing ovation.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 传奇牛郎结束全场起立鼓掌

vocabulary.definition: n. 独白, 独脚戏, 独白场面, (非正式)(贬)滔滔不绝的话
vocabulary.context: Vijay launches into his monologue.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 维杰开始了他的独白

vocabulary.definition: n. 头巾, 围巾, 手帕
vocabulary.context: "They deserved it," says Priya, tying a kerchief over her rumpled curls.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "这是他们应得的，"普里亚一边说，一边在她皱巴巴的卷发上系了一块头巾

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 抢劫, 劫持, 敲诈；[法] 挡路抢劫, 抢劫, 绑架
vocabulary.context: Farther away, another airplane that had been hijacked crashed in Pennsylvania.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 更远的地方，另一架被劫持的飞机在宾夕法尼亚州坠毁

vocabulary.definition: n. 挑战者；[经] 申请回避的人
vocabulary.context: Older people you know can probably remember the explosion of the Space Shuttle Challenger or the disaster at the Chernobyl nuclear plant or the assassination of President John F.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你认识的老年人可能还记得挑战者号航天飞机的爆炸或切尔诺贝利核电站的灾难或约翰·肯尼迪总统的暗杀事件

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 减少, 缩小, 减轻；v.i. 变小
vocabulary.context: People recover, and heal, and the grief of the survivors lessens.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 人们康复、痊愈，幸存者的悲伤减轻

vocabulary.definition: adj. 令人恐惧的；骇人的；极大的
vocabulary.context: It's terrifying.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 太可怕了

vocabulary.definition: n. 暗杀；[法] 暗杀, 行刺
vocabulary.context: Older people you know can probably remember the explosion of the Space Shuttle Challenger or the disaster at the Chernobyl nuclear plant or the assassination of President John F.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你认识的老年人可能还记得挑战者号航天飞机的爆炸或切尔诺贝利核电站的灾难或约翰·肯尼迪总统的暗杀事件

vocabulary.definition: adv. 可怕地, 甚为, 非常
vocabulary.context: Those were terrible, horrible things, and people were terribly afraid for many days after each of those things happened.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些都是非常非常可怕的事情，每一件事情发生后，人们都非常害怕很多天

vocabulary.definition: adj. 核子的, 原子能的, 核的, 中心的；[医] 核的
vocabulary.context: Older people you know can probably remember the explosion of the Space Shuttle Challenger or the disaster at the Chernobyl nuclear plant or the assassination of President John F.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你认识的老年人可能还记得挑战者号航天飞机的爆炸或切尔诺贝利核电站的灾难或约翰·肯尼迪总统的暗杀事件

vocabulary.definition: n. 飞机；[机] 飞机
vocabulary.context: One airplane hit each of the two towers of the World Trade Center.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 一架飞机撞上了世贸中心的两座塔楼

vocabulary.definition: n. 崩溃, 倒塌, 虚脱；v.i. 倒塌, 崩溃, 瓦解；v.t. 使倒塌, 折叠；[计] 折叠
vocabulary.context: Not long after those crashes, both towers collapsed.The Pentagon, the center of the U.S.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 坠机事件发生后不久，两座塔楼都倒塌了。五角大楼，美国的中心

vocabulary.definition: n. 胸骨；[医] 胸骨
vocabulary.context: The weight of her lie pressed down on Margie's breastbone, making it hard to breathe.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 她的谎言压在玛吉的胸骨上，让她呼吸困难

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 合并, 联合, 合生；[计] 结合
vocabulary.context: The colors began to coalesce, turning one pathway red, another blue, and on through the spectrum.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 颜色开始融合，一条路径变成红色，另一条路径变成蓝色，并在整个光谱中持续存在

vocabulary.definition: n. 不透明物；adj. 不透明的, 不传热的, 不传导的, 阴暗的；[计] 白底
vocabulary.context: The door sealed with a thud and Margie spun around to look back, but the plex-glass was opaque from the inside.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 门砰的一声关上了，玛吉转身回头看，但有机玻璃从里面看是不透明的

vocabulary.definition: n. 回丝, 花丝, 线头, 纱头, 乱弹；v.t. 指弹, 敲打, 把绳毛夹杂于；v.i. 乱弹, 轻敲
vocabulary.context: The rainbow colors pulsed to a loud heartbeat thrum - da-dum, da-dum .
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 彩虹的颜色伴随着响亮的心跳声--da-dum，da-dum

vocabulary.definition: adv. 在脚下, 碍事地；[经] 少计总额
vocabulary.context: The ground was cold and gave way underfoot, as if she were stepping on molded gelatin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地面冰冷，脚下塌陷，仿佛踩在模制的明胶上

vocabulary.definition: n. 明胶, 凝胶体, 动物胶, 果子冻, 彩色透明滤光板；[计] 明胶
vocabulary.context: The ground was cold and gave way underfoot, as if she were stepping on molded gelatin.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 地面冰冷，脚下塌陷，仿佛踩在模制的明胶上

vocabulary.definition: n. 连衣裤, （尤指女式）连衣裤
vocabulary.context: The ceremonial jumpsuit they'd given her had no pockets, but she'd tucked one small item in the band of her underwear: her father's watch.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他们送给她的仪式连身衣没有口袋，但她在内衣带里塞了一件小东西：她父亲的手表

vocabulary.definition: n. 桃花心木, 红褐色；[机] 桃花心木
vocabulary.context: When the door closed, the first minister rested one hand on the mahogany desk and turned her deep black eyes on Margie.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 门关上后，首席部长将一只手放在桃花心木桌子上，将她深邃的黑色眼睛转向玛吉

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不能感知的, 微细的
vocabulary.context: But the steady, almost imperceptible tick-tick-tick against her belly was the only thing making her brave enough to keep from running.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但只有那股持续不断的、几乎难以察觉的滴答声在她的腹部响起，让她有足够的勇气不再逃跑

vocabulary.definition: n. 伤害, 害处；v.t. 伤害, 损害
vocabulary.context: It didn't make sense, and segregation harmed Black children's education.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这没有道理，种族隔离损害了黑人儿童的教育

vocabulary.definition: n. 不平等, 不同, 不平坦, 不平均；n. 不平等, 不等式；[计] 不等式
vocabulary.context: While he was there, he learned how making and changing laws could help fight inequality.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当他在那里时，他了解到制定和修改法律如何有助于消除不平等

vocabulary.definition: adv. 历史上地；从历史观点上说
vocabulary.context: He went to Howard Law School instead, a historically Black school.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他去了霍华德法学院，这是一所历史悠久的黑人学校

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 废止, 革除, 消灭；[经] 废除, 取消, 裁撤
vocabulary.context: It was less than 50 years after slavery had been abolished.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 此时奴隶制被废除还不到50年

vocabulary.definition: n. 种族主义, 种族偏见；[法] 种族主义, 种族歧视, 种族歧视主张
vocabulary.context: "I wish I could say that racism and prejudice were only distant memories," he said.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: "我希望我能说种族主义和偏见只是遥远的记忆，"他说

vocabulary.definition: n. 差别, 岐视, 辨别力；[化] 鉴别
vocabulary.context: He spent his career fighting to end discrimination.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他的职业生涯都在为结束歧视而奋斗

vocabulary.definition: n. 参议员, (某些大学的)理事；[法] 参议员, 上议员
vocabulary.context: Unfortunately, several senators didn't want him to become a judge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不幸的是，几位参议员不希望他成为法官

vocabulary.definition: n. 律师；[经] 律师
vocabulary.context: He joined the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (NAACP) as one of their lawyers.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他作为律师之一加入了全国有色人种协进会（NAACP）

vocabulary.definition: adv. 恐怕, 不幸的是
vocabulary.context: Unfortunately, several senators didn't want him to become a judge.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 不幸的是，几位参议员不希望他成为法官

vocabulary.definition: n. 废品旧货栈
vocabulary.context: Add it all up, and you'll understand why some climbers call Mount Everest the world's highest junkyard.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 把这一切加起来，你就会明白为什么一些登山者称珠穆朗玛峰为世界上最高的垃圾场

vocabulary.definition: n. 千克, 公斤；[医] 千克, 公斤
vocabulary.context: Each climber makes about 18 pounds (or 8 kilograms) of trash, some of which they leave behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 每个登山者都会产生大约 18 磅（或 8 公斤）的垃圾，其中一些是他们留下的

vocabulary.definition: v.i. 再出现
vocabulary.context: It reappears when the snow melts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当雪融化时它会重新出现

vocabulary.definition: n. 包装者, 包裹者, 包装物, 覆盖物, 外包烟叶, 包纸, 书的封皮, 妇女晨衣；[医] 包裹料
vocabulary.context: Climbers just leave their empty oxygen bottles, food wrappers, old tents, and other trash behind.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 登山者只留下空氧气瓶、食品包装纸、旧帐篷和其他垃圾

vocabulary.definition: n. 帐篷, 帷幕, 住处, 塞条, 塞子；v.i. 住帐蓬, 宿营, 暂时居住；v.t. 用帐篷遮盖, 使住帐篷, 用塞条嵌入
vocabulary.context: Climbers bring tents and sleeping bags to set up camp along the way.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 登山者携带帐篷和睡袋沿途扎营

vocabulary.definition: n. 垃圾, 废物；[计] 无用信息
vocabulary.context: Garbage on Mount Everest is more than just ugly.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 珠穆朗玛峰上的垃圾不仅仅是丑陋

vocabulary.definition: n. 熔化, 熔化物, 溶解；v. (使)熔化, (使)溶解, (使)消散, (使)变软
vocabulary.context: It reappears when the snow melts.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 当雪融化时它会重新出现

vocabulary.definition: num. 十亿, 十亿个
vocabulary.context: These rivers supply more than a billion people with drinking water.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 这些河流为超过十亿人提供饮用水

vocabulary.definition: n. 乘骑用马, 框, 衬纸, 山；v.i. 乘马, 爬上, 增长；v.t. 爬上, 使上马, 装上, 装裱, 安放, 制作...的标本, 设置, 上演；[计] 安装
vocabulary.context: The temperature on Mount Everest often falls below freezing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 珠穆朗玛峰的气温经常低于冰点

vocabulary.definition: adj. 鬼鬼祟祟的, 苗条的
vocabulary.context: Have you ever played with a Slinky?
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 你玩过 Slinky 吗？

vocabulary.definition: adj. 运动的, 运动引起的, 动力学的, 活动的；[医] 运动的, 动的, 动力的
vocabulary.context: Another kind is kinetic energy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 另一种是动能

vocabulary.definition: n. 线圈, 盘绕, 骚动, 卷；v.t. 盘绕, 卷
vocabulary.context: The Slinky's coils stretch as it moves.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: Slinky 的线圈在移动时会拉伸

vocabulary.definition: n. 投掷, 急冲, 嘲弄；v.t. 投, 丢下, 抛弃, 使陷入, 挥动, 嘲笑, 扫视；v.i. 猛冲
vocabulary.context: It has the stored energy that allows it to pull on itself to fling it over.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 它拥有储存的能量，可以拉动自己将其扔过去

vocabulary.definition: n. 物理学家, 机械唯物论者, 自然科学家；[医] 菲西克氏手术(虹膜圆片切除)
vocabulary.context: James Valles is a physicist at Brown University.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 詹姆斯·瓦莱斯 (James Valles) 是布朗大学的物理学家

vocabulary.definition: n. 橡皮, 橡胶, 做摩擦动作的人, 按摩师, 决胜盘；v.t. 用橡胶制造, 涂橡胶于
vocabulary.context: Think of it like stretching a rubber band to make it fly across the room.

vocabulary.definition: n. 干坏事, 坏事

vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他想要过一种尽可能简单的生活，远离不法行为

vocabulary.definition: adj. 不相等的, 不规则的, 不能胜任的；[经] 不平均的, 不等的
vocabulary.context: Lay knew that the world he threatened was a harmful and unequal one.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 莱知道他所威胁的世界是一个有害且不平等的世界

vocabulary.definition: n. 传记
vocabulary.context: After Lay died, a man named Robert Vaux wrote a biography of his life.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 雷去世后，一位名叫罗伯特·沃克斯的人写了一本关于他生平的传记

vocabulary.definition: n. 刺, 戳, 剧痛, 尝试, 努力；v.t. 刺, 戳, 刺入, 刺痛, 直入, 使伤心；v.i. 刺, 刺伤
vocabulary.context: But this time, when he finished, he pulled out a sword and stabbed it into the bible.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但这一次，当他说完之后，他拔出一把剑，刺入了圣经

vocabulary.definition: v.t. 恐吓, 威胁, 预示...的凶兆；v.i. 威胁, 恫吓, 可能来临
vocabulary.context: He wrote that Lay was not like a calm, peaceful moon but more like a dangerous comet that threatened the planets it flew by.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 他写道，雷不像一颗平静、和平的月亮，而更像一颗危险的彗星，威胁着它飞过的行星

vocabulary.definition: adj. 地温的, 地热的
vocabulary.context: Energy made by using Earth's heat is called geothermal energy.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 利用地球热量产生的能源称为地热能

vocabulary.definition: n. 涡轮机；[化] 涡轮机
vocabulary.context: Except instead of steam just coming out of the kettle, we have pipelines that take it to the power plants." All that steam flows into turbines in 13 power plants.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 除了蒸汽不是直接从水壶中出来外，我们还有管道将其输送到发电厂。"所有这些蒸汽都流入 13 个发电厂的涡轮机

vocabulary.definition: n. 喷泉, 间歇泉
vocabulary.context: In California, The Geysers power plant uses it to make enough electricity for 725,000 homes.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 在加利福尼亚州，The Geysers 发电厂使用它为 725,000 个家庭提供足够的电力

vocabulary.definition: n. 废水
vocabulary.context: But The Geysers also takes treated wastewater from nearby towns.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 但间歇泉也从附近城镇收集经过处理的废水

vocabulary.definition: n. 再注满, 替换物；v.t. 再将...注满；v.i. 被再注满
vocabulary.context: The underground water that becomes steam needs to be refilled so the steam can keep flowing.
vocabulary.contextTranslation: 变成蒸汽的地下水需要重新填充，这样蒸汽才能继续流动

vocabulary.definition: n. 茶壶, 罐；[化] 釜体釜; 锅
